title: Business Process Admin (experienced in Sharepoint)
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Business Process Admin or Visual Communication Admin plays a key role in supporting internal operations by managing and updating content in company information hubs, creating visually compelling slide decks, and contributing to content development per Cardone Ventures’ brand guidelines. This role combines administrative coordination with creative execution, ensuring that internal documents, presentations, and shared resources are well-organized, up-to-date, and aligned with brand standards.



The Business Process Admin / Visual Communication Admin position is highly independent but will provide support to all departments within our organization. You will need to deliver results in a fast-paced and ambiguous environment, and be dependable and reliable in meeting deadlines and targets.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Maintains and organizes key platforms like SharePoint, Asana, Trainual, and internal content hubs to ensure tea
mbers have reliable access to accurate, branded, and up-to-date resources.

- Creates polished slide decks, branded visuals, and instructional content that enhance both internal and external experiences, ensuring messaging is clear, consistent, and aligned with company standards.

- Serves as a cross-functional connector by capturing and refining processes, coordinating updates, and promoting best practices that streamline communication, reduce inefficiencies, and support scalable growth.





OBJECTIVES

etings or recorded walkthroughs into clear, structured documentation for reference and training.

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

TThe Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

- Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

- Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

- Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

- Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

- Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

- Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

- Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

- Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

- Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

- Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

- Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

- Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

- Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

- High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

- Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

title: Creative Strategist/Copywriter for DTC Supplement Brand
description:
We've scaled multiple DTC brands past 7 figures/month. We're now hiring creative strategists for a new supplement brand in our portfolio.



This is a performance-driven role. You get a base retainer plus a percentage of the ad spend your work generates. Strong creative means strong income.



What the role looks like day to day:

You'll be writing direct response ad concepts and iterations for Meta ads. Every piece of creative is measured. You'll see exactly what your work does in-market and iterate based on real data, not guesswork.



This isn't "write copy and send it into a void."

You'll know what won, what lost, and why.



What we provide:

We have a thorough onboarding built around the consumer psychology, direct response frameworks, and structured workflows you'd need to write ads that actually scale. This isn't theory. These are the exact systems we've used to scale brands profitably, and you'll be trained on all of it.



You won't be guessing at what works. You'll have the frameworks, the data, and the feedback loop to get better fast.



What we're looking for:

You have a background in copywriting, creative strategy, or direct response advertising. You've written ads,
s, VSLs, landing pages, or scripts and you understand that the job is to move people to action, not just write things that sound good.



Beyond that:

You're comfortable working a consistent daily schedule, not juggling ten clients at once. You take feedback seriously and iterate fast. You care whether your work actually converts, not just whether it got approved.



Who this isn't for:

If you think good copy is about clever words rather than structured persuasion, this won't be a fit. If you're resistant to frameworks, systems, or direct feedback on your work, this isn't the right environment. If you want to write one thing, invoice, and disappear, this role will frustrate you.



Compensation:

Monthly base retainer, plus a percentage tied to ad spend on your creatives. Long-term, consistent workload with room to grow and be promoted as the brand scales.



To apply:

Send a brief message with:

Your relevant experience, what you've written, what space you've worked in, and what kind of results you've driven.



One or two examples of direct response copy you've written. Ads preferred, but
s, landing pages, or scripts work too.

title: Accounts Receivable Specialist
description:
Job Title: Accounts Receivable & Invoicing Specialist

Location: Remote (US Hours)



Schedule: Full-time | Sun-Fri 8AM-5PM PST 



About the Role



We’re looking for a detail-obsessed, process-driven Accounts Receivable Specialist to handle invoicing, payment tracking, and reconciliation across multiple systems.



You will be working with multiple tools, managing high-volume transactions and ensuring absolute accuracy in financial records.



What You’ll Be Doing



Invoicing & Sales Order Processing

Review completed sales orders

Input and generate invoices in QuickBooks with 100?curacy

Match shipping documents (BOL/POD) and ensure completeness before invoicing

Maintain and update Invoice Tracker in Google Sheets



Customer & Product Setup

Create new customer profiles in QuickBooks

Add new SKUs and ensure correct income/expense account mapping

Ensure proper currency handling (USD/EUR)



Payment Processing & Matching

Match payments from Maverick, Shopify, and bank feeds to invoices

Investigate discrepancies and resolve mismatches

Track payment batches and reconcile deposits accurately



Specialized Invoicing (Advanced)

Process dropship invoices 

Handle EU VAT scenarios and compliance requirements

Apply correct tax treatments depending on shipping and billing regions



Process Compliance & Documentation

Follow SOPs strictly and flag inconsistencies

Maintain organized documentation (SO, BOL, invoices)

Coordinate with Sales, Warehouse, and Finance teams



What We’re Looking For



Must-Haves:

2+ years experience in Accounts Receivable or Invoicing

Strong experience with QuickBooks

High proficiency in Google Sheets (XLOOKUP, filtering, reconciliation)

Experience handling high-volume transactions

Extreme attention to detail (non-negotiable)



Bonus Points If You Have:

Experience with ERP systems, Shopify, or Maverick Payments

Exposure to EU VAT rules or international invoicing

Experience with dropshipping or inventory-based businesses





How to Apply



Submit:



Your resume with the word "pineapple" included in your cover letter

title: General Manager / COO for AI Tech Startup
description:
General Manager for Tech Startup



AI Scam Detection and Content Authenticity App

Full-Time | Remote | Philippines

Salary: ?100,000/month



VALORPRO Global is hiring on behalf of an exciting early-stage tech startup building a mobile and web app focused on AI scam detection, fraud prevention, and content authenticity verification.



We are looking for a strong General Manager who can run the business day to day while the founder focuses on product vision, strategy, and fundraising.



This is for someone who is highly organized, proactive, and experienced in startup operations. You must be able to manage moving parts, lead people, solve problems fast, and build structure in a fast-changing environment.



This is not a beginner role.

This is not a purely creative or visionary role.

This is for a real operator who knows how to execute.



What You Will Do

Oversee daily operations of the startup

Manage team coordination across developers, designers, marketers, and support staff

Keep projects moving on time and on budget

Build and improve systems, workflows, and accountability

Track KPIs, timelines, and operational priorities

Handle vendor coordination and day-to-day business issues

Support customer service setup and feedback systems

Assist with basic HR, payroll coordination, and admin operations

Solve problems quickly without needing constant direction

Help the founder stay focused on strategy by taking ownership of execution

Requirements



Please apply only if you meet most of these requirements:



5+ years of experience as a General Manager, Operations Manager, Head of Operations, Startup COO, or similar

Proven experience managing teams and operations in a startup, tech company, app business, SaaS, or digital business

Strong English communication skills, written and spoken

Strong leadership, organization, and follow-through

Experience using tools like ClickUp, Asana, Trello, Notion, Slack, or similar

Able to work in a fast-paced, sometimes ambiguous startup environment

Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills

Based in the Philippines

Reliable internet and professional home office setup

Big Plus If You Have Experience In

AI tools

Fraud detection

Trust and safety

Content moderation

Mobile or web app launches

Startup scaling

Customer support operations

Vendor management

US-based founders or international teams

What We Offer

?100,000 monthly salary

Full-time remote work

Flexible hours with some overlap with US time

High-impact leadership role

Growth opportunity as the startup scales

Chance to help build a meaningful product solving real digital problems



How to Apply



To be considered, send your application to 



Your updated resume

A short 1-minute video or a written response answering these 3 questions:

What is the biggest team or operation you have managed, and what results did you achieve?

Describe a time you handled a major operational problem in a startup or fast-moving company.

Why are you interested in helping run an AI scam detection and content authenticity app?



Important:

Only experienced and qualified applicants will be contacted. We are looking for someone who can take ownership, lead execution, and grow with the company.



VALORPRO Global

Building Real Value Worldwide

We are looking for a creative and trend-savvy Part-Time Video Editor to transform our existing video library into high-impact short-form content for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels. We have 20–50 raw videos ready to go, and we need someone who can make them scroll-stopping, engaging, and shareable.

? Stay up to date with trending sounds, visual styles, and content formats on each platform

What We're Looking For

? Proven experience editing short-form social media video (Reels, Shorts, TikTok, etc.)

? Strong portfolio showcasing engaging, high-retention social content

? Proficiency in editing software such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

? Deep understanding of what makes content perform on YouTube, Instagram, and

? Eye for visual storytelling, pacing, color grading, and audio mixing

? Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage a content queue

? Strong communication skills and openness to feedback

title: SEO & Content Specialist
description:
Are you an SEO specialist who loves seeing your content climb the rankings? Do you get excited about keyword research, technical audits, and crafting content that actually converts?



Innovest, a leading financial advice company in New Zealand, is looking for an experienced SEO & Content Specialist to join our growing team. We help Kiwi families buy their first homes, protect their families with insurance, and build wealth through smart financial decisions. Now we need someone to help more people find us online.



What You'll Do:

• Develop and execute SEO strategies that drive organic traffic and leads

• Write engaging blog content and landing pages (4-8 articles/month)

• Conduct technical SEO audits and implement improvements

• Manage local SEO for Auckland and Hamilton regions

• Track performance and report on what's working (and what's not)

• Collaborate with our paid ads specialist to create a cohesive digital strategy



What We're Looking For:

• 3-5 years of SEO experience with proven results

• Excellent written English — you can write content that doesn't sound like AI

• Hands-on experience with Semrush, Ahrefs, or similar SEO tools

• Strong understanding of Google Analytics and Search Console

• WordPress experience

• Self-motivated — you don't need someone checking on you every hour



Nice to Have:

• Experience with financial services or professional services clients

• Familiarity with Australia/New Zealand markets

• Experience with Surfer SEO or similar content optimisation tools



What We Offer:

• Up to NZD$2,000.00 monthly (based on experience)

• Work from home — permanently

• Premium SEO tools provided (no using free trials!)

• Training and professional development budget

• Stable company (we've been around since 2006)

• Filipino colleagues already on the team — you won't be the only remote worker



To Apply:

Please submit:

1. Your CV/resume to 
 with subject line “SEO & Content Specialist – [YourName]”

2. A brief cover letter telling us about your SEO experience

3. Links to 2-3 content pieces you've written (blog posts, articles, etc.)

4. One example of SEO results you achieved (screenshots, ranking improvements, traffic growth)



We review applications as they come in — don't wait to apply!

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
2026



 JOB OVERVIEW

Part-Time Social Media Content Creator

Are you a creative and motivated individual with a passion for social media? We're looking for a part-time Social Media Content Creator to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing a content strategy across our key platforms, including
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, with the primary goal of increasing customer engagement, driving traffic to our website, and boosting sales.

, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube).

title: Licensed Physician (Telemedicine)
description:
About Us



We are a growing digital health company providing international telemedicine services, including remote medical consultations and issuance of medical documentation such as certificates of illness, fitness, and incapacity. Our platform serves clients across Europe and other international markets, operating fully remotely under Philippine jurisdiction.





Role Overview



We are looking for part-time licensed Filipino physicians to join our telemedicine team. You will conduct remote patient consultations, evaluate symptoms, and issue valid medical certificates and documentation as part of our cross-border telemedicine platform. All work is performed entirely online. No in-person clinic visits required.





Key Responsibilities



- Conduct remote telemedicine consultations with international patients via our digital platform

- Evaluate patient-reported symptoms and medical history to determine appropriate medical documentation

- Issue medical certificates (certificates of illness, fitness, and incapacity) in accordance with Philippine medical practice standards

- Maintain accurate and confidential patient records for each consultation

- Adhere to all applicable Philippine medical laws, telemedicine regulations, and company protocols

- Respond to consultations within agreed turnaround times (typically same-day)



Required Qualifications



Licensing and Registration (Mandatory)

- Active, valid PRC (Professional Regulation Commission) license as a Doctor of Medicine

- Registered and in good standing with the PRC under Republic Act No. 2382 (The Medical Act of 1959) and its amendments

- Must be able to provide PRC license picture and number, and board certification for verification

- Legally authorized to practice medicine in the Philippines, including issuing medical certificates as part of professional medical practice



Telemedicine Compliance

- Familiarity with or willingness to comply with DOH Administrative Order
(Guidelines on the Use of Telemedicine in Clinical Practice)

- Understanding that services are delivered under Philippine jurisdiction as cross-border telemedicine (WTO GATS Mode 1), and all medical documentation is issued under Philippine medical law



Education

- Doctor of Medicine (MD) degree from a Philippine medical school recognized by CHED (Commission on Higher Education)

- Passed the Philippine Physician Licensure Examination



Experience

- Minimum 1 year of clinical practice (hospital, clinic, or telemedicine setting)

- Prior telemedicine preferred



Work Arrangement



- Part-time, flexible hours. Work on your own schedule within agreed availability windows

- Fully remote. Work from anywhere in the Philippines, provided your PRC license remains active and valid

- Expected workload is 5-10 hours per week, scalable based on demand





Compensation



- Competitive fixed monthly salary based on your availability

- Payment processed monthly via local bank transfer in PHP currency (equivalent to USD $200-$400/month)

- Performance bonuses for consistent quality and turnaround time





How to Apply



Please submit the following:



- Updated CV or Resume highlighting your medical experience

- PRC License Number (will be verified)

- Copy of valid PRC ID or License (digital scan)

- Board certification details (if applicable)

- Brief cover letter explaining your interest in telemedicine and availability



Put PHDOC in your application title so we know you have read this job post. If it is not added, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Creative Media Specialist
description:
We need someone who can produce content, make it look sharp, and keep it moving every single day.

If you like ownership, speed, and real output, keep reading.



What You’ll Do

You will create and manage content across all SO Good social platforms.

This includes:

-Edit short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style content)

-Design graphics for posts, announcements, and campaigns

-Edit podcasts using AutoPod or Riverside

-Create thumbnails and cover graphics

-Upload and schedule content using Metricool

-Keep content organized inside Google Drive

-Execute tasks from Trello and marketing meetings

You are not guessing what to do.

You are executing at a high level



What Winning Looks Like

-Content is produced consistently

-Turnaround is fast (24–48 hours max)

-Quality is strong and improving

-Minimal revisions needed

-Communication is tight and responsive

Over time, you should be able to run directly with the Growth Marketing Coordinator without hand-holding.



Work Style

-Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central

-You are available on Google Chat during work hours

-You attend marketing meetings and weekly one-on-ones

-You respond fast and communicate clearly



Tools You’ll Use (Company Subscriptions)

-Adobe Premiere Pro (AutoPod)

-After Effects

-Photoshop

-Illustrator

-Canva

-CapCut

-Metricool

-Google Drive

-Trello

If you don’t already use most of these, this is not for you.



Creative Standard

Our content is:

-Bold

-Loud

-Attention-grabbing

-Clean and professional

If your work looks safe or boring, it won’t work here.



Expectations

-24–48 hour turnaround on assigned work

-Multiple reels per day when needed

-Graphics within 24 hours

-Podcasts edited in ~4 hours (when using AutoPod)

-Typically under 2 revisions per piece

We value speed and quality. Not one without the other.



Non-Negotiables

-Strong communication

-Fast turnaround

-Ability to follow direction

-No second job

-Organized file management

If you disappear, miss deadlines, or need constant revisions, this will not work.



How to Apply

We don’t hire off resumes alone.

You must submit:

-Portfolio (video + graphic work)

-1 short-form video edit (30–60 seconds)

-1 graphic (social post style)



If you don’t submit these, you will not be considered.

title: Fleet Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

title: Automotive Operations & Dispatch Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

in Surplus Funds or Unclaimed Funds.



The ideal candidate is outgoing, personable, and able to build rapport quickly. Strong

communication skills and excellent customer service are essential. We are looking for

being overly pushy is key, as is a talent for connecting with leads and managing

medium to high-volume calls (~70-100 per day). Key skills is for an individual who can

of contact.

title: Tech Assistant (Go High Level + Kartra)
description:
Here's the rewritten job posting for a Tech Assistant role tailored to SYWTC's stack:



TECH ASSISTANT

Full-Time | Philippines | $800/month | Must work US Time Zone hours

We aren't looking for someone to "figure things out as they go." We're looking for a Tech Operator who can build, maintain, and troubleshoot the systems that power a multi-million dollar sales training company — without hand-holding.

At Speak Your Way To Cash®, we've grown from zero to an Inc. 5000 company — and we're just getting started. Our mission is to empower experts and entrepreneurs to turn their voices into revenue. Behind every launch, every funnel, and every automated follow-up is a tech stack that has to work flawlessly.

This role is not about "trying to figure it out."

It is about building clean systems, executing fast, and keeping our revenue engine running without breaking.

You will be the technical backbone behind our Mastermind, Academy, and launch operations. If a funnel breaks, you fix it. If an automation misfires, you catch it. If a new campaign needs to be built, you build it — fast and right.

This is a performance role. Not a passive one.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

You will support the CEO and Director of Operations in all technical buildouts, maintenance, and platform management.

Daily Responsibilities



Monitor Go High Level (GHL) automations, pipelines, and workflows for errors or misfires.

Monitor Kartra funnels, pages, memberships, and automations for issues.

QA all active campaigns, sequences, and triggers to ensure they are firing correctly.

Flag broken links, failed payments, or automation gaps immediately.

Respond to tech support tickets related to platform access, login issues, or membership delivery.

Maintain clean tagging and list segmentation inside GHL and Kartra.

Update CRM pipelines and contact records as directed.



Weekly Responsibilities



Build and test new
 sequences, automations, and workflows in GHL and Kartra.

Set up landing pages, opt-in forms, and checkout pages per campaign specs.

QA new funnel builds before launch — every link, every trigger, every delivery.

Audit membership delivery in Kartra (correct modules, correct access levels).

Pull
 performance reports (open rates, click rates, deliverability).

Update and maintain the master tech SOPs document.

Set up or update Zaps/integrations connecting GHL, Kartra, and third-party tools.



Monthly Responsibilities



Conduct a full audit of automations and workflows for outdated or broken sequences.

Assist in funnel builds for new programs, products, and launches.

Clean contact lists and remove duplicates or dead leads.

Compile tech performance reports for CEO review.

Support A/B testing setup and results tracking on funnels and
s.

Maintain and update all integration connections (Zapier, webhooks, API).





CRITICAL FUNCTION: LAUNCH TECH SUPPORT

When we launch — and we launch often — everything must work:



You build and QA the funnel before the cart opens.

You monitor in real time during launch windows.

You fix issues within minutes, not hours.

You document what broke and how you fixed it.



Speed and precision are mandatory during launches. This is not negotiable.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You are fluent in Go High Level — funnels, automations, pipelines, calendars, and workflows.

You are fluent in Kartra — pages, memberships, sequences, tags, and checkouts.

You have built and QA'd full funnels from opt-in to purchase to delivery.

You catch errors before they become problems.

You work fast, document everything, and don't wait to be told twice.

You understand that a broken funnel = lost revenue.

You can work US time zone hours consistently.

You are comfortable owning tech entirely without supervision.





WHO THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR



You "know a little" about GHL or Kartra but have never fully built in them.

You need step-by-step instructions every time.

You take hours to respond to urgent tech issues.

You build things and don't QA before going live.

You are looking for a slow-paced tech support role.

You can't handle launch pressure.



This role protects revenue. It requires precision and speed.



WHAT YOU BRING



Proven, hands-on experience with Go High Level (funnels, automations, pipelines, sub-accounts).

Proven, hands-on experience with Kartra (pages, memberships, sequences, checkouts).

Experience with Zapier or Make for platform integrations.

Strong understanding of
 deliverability best practices.

Ability to build landing pages and checkout flows from a design brief or example.

Strong written English for internal documentation and SOP writing.

Experience supporting launches at an online education company, coaching company, or agency preferred.

Ability to troubleshoot independently — you Google, you test, you solve.





COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



$800/month (Full-time).

Performance-based bonuses possible based on launch execution and system uptime.

Direct impact at a high-growth Inc. 5000 company.

Visibility, ownership, and growth opportunities into a Senior Tech role.





HOW TO APPLY



Submit this application: 

 us using the information below:



: 

Subject line: Tech Assistant – Your Name

Include the following:



A written description of a funnel or automation you built inside Go High Level or Kartra — what it did, how you built it, and what the result was.

A Loom video (3–5 minutes) explaining:



Your experience with GHL and Kartra specifically

How you handle a tech emergency during a live launch

Why you are a strong fit for a fast-moving, high-performance environment







Applications without both requirements will not be reviewed.



This is not a slow company.

This is a launch company.

We build fast, sell fast, and our tech has to keep up.

Apply now. Show us what you've built, what you've broken and fixed, and how you'll make our systems sharper than ever.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Coordinator : E-commerce
description:
We're Live Breathe Futbol (LBF), a Philadelphia-based soccer lifestyle brand selling officially licensed MLS gear online. We have a Klaviyo account with flows already built and a campaign backlog ready to go — we just need someone to own execution so our founder can focus on other parts of the business.

This is a doing role, not a strategy role. We know what we want to send. We need someone who can take a brief, build it cleanly in Klaviyo, and get it out the door consistently. If you're detail-oriented, fast in Klaviyo, and take pride in clean
 builds, this is a great fit.

What you'll own:

Building and sending 3 to 5
 campaigns per week from briefs provided by the founder, maintaining the campaign calendar and making sure nothing slips, performing basic segmentation (by club, by purchase history, by engagement) to make sure the right people get the right
s, monitoring and reporting weekly on open rate, click rate, revenue attributed, and list health, flagging any flows that look stale or underperforming so the founder can d
 whether to update them, and keeping the list clean — managing suppressions, unsubscribes, and bounce rates.

What this role is not:

You won't be setting strategy or d
 what to send. The founder owns that. You will occasionally be asked to write subject lines and short body copy, so strong written English matters, but this is primarily a build-and-execute role.

What we need from you:

You must be comfortable working independently, hitting deadlines without reminders, and communicating clearly when something is blocked or unclear. Our brand voice is confident, soccer-native, and direct — not corporate, not salesy. You should be able to match that tone in the copy you do write.

Please include in your application: confirmation that you have hands-on Klaviyo experience, an example of an
 campaign or flow you built (screenshot or Loom walkthrough preferred), your availability and time zone overlap with US Eastern, and your monthly rate.



Skills requirements:

Must have: hands-on Klaviyo experience (building, scheduling, and sending campaigns), strong written English, ability to write clean short-form copy, basic understanding of
 segmentation, and experience working independently in a remote role.

Nice to have: experience with a DTC or e-commerce brand, familiarity with Shopify and how it syncs with Klaviyo, and an interest in soccer or sports culture (genuinely useful for writing copy that doesn't sound generic).



Wage/salary: $400–$600 USD/month.

title: LinkedIn Sales Navigator Specialist (Lead Generation & Targeting Expert)
description:
Overview

We are looking for a specialist who knows how to fully use LinkedIn Sales Navigator to build targeted pipelines and generate qualified opportunities.



This role is strictly focused on strategy, targeting, and lead generation using Sales Navigator.



This is NOT a content posting or basic VA role.



Your Role



You will take full control of the Sales Navigator system and use it to:



Identify high-value prospects

Build structured lead lists

Track and manage prospect activity

Support outbound strategy with precision targeting



You will NOT be responsible for posting content or managing social media accounts.



Key Responsibilities



1. Advanced Lead Targeting



Use Sales Navigator filters to build highly specific prospect lists

Segment audiences (e.g., property managers, engineers, decision-makers)

Continuously refine targeting based on results



2. Pipeline Building



Save and organize leads and accounts

Identify buying signals (job changes, activity, company growth, etc.)

Maintain a clean and structured lead pipeline



3. Strategy Execution



Recommend targeting strategies and improvements

Support outreach direction (who to target, when, and why)

Work independently to optimize results



4. Reporting & Insights



Track weekly performance (lead quality, acceptance rates, responses)

Identify patterns and suggest improvements

Provide clear, actionable reports



Important Clarification



You will focus ONLY on Sales Navigator and lead strategy

You will NOT manage posting or content creation

You will work independently within your scope



Requirements (Must-Have)



Strong, proven experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Ability to build targeted B2B lead lists with precision

Understanding of how to identify decision-makers and buying signals

Experience supporting outbound or lead generation strategies

Strong attention to detail and organization



Nice to Have



Experience in real estate, construction, or B2B services

Familiarity with CRM systems (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, etc.)

Understanding of LinkedIn outreach workflows



How to Apply



Please include:



A brief explanation of how you use Sales Navigator to build lead lists

Example of a targeting system you’ve used (filters, segmentation, etc.)

Screenshot or description of a lead list you’ve built

Your expected monthly salary

title: LEAD GENERATION SPECIALIST — AI SCRAPING TOOLS — FULL TIME REMOTE $400 to $600 USD per month
description:
Who We Are

The Sentinel Compliance Firm is a fast growing US compliance services company operating two active businesses simultaneously. We use an advanced AI-powered lead generation stack to build verified contact lists daily. We need a skilled full time lead generation specialist who knows how to work with AI scraping tools and automation platforms and can deliver clean verified data every single day without hand holding.



This Role Is Not For Everyone

This is a full time data role. You will operate AI scraping agents and automation tools every single day across two separate businesses with different target audiences. If you have never used tools like Clay, Outscraper, Apollo, Phantombuster, or Apify — this is not the right fit. We need someone who already knows these tools or learns them extremely fast and delivers results from Day 1.

We have zero tolerance for bad data. Our sales team makes outbound calls every day. Every dead number they dial and every bounced
 that goes out costs us real money. Your job is to make sure that never happens.



What You Will Do

Business 1 — Individual Property Owner Leads



Pull 400 to 600 verified individual property owner contacts per day

Sources include county assessor databases, Craigslist rental listings,
 Marketplace, Google Maps, Apollo, and Outscraper

Every contact must be a real individual person — not a company or property management firm

Every phone number verified active before it reaches the sales team

Every
 verified deliverable before it enters any sequence



Business 2 — Business Owner Reputation Leads



Pull 200 to 300 verified business decision maker contacts per day

Target businesses with Google ratings below 4.0 stars across multiple industries

Industries include medical practices, restaurants, contractors, attorneys, medical spas, auto repair shops, and financial advisors

Research pre-outreach intelligence on every contact — current Google rating, negative review count in last 90 days, most common complaint theme, whether owner has responded to reviews

Find owner
s directly from company domains using domain search tools



Every Day



Operate and monitor all AI scraping agents in the stack

Review and quality control all automated output daily

Remove dead numbers, bad
s, and non-qualifying contacts before they reach anyone

Run all lists through phone verification and
 verification tools

Format all output correctly in Google Sheets — correct columns, no duplicates, no incomplete records

Submit a detailed daily report to the Office Manager by end of every shift

Conduct weekly quality review — random sample check of 20 contacts per business every Friday





Our Tool Stack — You Must Know or Learn These Fast

These are the tools you will operate every day. List which ones you have used in your application.



Clay — automated lead enrichment and workflow automation

Outscraper — Google Maps scraping at scale

Apollo — B2B contact database and prospecting

Phantombuster — LinkedIn and social media scraping automation

Apify — web scraping platform for Google Maps, Yelp, Craigslist, BBB

Browse AI — custom website scraping for public records and county databases


 — domain
 finding for business decision makers


 —
 verification and domain search

Numverify — phone number verification

Google Sheets — data formatting and output management

Instantly.ai — understanding of how verified lists feed into cold
 sequences



You Will Stand Out If You Also Have:



Experience building custom scraping workflows in Clay from scratch

Experience with Apify Actors — building or running custom scrapers

Experience pulling from public records — county assessor databases, court filings, BBB

Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for B2B prospecting

Any proprietary scraping tools or apps you have built yourself





Requirements — All Non Negotiable



Minimum 2 years professional experience in lead generation or data research

Hands-on experience with at least 3 tools from our stack listed above

Specify exactly which tools you have used and how in your application

Full time only — 8 hours per day Monday through Friday — no exceptions

No part time arrangements will be considered at any point

Reliable internet — minimum 20 Mbps — include a speed test screenshot in your application

Available to start immediately — this week

Strong attention to detail — data quality is the entire job

Self directed — you identify problems and fix them without being told





What You Earn



$400 to $600 USD per month based on experience and output quality

Paid twice monthly via Wise

Long term position — we are scaling to 8 brands across 30 US states

Performance bonus available for consistently exceeding daily targets

Room to grow as the operation scales — this is the ground floor of something big





How to Apply

 
 with subject line:

Scraper Application — [Your Name]

Your application must include all five of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



List every tool from our stack above that you have personally used — be specific about how you used each one and what results you achieved

Your highest daily verified contact output you have personally achieved — give us a real number not a range

One specific example of a scraping workflow you built or operated — what the target was, which tools you used, what the verified output count was, and how you verified the data

Your resume or complete work history

One sentence answering this question: What does it mean to be the Armor behind a sales team?



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not include the word Armor in their answer to question 5 will be automatically rejected without review. This is non-negotiable.

We are hiring immediately. Qualified candidates will be contacted within 24 hours. We will begin scheduling interviews today.

title: Remote Operations & Client Success Representative (Virtual Assistant)
description:
About Us



Molly Maid of Central Westchester is a growing cleaning referral agency serving Westchester County, NY and surrounding areas. We connect clients with vetted, professional independent cleaners for residential and commercial spaces. We operate 7 days a week and pride ourselves on quality, trust, and convenience.



We're a lean, remote team — and we need someone sharp, reliable, and self-driven to help us operate and grow.



The Role

This is not a typical VA position. We're looking for someone who can eventually run day-to-day operations independently — think area manager in a remote setting. You'll handle everything from answering client inquiries to coordinating cleaners to closing new bookings. If you're a go-getter who takes ownership and communicates exceptionally well, keep reading.



Your Responsibilities

• Answer inbound calls, texts, and
s from clients promptly and professionally (U.S.-based clientele)

• Handle booking, scheduling, and calendar management

• Conduct outbound follow-ups to leads and past clients

• Close new bookings using our pricing and promotions

• Recruit, vet, and onboard independent cleaning professionals

• Manage client satisfaction follow-ups; resolve issues and escalations

• Post and engage on social media 
, Instagram, Google)

• Maintain records in our CRM/tracking tools

• Identify and flag operational issues to the owner

• Take initiative to improve processes — we want someone who brings ideas, not just tasks

 

You Are a Great Fit If You:

• Have excellent spoken and written English — you'll be communicating directly with U.S. clients by phone, text, and

• Are highly organized and can manage multiple priorities without hand-holding

• Have experience in customer service, sales, or operations (service industry a plus)

• Are proactive — you follow up, flag problems early, and don't wait to be told

• Are comfortable working U.S. Eastern Time hours (full or partial overlap required)

• Have a reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

• Are looking for a long-term position with growth opportunity

 

Bonus Points For:

• Experience with a U.S.-based service business (cleaning, home services, real estate, etc.)

• Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, Jobber, or similar CRMs

• Social media content creation experience

 

What We Offer

• Competitive bi-weekly Pay

• Performance commissions 

• Stable, long-term position with a growing company

• Performance-based raises

• Clear growth path — we develop from within

• Supportive owner who provides systems, training, and tools



**How to apply**



Read carefully — applications that don't follow these steps will not be reviewed.

1. Send your resume 

2. In the subject line or first line of your message, write: "I read the full post – MM Application"

3. Include a 2–3 sentence answer to this question: "Describe a time you handled a difficult customer or solved a problem without being told what to do."

4. Include your available hours in U.S. Eastern Time

5. Record a 60–90 second voice or video message answering this question: "Tell us who you are, why you're a great fit for this role, and how you would handle a client who calls upset because their cleaner didn't show up." Upload it to Google Drive, Loom, or Dropbox and include the link in your application.



Applications without all 5 items — including the recording link — will not be reviewed.

title: Insurance Authorization Specialist – PT/OT/ST Medical Billing
description:
We are a U.S.-based medical billing company specializing in physical therapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy. We are hiring a full-time Prior Authorization Specialist to handle insurance authorizations for therapy services.



We are looking for someone with prior experience working on U.S. insurance authorizations, strong attention to detail, and the ability to follow up consistently. Experience with Prompt EMR is preferred.



Type of employment

Full Time 

Work Schedule: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM Eastern Time (US EST/EDT)



Job description

As our Prior Authorization Specialist, you will be responsible for submitting, tracking, and managing prior authorizations for PT, OT, and ST services. You will help ensure patients have approved visits in place and that authorizations are documented accurately and followed up on promptly.



Responsibilities:



Submit prior authorization requests for therapy services

Track pending authorizations and follow up with insurance companies

Document approved visits, date ranges, and authorization details accurately

Monitor expiring authorizations and help prevent treatment delays

Follow up on missing information or payer requirements

Communicate updates clearly with internal staff

Maintain organized and accurate records in the system



Requirements:



Experience handling U.S. insurance prior authorizations

Strong English communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Organized and dependable with strong follow-through

Able to work independently and manage repetitive follow-up tasks

Reliable internet connection and computer

Experience with Prompt EMR preferred



Nice to have:



Experience with physical therapy, occupational therapy, or speech therapy

Familiarity with U.S. therapy authorization workflows

Medical billing or revenue cycle experience

title: Instagram + Youtube Lead Gen Specialist (Funnel Audits)
description:
Position: Part
 Full
 Contract/Gig (Remote)

Compensation: $X per qualified prospect OR hourly rate + commision

Hours: Flexible

Start Date: Immediate



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a sharp, detail-oriented prospecting specialist to help us find Instagram creators and businesses with visible funnel leaks. You'll be using systematic methods to identify prospects who have good content/audience but poor conversion - perfect candidates for our funnel optimization services.



This is NOT a generic lead generation role. You'll be conducting quick Instagram funnel audits (2-5 minutes per prospect) to identify specific conversion problems that we can help fix.



YOUR MISSION

Find high-quality Instagram prospects who:

Have clear funnel leaks visible within 5 minutes of inspection

Are actively growing but struggling to convert their audience into revenue

Would benefit from personalized Loom video audits and funnel optimization



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Daily/Weekly Tasks:

Competitor Audience Mining (40% of time)

Identify 5-10 competitors in our niche (coaches, creators, info product businesses)

Extract their most engaged followers (people who regularly comment/like)

Screen for prospects with 5,000-75,000 followers and >3% engagement

Hashtag & Content Mining (30% of time)

Monitor problem-focused hashtags: #strugglingwithfunnels, #conversionproblems, #instagramfunnel

Find creators sharing funnel/content struggles



Identify people asking for help with Instagram conversion

Quick Funnel Audits (30% of time)

Conduct 2-5 minute Instagram funnel assessments using our checklist

Score prospects 1-10 based on visible conversion leaks

Document specific issues found (bio clarity, content alignment, link flow, etc.)



Deliverables Each Week:

Starting with 15-25 fully qualified prospects with documented funnel audits

Spreadsheet/CRM entries for each prospect including:

Instagram handle

Funnel audit score (1-10)

Top 3 visible funnel issues

Recommended Loom outreach angle

Why they're a good fit for our services

Brief summary report of findings and patterns observed



QUALIFICATIONS WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Must Have:

Experience with Instagram (personal or professional use)

Strong attention to detail and observational skills

Basic understanding of sales funnels/marketing concepts

Ability to work independently and meet weekly targets

Good written communication skills for documentation



Nice to Have:

Experience with prospecting or lead generation

Familiarity with Instagram analytics/tools

Background in marketing, sales, or customer research

Experience with spreadsheets/CRM systems



Personality Traits:

Observant: Can spot patterns and details others miss

Systematic: Follows processes and checklists consistently

Curious: Enjoys understanding why things work/don't work

Efficient: Gets quality work done without wasting time



TRAINING & SUPPORT

We'll provide:

Complete prospecting checklist with what to look for

Funnel audit scoring system (1-10 scale)

Template for documenting findings

Weekly check-ins for questions and feedback

Examples of ideal prospects vs. ones to avoid



COMPENSATION OPTIONS

Option A: Per Qualified Prospect

Option B: Hourly Rate



APPLICATION PROCESS



Step 1: Initial Application

Submit your application including:

Brief introduction about yourself

Why you're interested in this role

Any relevant experience with Instagram/prospecting/marketing/sales

Your preferred compensation option



Step 2: Skills Assessment

We'll send a simple test:

Review 3 sample Instagram profiles

Conduct quick funnel audits using our checklist

Document your findings (template provided)

This should take 30-45 minutes



Step 3: Interview

30-minute video call to discuss:

Your approach to finding prospects

Questions about the role

Availability and scheduling

Compensation details



WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE

This isn't about spamming or cold calling. You're helping us find businesses that genuinely need our help and would benefit from our services. You're the first step in creating value for them through personalized funnel audits. Eventually your role will grow into working directly with these famous creators as you learn more.



ABOUT OUR COMPANY

We help creators and businesses doing $30,
,000 per month capture $50-150k in hidden revenue within 30 days without additional ad spend. We specialize in funnel optimization, webinar funnels, and Instagram conversion systems.



READY TO APPLY?

If you're detail-oriented, enjoy solving puzzles, and want to help businesses grow while earning competitive compensation, we'd love to hear from you.



To apply, please respond with:

Your name and contact information

Why you think you'd be good at this role

Your preferred compensation option

Any questions you have about the position

We're looking to fill this position quickly, so don't hesitate to reach out!



APPENDIX: 

What Makes a "Qualified Prospect"

Green Lights (Ideal Prospects):

5,000-75,000 Instagram followers

Engagement rate >3%

Clear niche/offer (coaching, courses, services, products)

Regular content posting (3+ times per week) (2 is fine if high comments)

Visible funnel structure/ They’re clearly selling something (even if broken)

Some social proof/testimonials

Good content but poor conversion signals



Red Flags (Avoid These):

title: Sr. Web Developer-PH
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE: 



THIS IS A PART-TIME TO FULLTIME ROLE (will start as part-time for 60-90 days then transition to fulltime)!



We’re looking for a Senior Web Developer to join our dev team. You thrive building beautiful, high-performing websites and digital experiences for top-tier brands. You can lead multiple projects, mentor other developers, and communicate clearly with clients while still getting deep in the code when needed.



RESPONSIBILITIES: 



In this role, you'll get to...



lead development of WordPress using ACF, custom blocks, Twig templating, custom post types, and block-based themes, with performance, accessibility, SEO, and high-quality execution built in

build projects with headless CMS platforms like Contentful, Storyblok, or WordPress as a headless backend, leveraging REST API or GraphQL, and using frontend frameworks like Next.js or Nuxt.js with headless architectures

create pixel-perfect, fully functioning frontends using Tailwind CSS, GSAP , and other modern frontend technologies, ensuring responsive, interactive, and high-performance experiences

own CI/CD workflows and deploy sites across Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Kinsta, and WP Engine, including edge/CDN optimizations

serve as a primary technical point of contact for internal teams (PM, design, SEO) and clients, translating complex ideas into clear recommendations

mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership across multiple projects

collaborate using Figma, Slack, Teamwork, and Pastel to bring designs to life efficiently

perform other ad hoc duties related to the role as assigned

REQUIREMENTS: 



On day one, we'll expect you to...



have 7+ years of web development experience, ideally in agency environments

have strong full-stack expertise, comfortable with both frontend and backend

have deep knowledge of modern WordPress, headless CMS, Next.js or Nuxt.js, Tailwind, GSAP, CI/CD, deployments, and integrations

have proven experience leading multiple projects and teams, with excellent client-facing communication

have hands-on experience with API integrations, marketing automation, AI tools, eCommerce, SEO, security, and DevOps

be detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of translating technical decisions into actionable solutions

be open to part-time to fulltime opportunity

have a fully functional and up-to-date computer with which to perform duties

be willing to install next-generation endpoint protection on the computer

be willing to work in US Pacific time zone (8:00am-5:00pm PST) corresponding to 12:00am -9:00am PH time

be a current resident of the Philippines and legally able to perform work from there

What separates the best from the rest:



advanced GSAP/ animations experience

mentorship, client management, and cross-team collaboration experience

experience optimizing performance, accessibility, SEO, security, and DevOps at scale

Edge and CDN strategy experience for modern web projects

NOTES:



Benefits await full-time contractors. 

This is a remote (work from home) position.



TO APPLY: ** DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION HERE IN INDEED** Follow the instructions below:



1. COPY & PASTE this link to your browser: 

2. Fill out the form and submit your resume to our system.



We will reach out to you via
 using our system!

Thank you!

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Adobe Premiere Pro) – High Volume Reels Team
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based company looking to hire 2–3 full-time video editors immediately to join our content team.



You will be working directly with our Head of Marketing to produce high-quality, engaging short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) for our brand.



We are NOT looking for beginners.

If you're fast, creative, and take pride in your work — this is a long-term opportunity.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Follow brand style and improve content performance

Experience editing:

TikToks

YouTube Shorts

Reliable internet + strong computer

Strong work ethic — we move fast



? BONUS (PREFERRED BUT NOT REQUIRED)

Experience with After Effects

PAY

Long-term consistent work

SCHEDULE

HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT – FILTER STEP)**



To be considered, you MUST do the following:

We will give you sample footage to edit we will need a minimum of one sample video (this is required before hiring)



 If you do not follow these steps, your application will NOT be reviewed.



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Fast

Reliable

Detail-oriented

Takes ownership

We are building a serious content machine — if you can keep up, you will grow with us.



EXTRA

title: Performance Creative Ad Editor
description:
About the role

We're looking for a skilled and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. This is a high-output, fast-paced role built for someone who lives and breathes video content — specifically for paid advertising. You'll be responsible for transforming raw video footage into high-converting ad creatives across multiple platforms, at volume.



This isn't a traditional video editing role. You'll need to think like a media buyer, edit like a creative director, and move fast. If you understand why one hook outperforms another, know when to cut for attention and how to use b-roll to reinforce a message — this role was made for you.



What you'll be doing

- Edit 30–40+ short-form and long-form video ad creatives per week, maintaining consistent quality across all outputs.

- Take a single piece of raw video content and repurpose it into 10 distinct ad creatives with varied hooks, pacing, formats, and messaging angles

- Craft compelling 3-second hooks that stop the scroll and capture immediate attention across
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

- Source, select, and integrate relevant b-roll footage to strengthen storytelling, reinforce key messages, and improve viewer retention

- Add and style on-screen captions, text overlays, and motion graphics to improve accessibility and engagement

- Edit to platform-specific formats and aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 16:9) ensuring each creative is optimised for its intended placement

- Collaborate with the creative and media buying teams to iterate on top-performing concepts and evolve underperforming creatives

- Organise and manage video assets, project files, and deliverables through our content management system

Stay up to date with the latest ad creative trends, viral hooks, and platform best practices to keep our content fresh and competitive

- What we're looking for

- Proven experience editing performance-focused video ads (portfolio or examples required)

- Deep understanding of what makes a hook work within the first 3 seconds

- Ability to work at high volume without compromising quality or consistency

- Strong eye for b-roll selection — knowing exactly when and how to use it

- Proficient in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve

- Experience editing for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube ad placements

- Highly organised with strong time management skills

- Ability to take creative briefs and execute with minimal back-and-forth



Bonus skills

- Experience working within a media buying or performance marketing team

- Basic motion graphics or After Effects knowledge

- Understanding of direct response copywriting principles

- Familiarity with ad creative testing frameworks (A/B, multivariate)

- Experience with CapCut or similar mobile-first editing tools

- Background in UGC or creator content editing



You'll thrive in this role if you...

- Obsess over why some videos stop the scroll and others don't

- Can spot a winning hook angle from raw footage before a single cut is made

- Take pride in the quality of your work even when the timeline is tight

- Are self-managed, proactive, and don't need to be micromanaged to hit your output targets

- Get genuinely excited watching your edits produce results in ad accounts



How to apply

Please send through your portfolio or a selection of 3–5 video ad examples you've edited, along with a brief note on your editing background and when you're available to start. Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Media Buyer (Agency Experience Required)
description:
We aren’t looking for a “media buyer.” We’re looking for a growth architect. Someone who eats, breathes, and sleeps paid media. Someone who can see the entire chessboard of ads, funnels, and creative — and move the right piece at the right time to scale campaigns from six figures a month to multi-millions a month.



At Speak Your Way To Cash®, we’ve grown from zero to an Inc. 5000 company — and we’re just getting started. Our mission is to empower experts and entrepreneurs to turn their voices into revenue. Now, we’re looking for the person who will fuel that mission with the precision of a scientist and the heart of a strategist.



What You’ll Do:



Lead media growth across all platforms: Meta (FB/IG), YouTube, TikTok, Google suite, LinkedIn, and whatever platform drives ROI.



Architect and manage multiple campaigns simultaneously, including:



Awareness campaigns that dominate impressions.



Conversion campaigns that hit 1.5+ ROAS on the front end and 3+ ROAS on the back end.



Write powerful creative briefs: You’ll translate strategy into specific hooks, angles, and ad formats that designers, editors, and content producers can execute on.



Set up, manage, and scale campaigns: from ad copy to targeting, from $1K tests to $1M scale.



Run thousands of creative tests to find the winning hook, iterate it into new variations, and push campaigns until they break records.



Analyze the data like a pro — not just looking at CTR and CPC, but uncovering the story behind the numbers and making fast, decisive adjustments.



Own funnel alignment: If the funnel is the bottleneck, you’ll spot it, flag it, and help the team fix it so growth doesn’t stall.



Forecast, report, and scale: You’ll know where our ad dollars should go, what’s driving growth, and where we double down.



Who This Role Is For



- A growth-driven strategist who thrives in high-stakes, high-reward environments.

- Someone who has scaled campaigns into the multi-millions per month — and is hungry to do it again.

- A creative thinker who can spot a winning hook, brief it out, and multiply it into hundreds of testable variations.

- Someone who sees analytics not as “reports” but as a roadmap to scale.

- A leader who can direct designers, video editors, and producers with clarity and confidence.

- Someone who wants to play on a team where their work directly drives seven- and eight-figure outcomes.

- A competitor at heart who isn’t satisfied with average ROAS — you push until the campaigns break records.



Who This Role Isn’t For:



- Someone who just wants to “manage ads” and clock out at 5.

- Someone who’s only run $10K–$50K campaigns and thinks that’s “big.”

- Someone who needs their hand held through creative strategy instead of leading it.

- Someone who looks at the numbers but can’t translate them into action.

- Someone who avoids accountability or blames “the algorithm” when ads don’t convert.



What You Bring



Proven track record: You’ve scaled paid campaigns to multi-millions per month in spend and returns.



Creative killer instinct: You know what hook will stop a scroll, what headline will convert, and how to turn an ad into a money-making machine.



Data-driven decisiveness: You don’t just “look at analytics,” you live inside them — pulling insights that others miss.



Leadership DNA: You can direct designers, video editors, and producers to bring your vision to life — fast.



Strategic vision + tactical chops: You can architect the strategy and then roll up your sleeves to launch, test, and optimize campaigns yourself.



Funnel awareness: You know an ad can’t save a broken funnel — and you’ll partner with the team to ensure nothing stands in the way of scale.



Relentless drive: You literally eat, breathe, and sleep media buying. You’re obsessed with finding the next big lever for growth.



Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary: Were willing to pay what it takes to get the best; base depending on experience.



Potential bonuses for the right candidate.



Work directly with a fast-growing Inc. 5000 company impacting experts worldwide.



A seat at the table where your ideas directly shape the future of our brand.



If you’ve been waiting for the chance to run media like you would for a Fortune 500 empire — this is it. At Speak Your Way To Cash®, we don’t play small. We’re scaling fast, we’re scaling smart, and we need the best in the game to lead our paid media growth

.

Apply now. Show us how you’ve scaled, what you’ve built, and how you’ll take this brand to the next level.



To apply, click here:

title: Collections Manager
description:
WFH

Graveyard Shift

1 year contract



Position Overview



Job Description

The Collections Manager is responsible for overseeing the accounts receivable collections process to ensure timely payment of invoices and maintain healthy cash flow. This role manages the collections team, monitors aging reports, resolves payment issues with clients, and works closely with accounting, billing, and operations teams to reduce outstanding receivables.



The Collections Manager will implement structured follow-up procedures, monitor collection performance metrics, and ensure accurate documentation of all collection activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Accounts Receivable & Collections Management

- Manage the full accounts receivable collections process for all client accounts.

-Monitor AR aging reports and identify overdue balances.

- Ensure consistent follow-up on past due invoices through
, phone calls, and formal notices.

- Prioritize high-value and high-risk accounts to reduce outstanding balances.

-  Work with clients to resolve billing disputes and payment issues.

- Negotiate payment plans when necessary.



Team Leadership

- Manage and supervise the collections team.

- Assign accounts and collection priorities.

- Train tea
mbers on collection procedures and systems.

- Monitor team performance and ensure collection targets are met.



Reporting & Analysis

- Produce weekly and monthly collections reports.

- Track KPIs such as:

          Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

          Collection rate

          Aging trends

         Top delinquent accounts

- Present reports and updates to senior management.



Cross-Department Coordination

- Work closely with:

       Finance & Accounting

      Billing

      Sales

     Operations



- Ensure invoices are accurate and disputes are resolved quickly.

- Coordinate with accounting to apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.



Process Improvement

- Develop and implement improved collections procedures.

- Identify inefficiencies in billing or invoicing processes that delay payments.

- Implement automation and reporting tools where appropriate.



Compliance & Documentation

- Ensure all collection activity is properly documented.

- Maintain accurate client communication records.

- Ensure collection practices comply with company policies and applicable laws.



Qualifications

Experience

- 5+ years of experience in accounts receivable or collections.

- 2+ years managing a collections team preferred.

- Experience with large commercial accounts and high invoice volumes.



Technical Skills

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software.

- Strong knowledge of AR aging and collections strategies.

- Proficiency with Excel and financial reporting tools.



Soft Skills

- Strong negotiation and communication skills.

- High attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities.

- Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- The Collections Manager will be evaluated based on:

- Reduction in Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

- Monthly collections percentage

- Reduction of 90+ day receivables

- Resolution time for billing disputes

- Accuracy of AR reporting

- Team productivity and performance
