title: Real Estate Video Editor — Final Cut Pro | Long-Term Role
description:
Company: Mythology Marketing & Production

Hours: Full-Time

Rate: Negotiable based on experience



Editing style we're looking for:


/reel/DR0vyccDug5/?igsh=MWthdmN2d2F3bTlvcA==

Watch this video before applying. This is the look, feel, and energy we are going for. If you can match or exceed this quality, we want to hear from you.



About Us

Mythology Marketing & Production is a full-service digital marketing agency based in New York. We produce high-performance social media video content for contractors, local service companies, and real estate agents. Our content is fast-paced, cinematic, and built to stop the scroll — think punchy hooks, clean motion graphics, and dynamic editing that makes trades and service companies look like premium brands.



We're growing fast and need a skilled video editor who wants to grow with us — not someone building their own freelance client list on the side. This is a dedicated contractor role. We're looking for someone who's all in on being part of a team, takes ownership of their work, and wants a long-term home with an agency that's scaling.



What You'll Be Editing

You'll be working on short-form vertical video content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) for our clients. Videos range from 30 to 90 seconds. Content includes:



Contractor and home service brand videos

Personal brand / talking head content for real estate agents

Property showcase videos (listings, walkthroughs, neighborhood tours)

Real estate agent branding and authority content

Job transformation (before/after) videos

Sales and trust-building content for field reps



Requirements:



• Software



Final Cut Pro — this is non-negotiable. All editing is done in FCP. Do not apply if you use Premiere, DaVinci, or CapCut exclusively.



• Motion Graphics & VFX



Motion VFX plugin experience is required. You must know how to install, use, and customize Motion VFX templates within Final Cut Pro.

Ability to apply and modify motion graphics overlays, transitions, and title sequences from Motion VFX libraries.



• Transitions & Sound Design



Ryan Nangle transitions — you must have experience using Ryan Nangle's FCP transition packs or be familiar with his style of whip cuts, glitch transitions, and kinetic edits.

SounDesign — experience using SounDesign's sound effects library is required. Every cut, transition, and motion graphic should have intentional sound design behind it. Whooshes, impacts, risers, and UI sounds must be used purposefully to elevate the edit — not slapped on randomly.

Smooth, intentional transitions that match music beats and energy shifts.



• Captions / Subtitles



Must be able to produce clean, styled captions synced to speech.

Experience with caption styles that are on-brand for social media (bold, mobile-readable, punchy word-by-word or line-by-line reveals).

Bonus: Familiarity with auto-caption plugins or workflows within FCP.



• General Editing Skills



Strong sense of pacing and rhythm — you cut to the music, not just the words.

Experience editing branding videos, on-site construction content, or real estate content

Ability to work with multi-angle footage and choose the best angles naturally.

Color grading to a clean, polished look (not flat, not over-processed).

Audio cleanup: background noise reduction, volume leveling, music mixing under voiceover.

Speed ramps and slow-motion effects for cinematic 
nts.

Ability to follow a shot list / scene table and translate it into a finished edit without heavy hand-holding.



* Workflow & Communication



Able to receive footage and direction via 
 (we use 
 for all review and feedback).

Reliable turnaround times — typically 24–48 hours per video depending on length and complexity.

Responsive on messaging (we use WhatsApp or Slack for communication).

Comfortable with revision rounds and direct feedback without ego.





Bonus (Not Required, But Will Get You Noticed)



Experience editing for trades/contractor/home service brands

Experience editing real estate content — property walkthroughs, agent branding, listing videos

Familiarity with social media content strategy and why certain edits perform better

Ability to create simple lower thirds or text animations inside Motion

Experience editing content for U.S.-based clients with fast-paced marketing needs





How to Apply

Send the following to be considered:



Portfolio link — your best 3–5 short-form video edits. Instagram, YouTube, Google Drive, or 
 link is fine.

Confirmation that you use Final Cut Pro and have access to Motion VFX and Ryan Nangle transition packs.

Your rate — tell us your preferred hourly rate.

Your availability — confirm you are available full-time and let us know your typical working hours.

One sentence about why the reference video linked above works (shows us you actually watched it and understand editing intent).



We are not looking for the cheapest option, and we are not looking for someone who is juggling 10 other clients or trying to grow their own freelance business. We want a dedicated tea
mber who is focused, communicates well, and wants to be part of something that is growing. If that's you, we'd love to see your work.



Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Remote Medical Administrative Biller
description:
About Us

We are a US-based healthcare workforce staffing company with over 15 years of industry experience. We recruit, vet, and place qualified remote administrative professionals to support medical practices across the United States. As a hired professional through our company, you will be assigned to work directly within a US-based medical practice, providing essential billing and administrative support as a remote tea
mber. We serve as the facilitating employer and handle all workforce coordination on behalf of the practice.



Position Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Remote Medical Administrative Biller to support US-based healthcare practices. In this role, you will assist with the day-to-day billing and administrative operations of the assigned medical practice. This is a long-term, stable remote position for candidates with a strong background in medical billing and a solid understanding of US health insurance systems.



Key Responsibilities



Submit and follow up on medical claims to insurance companies (Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial payers)

Post payments and adjustments to patient accounts

Work on denials and appeals, identifying and resolving billing errors

Verify patient insurance coverage and eligibility prior to appointments

Assist with prior authorization submissions and tracking

Perform data entry and maintain accurate patient billing records

Communicate with the US-based practice team regarding billing issues, claim statuses, and patient account inquiries

Prepare basic billing reports and documentation as requested

Support general administrative back-office tasks as needed





Requirements



Minimum 1–2 years of experience in US medical billing or a related healthcare administrative role

Familiarity with US insurance payers, CPT/ICD-10 coding basics, and EOB/ERA interpretation

Experience with medical billing software (e.g., Nextech, ModMed or similar)

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional work environment

Ability to work during US business hours (see below)

High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks independently





Hours of Operation

This position operates on US business hours. Depending on the assigned practice's time zone, standard working hours will fall within the following windows listed. The table below shows what those hours look like in Philippine Standard Time (PST).

 Please be prepared to work overnight hours. Applicants who are comfortable with a night shift schedule are encouraged to apply.



Eastern Time (ET): 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM US / 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PH

Central Time (CT): 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM US / 8:00 PM - 5:00 AM PH

Mountain Time (MT): 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM US / 7:00 PM - 4:00 AM PH

Pacific Time (PT): 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM US / 6:00 PM - 3:00 AM PH



Exact shift times will be confirmed upon placement with the assigned medical practice. Full-time positions are approximately 40 hours per week; part-time options may also be available.



Compensation & Work Arrangement



Rate: $5.00 USD per hour

Hours are tracked via a digital timekeeping system

Timesheets are submitted weekly for client approval

Payment is processed via ACH on a weekly or bi-weekly basis

This is a fully remote position- work from home

Employee responsible for currency exchange rate fee.





Technical / Equipment Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps recommended)

A quiet, professional home work environment

Desktop or laptop computer (Windows 10/11 or Mac OS - no Chromebooks)

Minimum 8GB RAM and a modern processor capable of running billing software

At least one monitor (dual monitor setup preferred for multitasking)

Webcam for virtual tea
etings and check-ins

Headset/ headphones or built-in microphone for clear audio communication

Comfortable using digital timekeeping systems

Backup power source or UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) recommended in case of outages





Why Work With Us?



Consistent, long-term placements with established US medical practices

Stable remote work with clear expectations and ongoing support

Performance follow-up and regular check-ins from our team

Be part of a growing workforce solutions company making a real impact in US healthcare

title: Psychiatric Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Practice

Solo outpatient psychiatric practice based in Nevada providing telehealth services. High-volume practice focused on efficient, high-quality, evidence-based care. Seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Medical Assistant to support clinical documentation and administrative workflows.



Position Overview

This role is a combination of medical scribing, documentation quality assurance, and patient coordination. The ideal candidate is highly organized, understands psychiatric documentation requirements, and can ensure notes are complete, compliant, and audit-ready for insurance reimbursement.



Key Responsibilities

Clinical Documentation & Scribing

Review and finalize AI-generated psychiatric notes

Ensure all documentation is complete, accurate, and audit-proof

Verify inclusion of required elements for insurance compliance (e.g., DSM-5 justification, medical necessity, risk assessments, etc.)

Format and input notes into the EHR (Osmind)

Flag missing or unclear information for provider review

Patient Communication & Coordination

Respond to patient portal messages (Osmind) in a timely and professional manner

Call patients to:

Schedule new intake appointments

Coordinate follow-ups

Assist with onboarding (forms, consents, setup)

Administrative Support

Assist with scheduling and calendar management

Help maintain workflow efficiency for a high-volume practice (50–80 patients/week)

Collaborate with provider and biller to support clean claims and reimbursement



Preferred Qualifications

Experience as a medical scribe or virtual medical assistant (psychiatry strongly preferred)

Strong understanding of insurance documentation requirements and audit standards

Familiarity with:

Psychiatric documentation (SOAP notes, DSM-5 criteria)

CPT coding basics (especially 99214, 90792, 90833)

Experience with EHR systems (Osmind preferred but not required)

Excellent written communication skills

High attention to detail and ability to catch missing elements

Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment



Nice to Have

Billing or coding knowledge (not required, but highly valued)

Experience working with telehealth practices

Familiarity with AI scribing tools



Workload Expectations

Practice volume: ~50–80 patients per week

Visit types:

15-minute follow-ups

60-minute intake evaluations

Goal: Reduce provider administrative burden and improve efficiency

Compensation

Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Opportunity for increased hours and long-term role growth



Why This Role Matters

This role will directly support the ability to:

Improve documentation quality and compliance

Reduce administrative burden

Expand access to mental health care by allowing the provider to see more patients



How to Apply

Please include:

Your relevant experience (especially in psychiatry or medical scribing)

Any experience with insurance documentation or billing

Your availability (hours per week)



If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. I look forward to finding the right person to grow with the practice.

— Jaclyn Prell, PMHNP-BC

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $900–1,100 USD/month (based on portfolio/skills)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week), Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver (PST) overlap for feedback



---



THE VISION



Prismiera - luxury jewelry.



We're going to be building cinematic para-social content on Instagram/TikTok, with flexibility to pivot formats based on what the platform is rewarding. Realistic, stylized, dark feminine aesthetic, mythology underneath, luxury fashion on the surface. Think if a high-end fashion editorial had lore and a storyline.



The content follows a simple rhythm: our heroine talks to camera like a real person — casual, smart, magnetic — then something cinematic happens that changes everything you just saw. The audience replays it.



We're hiring for taste first, artistry, cinematography, humor, and technical execution. We provide all AI tools and training if needed. You bring the instinct.



THE CONTENT MIX



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption.

25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end execution of viral formats and humor. The premise can be unhinged; the visuals never break luxury canon.

10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. The algorithmic wildcard.



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Cinematic skits.



NO: Generic CapCut presets. Generic motivational reels. Anything made in Canva.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Produce original IG Reels and TikToks — parasocial content into cinematic reveal

- Build cinematic skits around our AI personas using trending formats and dark humor

- Integrate AI-generated characters into edits so they feel like they belong in the scene, not pasted on top

- Learn and use frontier AI generation tools (we provide paid accounts + training if needed)

- Music-sync editing — cuts married to the beat, rhythm as a storytelling weapon

- Design for platform behavior — what gets saved on IG, what loops on TikTok

- Ramp from 3–5 pieces/week to 6–10 at steady state



REQUIREMENTS



- Portfolio that makes us stop scrolling — we're evaluating taste, creative vision, and editing execution as a package. All three matter.

- Music-sync editing instinct (AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits — any genre)

- Work that has atmospheric, cinematic depth — layered compositions, light/shadow awareness, visual storytelling that goes beyond straight cuts and generic Capcut presets. Whether you achieve this in After Effects, Premiere, DaVinci, or anything else doesn't matter. The output is everything.

- Strong English, clear async communication, reliable deadlines

- Coachable — takes direct feedback and iterates fast



BONUS (affects your rate): After Effects proficiency, AI generation experience (Kling, Veo, Seedream), color grading, typography, sound design



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run your editing software and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



THE DEAL



- Paid trial: $150/week standard. For candidates with strong existing signal, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 for a single deliverable.

- All AI tool subscriptions provided

- Creative ownership from day one — you define how a luxury brand looks on social

- Direct feedback on every edit

- Rate growth tied to capability growth

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon, with two more AI-native brands incubating behind it



COMPENSATION: $900–1,100 USD/month based on portfolio and skills. Editors with compositing ability and AI generation experience start higher. Bi-weekly payments after confirmed hire.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite movie]

Use 7+ apply points.



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit that is aspirational, aesthetic, fashion-adjacent, or a skit showing platform-native instinct. The feeling and execution matters.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE music-driven edit. (Can overlap with #1.)



3. Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above that you are proud of, drop it here!



4. The Two-Act Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given footage of our AI heroine sitting in a dimly lit restaurant, a dark atmospheric beat, and her voice talking casually about something she noticed about the people around her. Act 1 is the conversation. Act 2 is the cinematic reveal. Pitch both halves — what does she say, what does the audience see, and what is the reveal? Humorous? Epic?



5. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). Your experience with generative AI tools. If none, let us know.



6. Hardware. CPU / GPU / RAM / upload speed.



7. Turnaround. Given existing footage, potential music track, and an established template — how long for a 15–20s piece? How long for a 45s stitched cinematic AI video?



8. The Rewrite. Make this dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Accounting Supervisor
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented **Accounting Supervisor** to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will have strong leadership capabilities, excellent accounting knowledge, and prior experience handling U.S.-based accounting processes.



As the Accounting Supervisor, you will oversee the day-to-day accounting operations, ensure accurate and timely financial reporting, and support the continuous improvement of financial procedures. You’ll also be guiding a team of accounting associates to maintain compliance, efficiency, and accuracy across all financial activities.



Key Responsibilities:



* Supervise daily accounting operations, including bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, and general ledger maintenance.

* Review and approve journal entries, reconciliations, and financial statements.

* Ensure compliance with accounting principles and company policies.

* Oversee month-end and year-end closing processes.

* Coordinate with management for budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis.

* Train, mentor, and evaluate accounting staff to ensure high performance and accuracy.

* Collaborate with external auditors and support audit requirements.

* Recommend process improvements to enhance efficiency and accuracy in financial operations.



Qualifications:



* Minimum of 3–5 years of accounting experience, with at least 1–2 years in a supervisory role.

* Strong understanding of U.S. accounting principles (GAAP).

* Proficient in QuickBooks, Excel, and other accounting software.

* Excellent analytical, organizational, and leadership skills.

* Strong communication skills and attention to detail.

* Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities under tight deadlines.

title: Amazon Operations Specialist
description:
Remote

Full Time

Mid Level

Overview

Pearl West is a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple brands across Amazon, TikTok Shop, and Shopify, generating multi-million dollar monthly revenue. We are looking for an Amazon Operations Specialist who thrives in a high-performance, fast-paced environment and is obsessed with optimizing listings, solving problems, and driving measurable growth.



This role is critical to maintaining and scaling our Amazon presence across multiple brands, ensuring listings are fully optimized, compliant, and consistently improving in performance.



Key Responsibilities

1. Listing Monitoring & Revenue Performance

Monitor daily listing performance across multiple brands (sessions, CVR, revenue)

Identify revenue leaks (drops in ranking, suppressed listings, lost Buy Box)

Take immediate action to recover and scale underperforming ASINs

Track keyword indexing and organic ranking movement

2. Account Health & Risk Management

Proactively monitor Account Health dashboards across all accounts

Resolve policy violations, suppressed listings, and compliance issues quickly

Own communication with Amazon Seller Central support and escalate when needed

Ensure all listings meet Amazon’s latest compliance and content standard

3. Listing Optimization (Process Execution)

Execute Pearl West’s internal listing optimization framework (COSMOS & RUFUS compliant)

Optimize titles, bullets, descriptions, and A+ content for both SEO and conversion

Ensure all listings align with brand positioning and premium product standards

Continuously improve listings based on performance data and customer feedbac

4. Image Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization

Run structured A/B tests on images using Amazon Experiments or external tools

Analyze CVR impact and implement winning creatives

Collaborate with design team to iterate on high-converting image strategies

Ensure image sequencing aligns with proven conversion framework

5. Backend Optimization & Indexing

Manage backend search terms and attributes with strict no-waste keyword strategy

Audit listings for missed indexing opportunities and fix gaps

Optimize variation structures for maximum visibility and conversion

Maintain clean, accurate, and fully optimized backend dat

6. Operational Execution Across Accounts

Launch new products and variations across multiple brands

Troubleshoot listing issues (stranded inventory, ASIN merges, flat file errors)

Manage bulk uploads and catalog updates via flat files

Coordinate with supply chain team to prevent stockouts and lost sale

7. Data-Driven Growth & Reporting

Track and analyze key metrics: CVR, sessions, revenue, keyword ranking

Identify trends, bottlenecks, and growth opportunities across listings

Provide actionable recommendations to scale winning products

Support aggressive revenue growth targets through continuous optimizatio

8. Cross-Channel Awareness (Amazon + TikTok Synergy)

Ensure Amazon listings are optimized for external traffic (TikTok Shop, creators)

Align listing content with creative strategies used in TikTok and paid media

Support product launches tied to creator campaigns and affiliate pushe

Qualifications

1+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

Proven track record of improving listing performance (CVR, ranking, revenue)

Strong understanding of Amazon SEO, indexing, and conversion optimization

Experience with tools like Helium 10, DataDive, Sellerboard, or similar

Comfortable working across multiple brands and high SKU volume

Strong analytical skills and attention to detail

Ability to move fast, prioritize, and execute without constant oversigh

Nice to Have

Experience in high-growth e-commerce environments ($1M+/month brands)

Familiarity with TikTok Shop or external traffic strategies

Experience with Amazon Experiments and structured A/B testing

Basic understanding of Amazon PP

What Success Looks Like

Listings are fully optimized, indexed, and consistently improving in CVR

Minimal account health issues with fast resolution times

Clear, measurable impact on revenue growth across managed ASINs

Strong execution speed with high attention to detail

Continuous testing and iteration mindse

Why Join Pearl West

High-growth environment with real ownership and impact

Work across multiple scaling brands and product categories

Performance-driven culture focused on results, not busy work

Opportunity to grow into senior roles as the company scales



Application process:

1. Submit your resume through this link: 



Applications submitted here will not be entertained!

title: Excutive Assistant
description:
We are seeking a **senior-level Executive Assistant** based in the **Philippines** to provide comprehensive support to the Founding Attorney. This is a high-responsibility role suited for a proactive, detail-oriented, and highly organized individual who can operate independently, communicate fluently in English, and handle sensitive information with utmost professionalism.



---



### **Key Responsibilities**



**Administrative & Executive Support**



* Manage the Founding Attorney’s daily calendar across multiple time zones (EST/PST), including scheduling client calls, legal meetings, and internal check-ins.

* Prioritize and manage incoming
s, draft responses, and ensure timely follow-up.

* Coordinate travel arrangements, including international flights, hotels, and car services.

* Maintain organization across various projects, files, and client deliverables using Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion.



**Operational & Client Coordination**



* Liaise with clients, vendors, and collaborators in a professional and polished manner.

* Prepare meeting briefs, call summaries, and document outlines.

* Track deadlines for contracts, filings, and deliverables; follow up proactively.

* Manage billing, invoicing, and timesheet submissions using Clio or similar systems.



**Research & Special Projects**



* Conduct legal or business research on clients, entities, and relevant industries.

* Support in preparing client proposals, presentations, and reports.

* Assist in managing special projects across the Falls ecosystem (law, art, philanthropy, and consumer ventures).



---



### **Requirements**



* **Minimum 5 years** of experience as an Executive Assistant or Operations Manager supporting a senior executive, ideally within legal, professional services, or consulting.

* Exceptional written and spoken **English communication skills** (C1/C2 proficiency).

* Strong organizational, multitasking, and problem-solving abilities with sharp attention to detail.

* Tech-savvy — proficient in **Google Workspace**, **Slack**, **Notion**, **Zoom**, and project management tools (e.g., Asana, ClickUp, or Monday).

* Comfortable working remotely and autonomously with minimal supervision.

* Ability to maintain **absolute confidentiality** and exercise discretion at all times.

* Willingness to occasionally adjust hours to align with **U.S. Eastern Time** when necessary.



---



### **Preferred Qualifications**



* Prior experience in a **U.S. law firm or professional services company**.

* Familiarity with legal terminology, document management, and client billing workflows.

* Background in **business, communications, or paralegal studies**.

* Proven ability to anticipate needs and take initiative before being asked.

title: Follow Up Boss CRM & ISA Performance Manager (Real Estate)
description:
We are a growing real estate brokerage in the United States looking for a highly skilled professional who can take full ownership of our CRM and help our team convert more leads into appointments.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role.

We are looking for someone who understands systems, follow-up, and conversion.



???? YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITY



Your job is to make sure:



* No lead is missed

* Follow-up is consistent and effective

* Our ISA team is setting appointments every week



???? WHAT YOU WILL DO



CRM Management (Follow Up Boss)



* Organize and structure pipelines

* Set up automations, action plans, and smart lists

* Ensure all leads are tracked and followed up properly

* Clean and optimize the CRM



ISA Training & Performance



* Train ISA team on how to use Follow Up Boss

* Improve how they communicate with leads

* Create and refine follow-up systems

* Track activity and hold the team accountable

* Ensure at least 20+ conversations per week

* Help increase appointments and conversions



Conversion Optimization



* Identify where leads are being lost

* Improve follow-up speed and quality

* Increase conversion from lead to appointment



? REQUIREMENTS (READ CAREFULLY)



* Experience using Follow Up Boss CRM (REQUIRED)

* Experience in real estate

* Experience working with or training a sales or ISA team

* Strong understanding of lead follow-up and conversion



Do not apply if you have not used Follow Up Boss.



???? WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* Leads are contacted quickly

* No leads are missed

* ISA team is active and consistent

* Appointments are being set weekly

* Conversion improves over time



???? COMPENSATION



* $700 – $900/month (based on experience)

* Performance bonuses available based on results



???? HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



1. Your experience with Follow Up Boss

2. A 2–3 minute Loom video explaining:

   * How you would organize a CRM

   * How you would train an ISA team

3. Examples of systems or workflows you have built



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



? FINAL NOTE



We are looking for someone who can take ownership, build systems, train a team, and deliver results.

This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.

title: ISA - Appointment Setter
description:
If you can be quick on your feet, are super personable and able to learn quickly, keep reading.



We are looking for those driven individuals who can take their past skillset and use that for learning, in a results driven industry.

You need to be a people person who is not afraid of making calls as that will be what you do all day. Inviting Real Estate agents to free events that will teach them the things that will grow their business and allow them to stay in their career of choice. You will be offering them the gift of their dream!!



When Brokers get their Real Estate license, there is little they have learned in the licensing process that tells them how to make money at this career they have chosen. Many have to step away from their dream inside of 2 years. A whopping 87% of real estate agents do NOT reinstate their license after the first two years and their dreams of their Real Estate career are gone.



When you work with Club Wealth you are connecting people with the tools available to them that will allow them to stay in their career of choice and live the work life, they wanted for themselves. Even better, our CEO was the top broker and teaches from his 30+ years in the Real Estate industry with incredible success. You will be inviting people to see him talk about how he did it. And you are never asking for payment! You will be inviting them to both classes and coaching that is complimentary. We provide value that will move the needle on their business in a very real way before they ever are set up with someone to talk about becoming a coaching client.



If talking to people about their dream and helping them see it realized, sounds like the kind of day you would want to have as your job, then apply immediately! You will need to have your own computer and a headset with mic to be used while working from home all day. Additionally, you will need to have strong internet connection and the ability to multitask, utilizing multiple platforms at the same time.



This job and all interviews for this job will be held during Club Wealth Headquarters office hours, which will be Pacific Standard Time.



**This job requires Strong verbal and written English skills (Perfect English and accent-free) and the ability to be self-lead and stay busy at all times. If you have to rely on scripts, translation software or the like, this job is not for you and will not work out. We do not wish to waste anyone's time, and this is a high requirement and sticking point. Your speaking and understanding of the English language must be to the point of understanding slang, idioms and figures of speech to keep up in an organic fluid conversation. This includes mastery of your accent with little to display that English is not your first language.

If you are the rare gem I am speaking of, reach out to me immediately!!!**

title: E-commerce Video Editor
description:
### **Role Overview**



Something New is a performance marketing agency that helps E-commerce (D2C) brands grow. We are looking for a **Senior Video Editor** to join our production team.



In this role, you will be responsible for editing high-quality video ads for our clients (distributed through Meta, TikTok) and internal content for the agency (distributed through YouTube, Social Media). You will work within our **CreativeOS** system to receive briefs and deliver assets.



This is a 100% execution role, but you must be resourceful. While we provide the scripts and strategy, you will often need to **source B-roll (Stock or AI)** and **generate Voiceovers (AI), Generate Ai B-roll** to bring the script to life. Your job is to take the concept and build a professional, high-converting video quickly.



---



### **Core Responsibilities**



- **Edit Performance Ads:** Create Direct Response video ads (UGC, VSLs, Founder Stories) based on provided storyboards and scripts.

- **Source & Generate Assets:** When raw footage is not provided, you must find high-quality Stock B-roll or generate AI visuals to match the script.

- **AI Voiceover Production:** You will use tools like **ElevenLabs** to generate, pace, and mix realistic voiceovers when a human voice is not provided.

- **Edit Internal Content:** Produce long-form videos for the agency’s YouTube channel and short clips for organic social media.

- **Motion Graphics:** Create "Pattern Interrupts" (kinetic typography, visual overlays, and animations) to keep viewers engaged and stop the scroll.

- **Create Variations:** Rapidly produce 5–10 versions of a single video by changing the "Hook" (first 3 seconds), music, or background/b-roll footage.

- **Audio & Colour:** Clean up background noise (using AI tools), sync voiceovers, and colour grade raw footage to look professional.

- **Asset Management:** Organise all project files and exports inside our **CreativeOS (Notion)**. You must ensure files are easy for the team to find.



---



### **Required Skills & Tools**



You must be fluent in the following software and workflows:



1. **Professional Editing Software:** You must be fast and proficient in **Premiere Pro**, **CapCut Pro**, **DaVinci Resolve**, or **Final Cut Pro**. *Note: The final result must look polished and professional, not "cheap."*

2. **Motion & Visual Effects:** You must be able to create custom text animations and visual overlays. (You can use After Effects, CapCut Motion, or other compositing tools).

3. **AI Workflow:** You must be experienced in using **ElevenLabs** (for Voiceovers) and AI tools for sourcing/generating B-roll.

4. **CreativeOS / Notion:** You will use this daily to manage tasks and find assets.

5. **Stock Footage Sourcing:** Ability to quickly find "on-brand" B-roll from stock libraries that doesn't look like generic stock footage.



---



### **Expected Deliverables**



- **Volume:** You will be expected to deliver **10 to 20 unique video assets per week** once fully onboarded.

- **Accuracy:** Videos must be exported in the correct format for each platform (9:16 for TikTok/Reels, 16:9 for YouTube) with correct "Safe Zones" for text.

- **Speed:** You must be able to turn around revisions within 24 hours.



---



### **Hardware & Internet Requirements**



- **Computer:** A powerful PC or Mac capable of rendering 4K footage and running After Effects without lagging (Recommended: 32GB RAM minimum).

- **Internet:** High-speed connection (Fiber recommended) with a backup solution in case of outages.

- **Power:** Access to a generator or power station (e.g., EcoFlow) to handle power interruptions.



---



### **How to Apply**



Please submit your application with the following:



1. **Portfolio:** A link to your showreel or portfolio. **Specifically highlight Short-Form Ads (TikTok/Reels) and Motion Graphics work.**

2. **Experience:** A brief summary of your experience editing for D2C or E-commerce brands.

3. **Speed:** Tell us your average turnaround time for a 60-second video with motion graphics.

title: AI Specialist (Social Media & Content Systems)
description:
AI Specialist (Social Media & Content Systems)

Contract / Project-Based | Potential Ongoing



We’re looking for an AI specialist to integrate and operationalise AI tools across a high-end social media and content creation business.



This is not a surface-level “AI prompts” role.

We’re seeking someone who understands how to build, implement and refine AI systems that directly improve workflow, efficiency, and output quality.



About the Business:

Our Agency is a strategy-led content and social media studio working with established beauty, wellness and aesthetics brands.



Our work sits at the intersection of:

– High-end content creation

– Structured social media management

– Performance-led strategy



We are now integrating AI in a way that enhances, not replaces - quality, precision, and brand positioning.



The Role:

You will be responsible for identifying, implementing and refining AI tools and systems that support:



– Content planning and ideation workflows

- Trend tracking and report of industry news and ideas

– Caption and script structuring (aligned to brand tone)

– Editing and post-production efficiencies

– Internal SOP creation and documentation

– Client workflow automation (onboarding, proposals, approvals, delivery)

– Structuring and optimising Notion as a central hub for content, clients, and internal workflows

– Integrating and optimising Dubsado workflows (lead capture, forms, proposals, automations)

– Connecting systems across Notion, Dubsado and AI tools to create a seamless backend

- Social Media Reporting of Client Profiles



The focus is on practical, usable systems - not theory.



Required Experience:

You must have proven experience working with:



– Manus / Claude Co Work (or similar AI assistant systems)

– Advanced ChatGPT / LLM workflows

– AI automation tools (Zapier, Make, or equivalent)

– Notion system design (databases, workflows, dashboards, documentation)

– Dubsado or similar CRM/workflow platforms

– Workflow design within content, creative, or service-based businesses



What You Must Be Able To Do:

– Build and structure Notion as a central operating system, not just a note-taking tool

– Optimise Dubsado as a client workflow engine, not just a form tool - I currently only use Dubsado for automations

– Integrate AI tools into existing workflows in a way that is actually used day-to-day

– Create repeatable systems (not one-off outputs)

– Improve efficiency without compromising content quality or brand positioning



What We’re Looking For:

– Strong understanding of how AI fits into creative and content workflows

– Ability to think in systems, not tasks

– High attention to detail (critical in content environments)

– Ability to adapt outputs across different brand tones and industries

– Clear communication and documentation skills



What This Is Not:

– Not a generic VA role

– Not basic prompt writing

– Not trend-based AI usage



We are not looking for surface-level AI knowledge.



Scope:

Initial project-based engagement to:



– Audit current workflows

– Identify opportunities for AI integration

– Build and implement key systems

– Structure Notion as the internal operating system

– Optimise Dubsado workflows for client experience

– Document processes for internal use



Opportunity for ongoing work based on performance.



To Apply — Please include:



– Examples of AI systems you’ve implemented

– Tools you specialise in



Plus, answer the following:



1. If you were to turn a social media/content business into a fully systemised operation using AI, Notion and Dubsado — what would that structure look like?



2. Give an example of a workflow you’ve built using AI that saved time or improved output. What did it replace and what was the result?



3. How would you structure Notion for a content business managing multiple clients, content shoots, and approvals?

title: Sales VA
description:
We are hiring a Sales-Oriented Virtual Assistant who knows how to confidently handle

objections and close deals over the phone. You’ll be the first point of contact for leads

interested in our U.S.-based cleaning services, and your main goal is to convert those inquiries

into paying customers.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in sales conversations, knows how to build trust

quickly, and doesn’t shy away from tough questions or hesitations from prospects.



Key Responsibilities:

- Take inbound sales calls from interested leads and follow up with outbound calls when

needed

- Confidently pitch our services and walk customers through pricing and packages

- Handle common objections (pricing, scheduling, trust concerns) with professionalism

and ease

- Convert warm leads into scheduled jobs with a consistent close rate

- Manage CRM updates, lead tracking, and post-call notes

- Assist with scheduling, follow-up
s, and basic administrative tasks

- Maintain excellent customer service before, during, and after the sale



What We're Looking For:

- Fluent in English with strong conversational skills

- Proven ability to overcome objections and close sales on calls

- Comfortable talking to U.S. customers and building rapport quickly

- Detail-oriented with solid administrative follow-through

- Able to work independently and take initiative without constant supervision

- Experience with cleaning or home services (preferred but not required)



Technical Requirements:

- Minimum 30 Mbps wired Internet connection

- Quiet, professional work environment with no background noise

- Backup Internet and device for emergencies

Compensation & Hours:

- $5–$5.50 per hour (depending on experience)

- Full-time role

- Must be available during U.S. business hours (Pacific time)

- Commission's available as bonuses for top performers

- Bonuses provided for hitting key KPI's

- Looking for someone who wants to grow with the growth of the organization.



To Apply:

Submit a short voice or video message describing your experience with handling objections

and closing sales over the phone. Real examples or metrics from past roles are a plus. As well as why you would be a good fit for our company

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
(We are not a VA agency.)



Location: Remote

Type of Employment: Full-Time



About Us:

BridgeCom Systems is a leader in the two-way radio industry, serving customers through innovative products and exceptional support. Our BC+ Membership Program, BCU (BridgeCom University), and Affiliate Program are key parts of our community, connecting and engaging ham radio enthusiasts worldwide. We’re seeking a dynamic, customer-focused individual to support our members, affiliates, and dealer partners while helping strengthen communication, engagement, and relationships across all groups.



Job Summary

As the Virtual assistant, you will play a key role in onboarding, communication, and relationship management across BCU, BC+, Affiliates, and Dealers. Your core focus will be making sure each group stays informed about what we offer, what’s changing, and what’s coming next, while also maintaining strong, positive relationships with each audience.

This role requires someone who is comfortable using AI tools as part of their daily workflow. Use of AI to improve speed, accuracy, communication, and overall performance is mandatory in this position. The ideal candidate knows how to use AI efficiently to draft communications, organize information, improve workflows, and support execution while still applying sound judgment and attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities:

- Onboarding Support: Facilitate smooth onboarding for new BCU/BC+ members and affiliates, ensuring they understand program benefits, tools, and resources.

- Communication Management: Serve as a primary point of contact and help manage consistent, friendly communication that keeps BCU, BC+, affiliates, and dealers informed of updates, launches, events, and promotions.

- Newsletter Creation & Distribution: Create, schedule, and send newsletters and
 updates for BC+/BCU members, affiliates, and dealers, ensuring messaging is clear, timely, and aligned with BridgeCom’s offers, announcements, and campaigns.

- Dealer Communications & PR: Maintain professional, positive relationships with dealer partners, ensuring they have current information, support, and clarity on BridgeCom offerings to strengthen goodwill and alignment.

- Program Updates & Alignment: Ensure all groups stay up to date with what we offer, key differentiators, and changes, helping reduce confusion and improve consistency across channels.

- Event Coordination: Assist in planning, promoting, and managing program-related events, webinars, and activities to increase engagement and participation.

- Member Engagement & Support: Enhance engagement, respond to inquiries quickly, and proactively support members and partners to improve satisfaction and retention.

- Reporting & Feedback: Monitor member and partner activity, identify recurring issues, and provide insights to internal teams for continuous improvement.

- AI-Assisted Execution: Use AI tools daily to assist with writing, communication, organization, research, workflow efficiency, and task execution while maintaining high-quality output and human oversight.



Qualifications:

- Previous experience in customer service, membership coordination, affiliate support, dealer support, program management,
 marketing, or a similar communication-focused role

- Good written and spoken English is required, as this role may sometimes involve phone communication with dealers

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Experience creating, editing, and sending newsletters or
 campaigns

- Strong organizational and multitasking abilities with excellent attention to detail

- Add “Blue M&M BCS VA” to the subject line so we know you have read this job description and can consider your application.

- Must be comfortable using AI tools in daily work

- Ability to use AI to assist with writing, communication, organization, and workflow improvement is required

vAbility to work independently and manage a remote workload efficiently

- Proficiency with CRM systems,
 marketing platforms, and communication/event tools such as HubSpot and Zoom

- Knowledge of or interest in ham radio or related industries is a plus



Compensation:

$3.00 per hour



What We Offer:

- Work remotely from the comfort of your home

- Be part of a passionate team dedicated to serving the ham radio community

- Opportunities for professional growth and development



How to Apply

If you’re proactive, organized, people-focused, and comfortable using AI to work smarter and faster, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a cover letter detailing your interest in the role and any relevant experience.

title: Senior Insurance Virtual Assistant (EZLynx + GoHighLevel) – Full Time | Remote
description:
Senior Insurance Virtual Assistant (EZLynx + GoHighLevel) – Full Time | Remote



We are a growing U.S.-based insurance agency looking to hire an experienced Virtual Assistant with strong hands-on knowledge of EZLynx and GoHighLevel (GHL) to support our backend operations, automation, and agency management processes.



This is a senior-level, full-time role for someone who can step into an active system environment, identify issues, and implement solutions without needing extensive training.



About the Role

Our agency recently completed a system transition and is now focused on cleaning up, optimizing, and automating our workflows. We are seeking a professional who understands how insurance agencies operate inside an Agency Management System (AMS) and how it integrates with a CRM and marketing automation platform.



Your primary focus will be backend system management. Client-facing work may be added later, but it is not the immediate priority.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage daily operations within EZLynx (policy data, client records, and carrier information)

- Clean and organize existing agency data to ensure accuracy and usability

- Set up, audit, and optimize automations in both EZLynx and GoHighLevel

- Handle carrier downloads and manual data updates when needed

- Support quoting workflows and help prepare the agency for increased cross-selling activity

title: Proactive E-commerce & Admin Assistant (Part-Time / High Autonomy)
description:
About the Role:



I am a busy entrepreneur running a car dealership alongside an active e-commerce business in Singapore. I do not have the time to micromanage. I am looking for a highly organized, independent, and proactive Virtual Assistant to take complete ownership of my daily task checklists.



You must be the kind of person who solves problems before I even notice them, suggests improvements to my systems, and can be trusted to manage the daily workflow flawlessly.



Schedule & Compensation:



Rate: $5.50 / hour (Approx. $500 / month)



Hours: 3 hours per day.



Schedule: 6 days a week on a fixed daily schedule (exact working hours are open for discussion).



Opportunity for Extra Pay: If you want to work 7 days a week to earn extra money, that option is always open. We can discuss this during the interview.



Core Responsibilities:



E-Commerce Daily Operations (Shopee/Lazada/1688): Fully manage the daily health and operations of multiple e-commerce stores. This includes executing customer service, processing specific pre-orders and 1688 orders, managing returns/refunds, monitoring inventory thresholds, entering platform campaigns, and actively checking for banned or deleted listings.



Automotive Business Admin (Fitz Automobile): Maintain back-end organization for a car dealership. This involves syncing vehicle prices across multiple listing platforms, diligently tracking and alerting me of road tax expirations, and organizing incoming invoices and new car data into Google Sheets.



Requirements



(Optional) Proven experience in E-commerce management (specifically Shopee/Lazada Seller Centers) and general administrative support.



Extreme attention to detail. you execute daily checklists with zero missed steps.



High level of autonomy; you know how to find answers and troubleshoot issues independently without waiting for instructions.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to work highly efficiently within a 3-hour daily window.



Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):



If you do not follow these instructions exactly, your application will be automatically deleted.



Subject Line: Make the subject line of your application: "Proactive VA: [Your Favorite Color] - [Your Name]"



Video Introduction: Record a 1-to-2-minute video introducing yourself. In the video, explain why you are a good fit for a highly autonomous role and give one example of a time you proactively solved a problem for a past client without being asked.



Written Question: In your application message, answer this briefly: If a product listing gets unexpectedly deleted by Lazada and I am unreachable, what are your immediate next steps?

title: Executive Assistant & Content Operations Manager — Faith-Based Coaching Brand — Immediate Start
description:
I'll be direct because that's how I work and it's probably how you work too.

I am Saundra Kandler — a faith-led business coach, author, and keynote speaker for top producing women in real estate. I have a published book, an active coaching practice, a growing community of nearly 700 members, and a clear 45-day growth plan with the first two weeks of content completely written and ready to publish.

I do not need someone to figure out what to do. I need someone sharp enough to execute what is already built — and trusted enough to own it completely.

This is not a task role. This is an ownership role.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN:

Content Operations

Publish YouTube videos, Substack articles and Notes, LinkedIn posts, Instagram Reels,
 content, TikTok clips, and Medium posts on a clear weekly schedule. The scripts and content for weeks one and two are written word for word. You publish them. You optimize them. You track them.

Client Pipeline

Research prospects daily. Track all outreach in a simple Google Doc. Book discovery calls. Send follow-up materials. Report three lines to me every day — who you reached, who responded, who is booked. This is the most important part of the role right now.

Executive Assistant

Manage my inbox to zero daily. Manage my calendar. Coordinate guests and logistics for twice-monthly Zoom coaching calls. Send me a Friday summary every week without fail.

Community

Post three times a week in my 
munity of 677 members. Welcome new members. Keep the community warm and growing.

Systems

Everything is being built in real time. You document what you own. You improve what you touch. You tell me when something is not working before it becomes a problem.



THE MISSION RIGHT NOW:

Help me sign 8 new private coaching clients in the next 60 days. That is the goal everything serves. When we hit it the business grows and so does your role and your compensation. I am looking for someone who wants to win alongside me — not just complete tasks.



YOU ARE THE RIGHT PERSON IF:

You have supported a coach, personal brand, or online business before and can point to real results. You are extremely organized and nothing falls through the cracks on your watch. You communicate proactively — you tell me what is done, what is coming, and what you need without being asked. You show up to every scheduled call and commitment without exception. You work independently and take ownership of your lane completely. You are advanced with Claude AI, YouTube, Substack, Instagram,
, and LinkedIn. You are aligned with Christian faith values and want to be part of building something meaningful. You can start this week.



WHAT THIS IS NOT:

This is not a role for someone who needs daily hand-holding. This is not a role for someone who disappears and has to be chased for updates. This is not a role for someone who is overwhelmed by a clear plan and a focused goal. If you read this and feel energized — you are the right person. If you feel overwhelmed — this is not the right fit and that is okay.



THE GROWTH PATH:

The role starts at $7/hour on EST hours Monday through Thursday at maximum 115 hours per month. When we hit the 8-client goal the budget grows and your compensation and opportunity to hire help grows with it. I am building something that is already working and about to accelerate. The person who gets in now grows with it.



DETAILS:

Available to communicate and meet on zoom/google meet upon scheduled and request. Remote. Start this week. US Eastern hours overlap required. Monday through Friday 8:15 AM to 5 PM with one hour lunch.



HOW TO APPLY:

Your first line must say: I AM READY TO EXECUTE

Then answer these three questions. Short and specific. Long answers will not be read.

One — Describe the last online business or coaching brand you supported. What did you own and what was the result?

Two — The first two weeks of content are completely written. YouTube scripts, Substack articles, LinkedIn posts — all of it. What is your process for publishing and optimizing a YouTube video from a raw file?

Three — My goal is 8 new coaching clients in 60 days. What would you do in your first week to move that forward?

Any application that does not start with I AM READY TO EXECUTE in the subject 
  will not be opened.

title: Offshore Project Manager / Account Executive (Philippines-Based)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing, U.S.-based marketing communications agency serving a diverse portfolio of clients across industries including energy, technology, defense, and beyond. Our work spans creative services, paid media, and digital strategy, and we pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, forward-thinking solutions to our clients.



About the Role



We are seeking a highly motivated, detail-oriented Project Manager / Account Executive based in the Philippines to support and oversee the execution of marketing and communications projects across multiple disciplines.



This role is ideal for someone who is naturally curious, proactive, and thrives in a fast-paced environment. Success in this position comes from thinking ahead, asking the right questions, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



You will serve as a key liaison between internal teams (creative, media, production) and external stakeholders, ensuring projects are delivered on time, on budget, and at a high standard.



Key Responsibilities

 • Manage and coordinate projects across creative services, paid media, and production

 • Act as a central point of contact between internal teams and U.S.-based clients

 • Track timelines, deliverables, and project milestones to ensure smooth execution

 • Proactively identify risks, gaps, or potential issues—and solve them before they arise

 • Ask thoughtful questions and validate assumptions to ensure clarity and alignment

 • Review work for accuracy, completeness, and quality before delivery

 • Anticipate next steps and needs 2–3 stages ahead in the project lifecycle

 • Maintain organized documentation and communication across all projects



What We’re Looking For

 • Strong critical thinking and exceptional common sense

 • Highly inquisitive mindset—you naturally question, verify, and double-check

 • Ability to think ahead and anticipate problems before they happen

 • Excellent organizational and time management skills

 • Strong written and verbal English communication skills

 • Confidence interfacing with American clients in a professional setting

 • High level of accountability and ownership



Preferred (Not Required)

 • Experience in marketing, advertising, or communications

 • Familiarity with:

 • Paid media and programmatic advertising

 • Social media marketing

 • Digital marketing and online campaigns

 • SEO (Search Engine Optimization)

 • Background in customer service or client-facing roles (transferable skills welcomed)



Why This Role Matters



This is not a task-based project management role—it’s a thinking role. The right candidate will act as a strategic partner who ensures projects run smoothly by staying ahead, asking the right questions, and connecting the dots across teams.



Compensation

 • Competitive pay based on experience

 • Opportunity to grow within a dynamic, international agency environment



How to Apply



Please submit your resume along with a brief note explaining:

 • Why you’re a strong fit for this role

 • An example of how you anticipated and prevented a problem in a previous role



We’re looking for someone who doesn’t just manage projects—but thinks, anticipates, and elevates everything they touch.

This is a fully remote role requiring strong organizational skills, experience with real estate investor tools, and the ability to work independently with minimal supervision.









Core Responsibilities

List Pulling & Data Management

•	Pull targeted lists from Property Radar (pre-foreclosures, NODs, distressed properties in Central Valley)

•	Filter and segment lists by urgency, equity, and property type

•	Clean and format CSV files for upload

•	Remove duplicates and bad data before processing

Skip Tracing

•	Run lists through skip tracing services (BatchSkipTracing or similar)

•	Append phone numbers and contact info to each record

•	Verify data quality before uploading to dialer

Dialer Management (Call Tools)

•	Upload skip-traced lists into Call Tools dialer

•	Organize campaigns by priority tier (Hot, Warm, Cold)

•	Assign correct caller lines and campaign settings

•	Monitor campaign status and flag issues

Lead Updates & CRM Management

•	Update lead statuses and call dispositions after each calling session

•	Track interested leads and flag hot prospects for immediate follow-up

•	Maintain clean, organized records in the CRM

•	Send daily lead summary reports to team

Outreach —
s & Text Messages

•	Send templated follow-up
s to leads based on disposition

•	Send SMS follow-ups to interested or no-answer leads

•	Log all outreach in CRM with timestamps

•	Flag any responses for team review immediately



Requirements

•	Experience working with a real estate investor or wholesaling company

•	Familiarity with Property Radar, PropStream, or similar list tools

•	Experience with power dialers (Call Tools, Mojo, ReadyMode, etc.)

•	Proficient in skip tracing (BatchSkipTracing, Skip Genie, etc.)

•	Strong written English for
 and text outreach

About Us:

title: Operations Specialist (customer ops focus)
description:
## About the Role



We're seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Operations Specialist to build and streamline core operational processes across our growing startup. You'll be the operational backbone that enables our small team to scale efficiently, with a primary focus on supporting our Customer Success team through tool implementation, process design, workflow automation, and hands-on operational support across customer accounts. This is a remote role that requires US east coast time zone availability.



## About Resonate



Resonate AI is the leading provider of AI patient capture for dental practices. Resonate AI helps dental practices capture new patients from missed calls using AI agents before they go elsewhere. The team is comprised of industry veterans that bring experience from Microsoft, SpaceX, and OpenAI, among others. We are currently experiencing rapid growth and working to capitalize on a multi-million dollar pipeline. Resonate AI is headquartered in San Francisco, CA, with employees in California, New York, and globally.



## Key Responsibilities



### Customer Success Operations



- Support the Customer Success team with account onboarding logistics, including intake coordination, configuration tracking, and launch readiness checklists

- Build and maintain implementation trackers, health dashboards, and reporting templates that give CSMs real-time visibility into account status

- Prepare data for customer-facing deliverables such as ROI reports, QBR decks, and performance summaries

- Monitor and triage incoming customer issues across Intercom and Slack, ensuring tickets are routed, tracked, and resolved within SLA

- Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, open issues, and account milestones across internal systems



### Systems & Tools Implementation



- Design, configure, and implement operational tools including HubSpot, Notion, Intercom, and others as needed

- Build self-service process documentation and resources that reduce manual overhead

- Create standardized templates and workflows that minimize non-repeatable work

- Ensure seamless integration between tools to create efficient operational workflows



### Process Design & Optimization



- Identify operational bottlenecks across customer success, sales, and product workflows

- Design, implement, and manage end-to-end processes that enable the team to execute with speed and quality

- Build AI-first systems and automated workflows to reduce manual operational work

- Create scalable processes that support rapid customer growth without proportional operational overhead



## Ideal Candidate



- 2+ years experience in ops, customer success support, project management, or a similar role

- Systems Thinker: Ability to design scalable processes from scratch

- AI-first mindset: Instinctively looks for opportunities to automate, scale, and reduce manual work through intelligent systems

- Analysis: Extreme attention to detail and analytical decision-making skills

- Self-starter: Comfortable working independently, taking ownership, and driving projects to completion

- Technically adept: Proficiency with modern SaaS tool stack and ability to quickly learn new platforms (e.g., Intercom, Notion, Linear, Google Sheets, Google Docs, etc.)

- Strong communicator: Excellent English written and verbal communication skills (C1 Advanced to C2 Mastery)

- Hungry to learn: Excited to engage in multiple areas and wear different hats

- Obsession for growth: Desire to work in a fast-paced environment, continuously learn, and master your craft

- Available to work multi-hour overlap with US east coast time zone (GMT-4/-5)

- Bonus: Prior startup experience in an operational or "get things done" role

- Bonus: Familiarity with customer success workflows, account health tracking, or support tooling

title: Shipping Optimization Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Shipping Specialist to lead shipping analysis, carrier management, packaging optimization, and pallet configuration. This role focuses on reducing freight costs, improving efficiency, and optimizing carton and master pack strategies.

Key Responsibilities



Analyze shipping costs, carrier performance, and service levels

Develop shipping reports and identify cost-saving opportunities

Manage relationships with carrier reps; review rates, contracts, and surcharges

Optimize packaging, carton sizes, and master pack quantities to reduce dimensional weight and freight costs

Build and optimize pallet configurations using palletization software

Improve cube utilization and ensure compliance with carrier requirements

Maintain accurate shipping data within systems and tools

Audit carrier invoices and identify billing discrepancies, refunds, and surcharge issues

Conduct packaging and dimensional weight experiments to validate cost savings opportunities

Assist with optimizing shipping rules, automation, and carrier selection logic within shipping platforms

Track carrier KPIs including on-time performance, claim rates, and cost-per-shipment metrics

Collaborate with warehouse and product teams to implement packaging standards and improve shipping efficiency

Qualifications:



Experience with shipping platforms (Shippo preferred)

Experience with packaging design or packaging cost optimization

3+ years of experience in shipping, logistics, or transportation analysis

Strong understanding of parcel, LTL, and freight rate structures

Experience negotiating or working directly with carrier representatives

Proficiency in Excel for reporting and analysis

Experience with shipping software and pallet/load planning tools

Highly analytical, detail-oriented, and cost-focused

Schedule



Full-time position

Must work US Mountain Standard Time (MST) hours



To Apply:

Please apply with at least 8 apply points

Please attach your resume

 We are a growing residential construction and remodeling company based in Florida. Our company manages multiple renovation and construction projects and works closely with homeowners, subcontractors, suppliers, and project managers.

Because our team is small, this role is extremely important. The person in this position becomes the central point of communication and organization for the company.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Remote – Philippines)

U.S.-Based Outdoor Gear Brand

We’re a fast-growing outdoor gear company creating products for people who feel more at home in the mountains, on the water, and off the grid than they do indoors. From backcountry hunts to cold mornings at camp, our brand lives in real-world adventure — and we’re looking for a Video Editor who can bring those stories to life.

This role is ideal for someone who loves pacing, emotion, and visual storytelling just as much as clean cuts and color.



About the Role

You’ll be a key part of our creative team, turning raw field footage into compelling stories that move people — whether that’s a product launch film, a social reel, or a YouTube mini-doc. You’ll collaborate daily with our U.S.-based creative leads and marketing team while working remotely from the Philippines.

We move fast, care about craft, and believe great editing is invisible — until it hits you in the chest.



What You’ll Do

• Edit high-quality video content for:

Social media (short-form, vertical, performance-driven)

YouTube and brand storytelling films

Product launches and campaigns

Paid ads and performance marketing

• Shape story from raw footage, not just assemble cuts

• Select music, build pacing, and enhance emotional tone

• Perform color correction and basic color grading

• Clean up and mix dialogue, natural sound, and music

• Add motion graphics, titles, and simple visual effects when needed

• Organize and manage media, project files, and exports

• Create multiple cutdowns and format variations for different platforms

• Collaborate across time zones with U.S. creative leadership

• Take feedback well and iterate quickly



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

3+ years professional video editing experience

Strong portfolio showing storytelling ability (not just flashy cuts)

Must be able to work U.S. Mountain Time hours primarily (9:00am to 5:00pm Mountain Time) with flexible schedule opportunities after training period

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

Working knowledge of After EffectsSolid understanding of pacing, rhythm, and emotional storytellingExperience editing outdoor, lifestyle, documentary, or product contentStrong English communication skills (written and spoken)Ability to work independently and hit deadlines without hand-holdingReliable high-speed internet and professional remote setupBig Pluses

Experience with outdoor, hunting, camping, or adventure brandsColor grading experience (Lumetri or DaVinci a bonus)Sound design skillsUnderstanding of social media performance editing (hooks, retention, etc.)Experience working with U.S.-based teams



You’re a Great Fit If You…

Can turn messy field footage into a clear, emotional storyKnow when to let a shot breathe — and when to cut fastCare about tiny details most people never noticeUnderstand that editing is storytelling, not just softwareTake direction well but also bring your own creative instinctsLove the outdoors (even if you’re editing it from your desk)



What You’ll Get

Long-term remote role with a growing U.S. outdoor brandConsistent, ongoing project workCreative team that values craft and storytellingOpportunity to work on meaningful, real-world adventure content



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your portfolio (REQUIRED — applications without samples will not be considered)A short note about your editing style and experienceYour software proficiency and internet speedYour availability (hours per week)

Must apply with 8 apply points

Must submit a resume



If you know how to make someone feel the cold morning air, the weight of a pack, or the quiet before sunrise — we want to see your work.

title: Tax Planning Admin (US Shift)
description:
Role Overview



If you enjoy being the person who keeps everything organized, on track, and running smoothly—and want to play a critical role in delivering a high-end client experience—our Tax Planning Admin role is for you.



DiLucci CPA Firm has been serving business owners and real estate investors since 2005. For nearly two decades, we’ve built a reputation for doing tax differently—by going deeper than compliance, telling clients the truth, and using the tax code strategically to protect and grow their wealth. Our mission is simple: help clients keep more of what they earn while giving them clarity, confidence, and a long-term plan. We hold ourselves to a high bar: Genuine Care, Great Communication, Speed to Learning, and Fun Tax Energy. We believe tax planning should be proactive, not reactive—and that great service comes from expertise, communication, and genuine care.



As our Tax Planning Admin, you will be the operational backbone of the tax planning team—owning scheduling, client communication, document collection, and workflow tracking. You are the person ensuring nothing falls through the cracks, clients feel supported, and the team can operate at a high level.

This is a fast-paced, high-ownership role built for someone who is proactive, organized, and thrives in keeping multiple moving pieces aligned.



Key Responsibilities



-Scheduling & Client Coordination

-Manage and coordinate client scheduling across the tax planning team

-Ensure calendars are optimized and appointments are confirmed and prepared

-Act as a point of contact for clients to ensure a smooth and professional experience



Document Collection & Follow-Ups

-Proactively request, track, and follow up on missing client documents

-Ensure all required information is received ahead of planning deadlines

-Keep clients accountable while maintaining a high-touch, professional tone



File Organization & Documentation

-Organize and maintain clean, structured client files within internal systems

-Ensure all documents are properly labeled, uploaded, and accessible

-Support the team by keeping all client information centralized and easy to navigate



Discovery Notes & Preparation

-Create clear, organized discovery notes from client information and internal inputs

-Prepare summaries ahead of planning calls so advisors are fully equipped

-Ensure accuracy and completeness of all pre-call materials



Workflow Tracking & Execution

-Track the status of all active clients and ensure work is progressing on time

-Identify bottlenecks and take action to move projects forward

-Coordinate across tea
mbers to maintain efficiency during high-volume periods



Client Communication Management

-Manage ongoing client communication through
 and internal systems

-Respond promptly and professionally to client inquiries

-Ensure no communication goes unanswered and all client touchpoints are handled with care



Role Expectations:



Maintain strong organization across multiple clients, deadlines, and workflows

Ensure timely follow-ups and consistent client communication

Operate proactively—identify issues before they become problems

Keep internal systems clean, accurate, and up to date

Be a reliable, steady presence that the team can depend on



Requirements:

Strong organizational and time management skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities simultaneously

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

High attention to detail and follow-through

Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment

Comfortable using digital tools and systems for tracking and communication





DiLucci CPA Core Values



Genuine Care – Trusted advisor relationships, not transactional work

Great Communication – Clear, proactive, and timely

Speed to Learning & Implementation – Adapt quickly as laws and strategies evolve

Fun Tax Energy (FTE) – We take pride in excellent tax work



Job Type: Full-time

Location: Remote (aligned with US working hours, 9AM CST-6PM CST)

Pay: $5 USD/Hr

We are looking for a creative individual to support a short-term project focused on creating AI-generated visuals. The candidate will spend the week producing prompted visuals and ensuring outputs meet a high aesthetic standard.

This role is ideal for someone with a strong eye for design, even if they don’t have formal experience, as long as they have excellent taste and creativity.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Create AI-generated visuals using prompting tools (e.g., Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.)

• Produce a high volume of visuals within a 1-week timeline

• Ensure consistency in style, quality, and visual direction

• Iterate quickly based on feedback

 

Requirements

• Strong English communication skills

• Creative mindset with strong aesthetic judgment

• Ability to follow instructions and execute quickly

• Comfortable using AI tools or willing to learn fast

• Reliable and available full-time for 1 week

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Background in graphic design

• Interest in Pinterest-style content, mood boards, or interior design inspiration

Ideal Candidate

• Has a strong eye for aesthetics and visual storytelling

• Detail-oriented and creative
