2. Why you're the best fit for the role?

3. Short video introduction discussing your relevant work experiences.

title: VoIP Technician ****Ex Ring Central Employees Welcome X** EX 8X8 Employees Welcome*******
description:
****YOU MUST SUBMIT A RESUME AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED FOR A POSITION****





We are a leading telecommunications solutions provider dedicated to delivering cutting-edge communication technologies to businesses of all sizes. We pride ourselves on providing exceptional service and innovative solutions to our clients, and we are looking for a talented Telecommunications Phone System Technician to join our team.



Position Overview:

As a Telecommunications Phone System Technician, you will play a crucial role in designing, implementing, and maintaining telecommunications systems for our clients. We are seeking an experienced technician with a strong background in legacy systems like Nortel, Avaya, and NEC, as well as expertise in modern UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) solutions and VoIP phone systems such as RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.



Responsibilities:



Install, configure, and maintain legacy phone systems like Nortel, Avaya, and NEC.

Design and implement UCaaS solutions to meet client requirements.

Configure and troubleshoot VoIP phone systems, including RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.

Perform system upgrades, patches, and maintenance tasks.

Provide technical support and assistance to clients, both remotely and on-site.

Collaborate with clients to understand their telecommunication needs and recommend solutions.

Assist in the training of end-users on telecommunication systems.

Keep up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies in telecommunications.

Qualifications:



Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in telecommunications.

Proficiency in legacy phone systems such as Nortel, Avaya, and NEC EC.

Strong knowledge of UCaaS solutions and VoIP phone systems, including RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.

Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Previous experience with 8x8, RingCentral, Nextiva, or Dialpad is a strong plus.

Industry certifications (e.g., CCNA, CCNP, UCaaS certifications) are a bonus.



Why Join?



Competitive salary and benefits package.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

Collaborative and supportive team environment.

Exposure to cutting-edge telecommunications technologies.

Chance to work with a diverse range of clients and industries.

Employee recognition and appreciation programs.

If you are a dedicated Telecommunications Phone System Technician with experience in legacy systems and modern UCaaS/VoIP solutions, we encourage you to apply. Join our team and help us shape the future of business communication.

title: Business Development Rep
description:
****** MUST SUBMIT A RESUME & VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED ******



We are a provider of advanced network communications and technology solutions for consumers, small businesses, enterprise organizations, and carrier partners across the U.S.



About the Role:

The Major Account Development Manager will focus on business development, by selling our full suite of strategic products and services to an assigned geographic base of customers. Our goal is to increase wallet share, increase customer satisfaction with us, reduce churn, and increase our customer base utilization of strategic next-gen services. The Major Account Development Manager will leverage a full support team consisting of an Sales Director and Project Management team



What You’ll Do:



Develop and maintain a comprehensive understanding of our sales process, products, and solutions to ensure customers are under contract with the most strategic product set.

Develop a deep understanding of a customer’s business, corporate priorities, and industry to effectively identify solutions that align with the customer’s strategy and needs.

Develop, own, and document the multi-faceted account plan and growth strategy for each customer;

manage priorities and eco-system partners to meet established milestones and achieve sales growth objectives. A

ct with a sense of urgency and work in close partnership with the Customer Success organization, to assure customer issues are resolved quickly.

Develop and implement plans to create additional opportunities to cross-sell and up-sell accounts and increase overall total customer spend.

Manage a pipeline of opportunities in Upgrade to see actual info including generation of accurate forecasts and attainment of assigned quotas.

Participate in, and successfully complete, all required training; participate in teaUpgrade to see actual infoetings and activities as required



Do You Have?

Verifiable record of success in enterprise-level sales, owning a customer base, and driving full life-cycle management of sales, conversions, and renewals.

Prior strategic account management and consultative sales experience selling multiple products and solutions to medium and large businesses.

Strong interpersonal skills, organization skills, time management skills, listening skills, presentation skills, verbal, and written communication skills.

Ability to confidently network, build rapport, and develop trusted relationships overtime to execute mid to long-term account plans.

Excellent presentation skills and ability to speak with business professionals at all levels in an organization and across multiple lines of business.

Strong PC skills, including expertise in MS Office.

Experience in building account plans and leading customer business reviews (MBRs and QBRs).

Experience driving strategic consulting services into new accounts while consistently achieving or exceeding sales goals by generating and maintaining a qualified pipeline.

Even Better:

Strong business, financial and technical acumen with negotiation and closing proficiency.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

title: VA Admin Support
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.

, TikTok, and YouTube

* Improve hooks, retention, pacing, and clarity in videos

* Collaborate on captions, hooks, and CTAs

* Provide weekly performance insights and recommendations





Ideal Candidate Has



* Strong understanding of content performance and analytics

To Apply

 what content to make more of?

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (E-commerce)
description:
We are seeking a results-driven in house Digital Marketing Specialist to manage and optimize our online marketing efforts across multiple e-commerce brands. This role is ideal for someone with strong experience in Google Ads, SEO, and performance marketing, particularly within Shopify and WooCommerce environments.



You will play a key role in driving traffic, improving conversions, and scaling revenue across several growing e-commerce websites.



Key Responsibilities



Paid Advertising & Google Marketing

Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Display, Performance Max)

Optimize campaigns for ROAS, CPA, and conversion growth

Conduct keyword research, bid strategy management, and A/B testing

Manage and optimize Google Merchant Center product feeds

Monitor campaign performance and implement data-driven improvements

Stay up to date with Google Ads policies and best practices



Search Engine Optimization (SEO)

Develop and execute SEO strategies for Shopify and WooCommerce websites

Perform keyword research, on-page optimization, and technical SEO audits

Optimize product pages, category pages, and blog content for search visibility

Improve site structure, internal linking, and indexing

Monitor rankings, traffic, and SEO performance using tools like Google Search Console and analytics platforms



E-commerce Optimization

Work closely with internal teams to improve conversion rates (CRO)

Optimize landing pages, product listings, and user experience

Analyze customer behavior and funnel performance

Support promotional campaigns and seasonal marketing initiatives

Update and maintain websites, including product listings, pricing, and content



Analytics & Reporting

Track and report on KPIs including traffic, conversion rate, CAC, and ROAS

Use tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and reporting dashboards

Track competitor websites, pricing, promotions, and marketing strategies to ensure we remain competitive

Provide actionable insights and recommendations for growth



Requirements

Proven experience managing Google Ads campaigns for e-commerce

Strong knowledge of SEO best practices (technical + on-page)

Experience with Shopify and/or WooCommerce platforms

Familiarity with Google Merchant Center and product feeds

Strong analytical skills and data-driven mindset

Experience with tools such as Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, or similar

Ability to manage multiple projects and websites simultaneously



Nice to Have

Experience with
 marketing platforms (e.g., Klaviyo)

Familiarity with conversion rate optimization (CRO) tools

Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS or site editing

Experience in multi-brand or agency environments



What We Offer

Opportunity to work across multiple growing e-commerce brands

Performance-driven environment with measurable impact

Flexible, remote-friendly work setup

Growth opportunities as the company scales



Success Metrics

Increase in ROAS and revenue from paid channels

Growth in organic traffic and keyword rankings

Improvement in conversion rates and cost efficiency

title: Experienced Sales Agents
description:
We are looking to hire permanent full-time Inside Sales Reps to work with our team. As an Inside Sales Rep, you will convert qualified opportunities into new B2B customers and grow existing accounts. This role is for confident sales professionals who can run a structured sales process, handle objections, and consistently close deals. The company sells well-known branded products and not services.



This is a B2B role serving a US customer base, so you will be working North American business hours. This is a home-based position. Candidates must have a quiet workspace, personal computer, stable high-speed internet (minimum 50 Mbps download/upload), and a noise-cancelling headset.



Key Responsibilities

• Close inbound and SDR-qualified opportunities via phone,
, fax

• Manage the sales pipeline end-to-end: follow-ups, proposals, and close

• Meet or exceed monthly/quarterly/annual sales targets

• Maintain accurate CRM records in CRM (notes, call logs, deal stages, next steps)

• Provide feedback on lead quality, objections, and market trends to improve strategy

• Perform other tasks as required by management



Qualifications

• University/college degree is required

• 1+ years experience in inside sales / closing, telemarketing, or appointment setting

• Strong negotiation and objection-handling skills with a proven ability to close

• Excellent English communication skills (spoken, written, comprehension)

• Professional, organized, and confident on the phone

• Self-motivated and able to work independently in a target-driven environment

• Comfortable using computers daily



Compensation

Base salary range is between 25,000 to 30,000 PHP per month (dependent on experience) + generous incentive program. Incentives are targeted at 40,000 PHP extra per month when agents hit minimum criteria, plus additional bonus for order size. Base pay is paid out bi-weekly, whereas bonuses are paid out monthly.



Schedule

Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST



How to Apply

Please submit your current CV and 20-second voice recording. If sending a shared link, please ensure that the link works prior to submission.

title: Entry-Level Outbound Callers
description:
Looking to hire two entry level Outbound Callers to our team. No sales experience necessary but you need to know how to speak well on the phone and be consistent! This is for a B2B North American contract and is a full-time PERMENANT position. You will be calling businesses, building relationships, qualifying leads, and handing off opportunities to the closing team.



This is a home-based position. Candidates must have a quiet workspace, personal computer, stable high-speed internet (minimum 20 Mbps download/upload), and a noise-cancelling headset.



Key Responsibilities

• Make high-volume (
) outbound calls (cold and warm outreach) to qualify decision makers

• Pre-qualify opportunities and set up next steps for the closing team

• Follow up with leads consistently via phone,
, fax

• Send marketing materials and maintain professional communication with prospects

• Maintain accurate notes, call logs, and pipeline updates in the CRM

• Perform other tasks as required by management



Qualifications

• University/college degree required

• Excellent English communication skills (spoken, written, comprehension)

• Confident phone presence with professional etiquette

• Organized, self-motivated, and able to hit activity and performance targets

• Comfortable using computers daily



Compensation

Base salary range is between 20,000 to 23,000 PHP per month (dependent on experience) + generous incentive program. Incentives are targeted at 10,000 PHP extra per month when agents hit minimum criteria, plus additional bonus for order size. Base pay is paid out bi-weekly, whereas bonuses are paid out monthly.



Schedule

Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST



How to Apply

Please submit your current CV and 20-second voice recording. If sending a shared link, please ensure that the link works prior to submission.

title: Live Sales Documentation Assistant (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented individual to help document our live sales. This role requires someone who can stay focused during live streams and accurately track product information in real time.



This is long-term, consistent work for someone who proves reliability, accuracy, and strong attention to detail.



Responsibilities



• Document the title of the listing and listing number

• Record the brand of the item

• Record who purchased the item (buyer username)

• Record the price the item sold at

• Capture a screenshot of the front of the frame

• Capture a screenshot of the side of the frame

• Accurately record all information in Google Sheets and double-check your work

• Stay in tune with the seller during the live and help support the flow of the show

• Assist virtually with tasks such as pinning listings, editing listings, and setting up giveaways correctly



Requirements



• Must be reliable and punctual

• Must be very detail-oriented

• Ability to stay focused during live sales

• Comfortable using Google Sheets

• Ability to double-check work for accuracy

• Ability to follow instructions and work independently



Compensation:



• $3 per hour

• Pay may increase based on reliability and performance



Schedule:



Friday, Saturday, Sunday

• 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM PST



Monday, Tuesday, Thursday

• 6:00 PM – 10:00 PM PST



• Strict hours with no breaks, as full focus during the live sale is required.



This role is ideal for someone looking for consistent long-term work who can maintain accuracy and attention to detail during live sales.



Application Trial



Applicants will be asked to complete a trial documentation task during a live sale to demonstrate attention to detail.



You will be asked to document items in Google Sheets using the following format:



Title of Listing: BRAND NEW SUNGLASSES/RX FRAMES #319

Brand: Marc Jacobs

Buyer: username123

Price Sold At: $25

Picture of Frame (Front): Screenshot showing the sunglasses and item number

Picture of Frame (Side): Screenshot showing the side/arm of the sunglasses



Important



• Screenshots must show the item clearly and include the item number

• The listing number changes after each auction, so accuracy is critical

• You must capture both the front and side of the frame



Applicants who demonstrate accuracy, reliability, and attention to detail during the trial will be considered for the position.

title: Autocad Architect
description:
We are an established, U.S.-based firm looking to add multiple Architects to our team asap to work full-time on a long-term project. This is a great opportunity for those who wish to elect their preferred work hours. 



Job Skills:

- You must possess knowledge and experience in AutoCAD or Revit

- Experience in point cloud data will be given preference

- Experience reading as-built drawings



Additional Preferred Job Skills:

- Experience with point cloud data is a plus

- Experience with .rcp files is a plus

- Possess a native-like fluency in the English language





Job Requirements:

- You must be able to work full-time from home. We will not accept any applications for freelance arrangements, part-time or weekend/flexible hours work.

- You must be reliable and be able to work in a fast paced environment.

Job Description:

You will retrace existing 3d point cloud models (.rcp) and provide us with as-built plans in Autocad/Revit. Training to perform this task is provided. 



If you are interested in this opportunity, please submit your resume and enter the following into the subject line: Reality Capture Augmentation Architect in the Philippines.

title: Compliance Officer (Home Care / Healthcare)
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a Compliance Officer to oversee regulatory compliance for a licensed home care agency in New York.



This role is focused on ensuring the company meets all NY DOH requirements, maintains accurate records, and stays audit-ready at all times.



Key Responsibilities:

Maintain and update policies and procedures



Handle audits, surveys, and Plan of Correction (POC) responses



Ensure employee files and credentials are fully compliant

Track and report compliance issues and implement corrective actions



Work with operations, HR, and scheduling to ensure ongoing compliance



Requirements:



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines



Strong written and verbal communication

title: Website creator for Accounting & Bookkeeping Business (Framer)

Help refine layout, messaging, and user flow

Assist in finalizing key sections before publishing

Provide guidance on best practices for service-based websites

Strong understanding of service-based or accounting/business websites

Good communication and able to collaborate on ideas

title: ActiveCampaign Specialist (Email Automation + Funnels)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven ActiveCampaign expert who can build, optimize, and maintain automated
 funnels for digital products, content drops, and membership offers.



You will help us deliver content to our audience faster, cleaner, and more intelligently—using segmentation, tagging, and automation logic.



?



Key Responsibilities



 Automation

 • Build and optimize automated nurture sequences for:

 • Certification guides

 • Prompt packs

 • Micro-learning videos

 • Subscription tiers (Starter Ninja, Pro Ninja)

 • Set up triggers, tags, and goals for behavior-based workflows.



Campaign Execution

 • Format and launch weekly newsletters, content drops, and product announcements.

 • Manage A/B tests (subject lines, CTAs, layouts).



Funnel Optimization

 • Integrate funnels with:

 • Shopify, Gumroad, Stan Store, SamCart (depending on your stack)

 • Website forms (Webflow / WordPress)

 • Lead magnets



Audience Management

 • Maintain clean lists, segment audiences by persona, certification level, and purchase behavior.

 • Create custom segments for high-intent buyers.



Analytics & Reporting

 • Track open rates, click-through rates, conversion rates.

 • Recommend optimizations based on data.



?



Required Skills

 • 2+ years of experience with ActiveCampaign (automations, tagging, conditional logic).

 • Strong understanding of
 deliverability, segmentation, and personalization.

 • Experience with funnels and digital product ecosystems.

 • Ability to write clean, high-impact
 copy (a plus).

 • Familiarity with AI/ML content is helpful but not required.

title: Sports Video Editor (ISO Sports Media)
description:
About ISO Sports Media



ISO Sports Media is a fast-growing sports content and media company specializing in athlete storytelling, AAU and high-school tournament coverage, and viral highlight reels. We collaborate with athletic organizations across the East Coast—including DC Metro, Orlando, and NYC Metro—to produce premium visuals for athletes, teams, and brands.



Position Overview



We’re seeking a Sports Video Editor who can turn raw game footage into exciting highlight reels, short-form social clips, and branded stories that capture the emotion and energy of competition.

The ideal candidate is creative, fast, and fluent with the latest video-editing tools and sports-content trends.



Key Responsibilities



Edit short-form and long-form videos from raw sports footage for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



Create high-impact highlight reels featuring players, teams, and events.



Add music, transitions, captions, and motion graphics that fit the ISO Sports Media brand.



Color-correct and audio-balance clips for consistent quality across all content.



Cut dynamic 9:16 social edits that hook viewers in the first 3 seconds.



Maintain organized project files, timelines, and exports for easy collaboration.



Stay up to date on sports content trends, AI editing tools, and viral transitions.

title: Remote Appointment Scheduler
description:
Who we are at StretchPlex:



We are a group of the best trainers, working daily to sharpen our skills and answer the call to those in need. Helping people suffering from pain, injuries, and disabilities to be more active, mobile, and all-around the best version of themselves...



More specifically, we are a wellness business with a special focus on helping people by providing assisted stretching and personal training, and we are the BEST at what we do! We’re headquartered in Delaware(on the east coast of US)  with 3 locations .



We have a quickly growing team of almost 20 rock stars, all committed to working hard to make sure our clients are successful. We’re looking for other highly motivated and driven people who want to grow and make an impact. Is that you?!



What we’re looking for:



We need a Remote Front Desk (or New Customer Appointment Scheduler)



This is a remote (work-from-home) position.



Front Desk Receptionists need to speak very clearly, convert warm leads into customers, go "off-script" when needed, handle objections, schedule customers in our software (Vagaro), and complete daily checklists and tasks.



This unique mix of right brain (client relationship building and management) and left brain (data analysis, daily checklists/tasks, and software management) skills makes front desk receptionists very special people. They are the lifeblood of our organization and we’re looking to find more wonderful tea
mbers who can help us grow!



Salary & growth opportunities:



Appointment Setter starts at $8/Hour along with bonuses for each converted lead

We have hundreds of leads per month with 70% conversion goals

You’ll work under a manager as you learn the trade

You’ll be assigned calls slowly as we begin to build your confidence

You’ll be graded on your client acquisition



Growth Opportunities:



Strong opportunity for growth for appointment setters who make calls outside working hours.

You’ll be graded on your client acquisition performance.

We actively promote from within. Successful appointment setters are rewarded!



The ideal candidate:



Great Talker: You need to talk in a way that gets people interested. Being clear and friendly helps to build trust and makes it easier to turn potential leads into customers. You need to know when to go "off script' to get the customer talking more about themselves.

Good Listener: You should be able to quickly identify what people are worried about. When you listen closely you can connect better with potential lead and get them saying "yes, that's me" or "yes, that happens to me too" in their head.

Never Give Up Attitude: Rejections are part of the game. You will get hung up on, yelled at, or even cursed at. You need to keep trying and not get discouraged. Staying positive even when things don't work out.

Ready to Learn: Things change. You should be always open to learning about new ways to improve yourself and your skills. Being adaptable ensures you can keep up with what customers need and how the organization is growing.



Make sure you’re comfortable with:



Remote working. This is a remote (work-from-home) position.

All job offers start with a 60-day trial to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Our Values:



Wow Service:  Our goal as an organization is to provide a level of therapy and service, unlike anything a customer has ever experienced. Care that is so great it makes them say “WOW”.

Unique, Creative, & Intentional: We encourage all of our employees to add their own personal touch, making it unique. We try to mix things up and constantly challenge each other and our customers.

Passion: We started our business to help people. We love helping people reach new goals and new potential. We are constantly bettering ourselves and our minds.

Create FUN and a little Weird: Our favorite value! And it is usually the one that catches everyone off guard. But we do not want a company that is BORING and DULL.



TO APPLY:



Visit this link to apply for the position:  



We will only be looking at applications from the link only.



Thank you for your consideration and best of luck on your job search!



Job Responsibilities:



- Make outbound sales calls to prospective patients to introduce our physical therapy services



- Schedule appointments for patients to meet with our coaches



- Use our CRM system to track and manage customer information and appointments



- Communicate with customers via phone and
 to confirm appointments and provide additional information



- Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and implement new sales strategies



- Meet and exceed weekly and monthly sales targets and goals



Job Requirements:



- Excellent verbal communication skills



- Must be available during New York City Hours



- High school diploma or equivalent required, college degree preferred



- 3+ years of experience in outbound sales, preferably in healthcare or related field



- Proficient in using customer relationship management (CRM) software Go High Level



- Ability to work independently and as part of a team



- Strong organizational and time management skills



- Ability to multitask and handle multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment



- Availability to work flexible hours, including evenings and weekends



- Passion for helping patients and promoting wellness services

title: LEVEL 3 VIDEO EDITOR
description:
MAXIMUM – Video Editor / Content Operator





YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE VIEWED UNLESS YOU ALSO SUBMIT VIA THIS LINK --> Apply here:

tally.so/r/7RobY6



Looking for LEVEL 3 + editors who want to be able to grow in this position and eventually help build a team under them. 

Cinematic. AI-driven. Performance-focused.



About MAXIMUM



MAXIMUM is a faith-driven video marketing and event production company.



We work with founders, thought leaders, and high-level entrepreneurs to create cinematic content and scale their message across all platforms.



We produce founder films, short documentaries, short-form content, podcasts, ads, and event after-movies, then turn it into a content engine across YouTube, Reels, TikTok, and more.



Our goal is simple: help powerful people reach more people.



The Level We Operate At



We don’t play small.



Our team has worked alongside stages, events, and productions featuring:



Patrick Bet-David, Tony Robbins, Jordan Peterson, Andrew Tate, Sam Ovens, Richard Branson, Elon Musk.



This is the environment you’re stepping into.



Read This First



This is not a beginner role.



If you:



rely on basic edits

don’t understand retention, pacing, and hooks

are not using AI in your workflow



this is not for you.



We are building a team of high-level creatives who want to become the best in the world.



The Role



We are hiring a Video Editor first, Content Operator second.



Your main focus:

High-performance short-form editing.



You should also be able to:



edit long-form content

create thumbnails

support posting and content organization

What We Mean by High-Level Editing



Not:



basic jump cuts

generic TikTok edits



Yes:



strong hook in first seconds

tight pacing and retention

intentional cuts, zooms, sound

storytelling and emotion

clean, modern, premium look

edits built to perform, not just look good

AI Requirement (Non-Negotiable)



You should already be using or experimenting with:



Runway

Sora

VEO / VEO3

AI-assisted editing workflows



If you are not integrating AI, you will fall behind.



Responsibilities



Editing:



short-form (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

long-form (YouTube, podcasts, interviews)

turning raw footage into engaging content



Creative:



hooks, pacing, retention

storytelling and ad-style edits



Thumbnails (bonus):



clean, clickable designs



Posting (bonus):



uploading and organizing content



Workflow:



clean files

fast revisions

organized systems

Who This Is For

editors who want to become elite

people who move fast

people who take ownership

people who actually care about their craft

Who This Is Not For

low-effort applicants

people who need constant direction

people not evolving

people just looking for a quick gig

Opportunity

remote

ongoing work

long-term growth

work with high-level people

real upside if you perform

Application (Read Carefully)



We do not review standard applications.



Apply here:





Inside the application you will be required to:



submit your best edits

show how you are using AI

record a short video introducing yourself



If you skip steps, you won’t be considered.



Final Note



Most people won’t complete this.



If you do, you’re already ahead.



We move fast.

If you stand out, we’ll reach out.

title: Media Buyer / Product Tester (Meta Ads) – Full Autonomy + Commission (E-commerce)
description:
We’re looking for a high-performance media buyer who can take full ownership of testing and scaling products.



This is not a typical role where you’re given products to run.



*Your role is to find winning offers, build simple landing pages, and scale them using Meta Ads.



 What You’ll Be Doing

 • Research and identify winning products/offers (TikTok, FB, competitors, trends, etc.)

 • Launch and manage Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

 • Build or edit landing pages inside Shopify (or PageFly)

 • Test multiple products weekly and quickly identify winners

 • Scale profitable campaigns aggressively once validated



* Requirements

 • Proven experience running Meta Ads for e-commerce

 • Strong understanding of product testing frameworks

 • Ability to identify winning products early

 • Experience building high-converting landing pages and using AI tools to test creatives and angles 

 • Data-driven mindset (CTR, CPA, ROAS, etc.)

 • Fast execution and ability to test volume





 What We Provide

 • Ad accounts with budget ready to spend

 • Shopify store + tools to build landing pages

 • Clear structure, but full autonomy to execute

 • Long-term opportunity with room to grow



Anything you need to make it work. Ask and it shall be given.





****Compensation****

 • Base salary 

 • Performance-based commission (More on this during call)



-The goal is simple:

Find winners > scale them > earn more.



-Ideal Candidate



Someone who:

 • Thinks like an owner, not just an employee

 • Wants freedom to test and move fast

 • Has confidence in their ability to find and scale winners





If you’ve already found and scaled winning products before, this will be a perfect fit.



To Apply



Please include:

	1.	Examples of products you’ve tested or scaled

	2.	Metrics (CPA, ROAS, spend levels)

	3.	Your approach to finding winning products

title: Video Editor – Short Form (Flexible Schedule)
description:
We’re Hiring Remote AI Video Clip Editors



We’re expanding our content team and looking for reliable Short-Form Video Editors to help process high volumes of short real estate content using AI-powered editing software.



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate company producing daily short-form video across multiple platforms.



This is a remote, flexible, task-based position.



If you’re comfortable working with AI tools and enjoy structured, repeatable workflows, this could be a strong fit.



What You’ll Do



• Use AI editing software to process short-form video clips

• Clean up, trim, and format videos for social platforms

• Apply simple style guidelines and formatting standards (provided)

• Upload and submit completed clips by deadline



No filming

No scripting

No content strategy required

This is execution-focused editing work.



Compensation



Pay is based on finished video length:



• $0.25 USD per finished minute

• 1-minute video = $0.25

• 3-minute video = $0.75

• 4-minute video = $1.00



Most videos are 1–3 minutes long.



• Paid per completed video

• Unlimited earning potential

• Consistent volume available



The more videos you complete accurately and on time, the more you earn.



Schedule



• Fully remote

• 100% flexible schedule

• No fixed hours

• No required shifts



This is output-based work, not hourly.



Ideal Candidate



This role is a strong fit if:



• You’re comfortable using AI tools (or can learn quickly)

• You prefer structured, process-driven tasks

• You’re detail-oriented and follow instructions closely

• You want flexible, independent work

• You’re consistent and dependable

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google & Meta Ads) – Remote (Philippines)
description:

This is a full-time remote role, aligned to New Zealand business hours.



?



The role



You’ll be responsible for setting up and managing paid media accounts from the ground up. This includes campaign structure, tracking, optimisation, and ongoing performance improvement.



You’ll work closely with our team to execute campaigns that are built properly from day one and continuously improved.



?



Working hours



This role is aligned to New Zealand time, with a later start to suit the Philippines.

 • Working hours: 12:00pm – 8:30pm NZT

 • Includes a 30-minute unpaid lunch break (8 hours total work time)

 • Daily overlap with NZ business hours is required

 • Finish time is fixed at 8:30pm NZT



?



What you’ll be doing

 • Setting up and managing Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts

 • Structuring campaigns for performance and scalability

 • Building and optimising Performance Max campaigns

 • Setting up conversion tracking across Google Ads, Meta and GA4 with our development team.

 • Troubleshooting tracking and attribution issues

 • Ongoing optimisation of campaigns to improve results

 • Working with our team to implement strategy and improvements



?



What we’re looking for

 • Proven experience running Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts

 • Strong understanding of account structure and performance strategy

 • Hands-on experience with Performance Max campaigns

 • Solid experience with tracking setup (Google Ads, GA4, GTM is a bonus)

 • Ability to diagnose and fix tracking issues

 • Detail-oriented and organised

 • Strong communication and reliability in a remote setup



?



Nice to have

 • Experience working with agencies

 • Experience with landing page optimisation or CRO

 • Familiarity with Looker Studio



?



What you’ll get

 • Full-time, stable remote role

 • Competitive salary based on experience

 • 13th month pay

 • Generous holiday allowance, including Philippine public holidays

 • Long-term role with a growing international team



?



How to apply



Please include:

 • A short summary of your experience

 • Examples of ad accounts or campaigns you’ve managed (what you did and results)

 • Explain when you would use a broad match, phrase match or exact match in what situations.

title: GoHighLevel Expert & Website Automation Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing medical wellness and functional medicine practice undergoing a full brand refresh and digital upgrade. We are looking for a highly skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) expert who can build, automate, and optimize our digital systems as we scale.

This is not a basic VA role. We need someone who truly understands GHL automations, AI workflows, website management, and CRM optimization.



What You Will Do



GoHighLevel (Core Responsibility)

Build and manage GHL automations, workflows, and pipelines

Set up AI automations (AI chat, AI follow-ups, AI booking assistants)

Create and optimize
, SMS, and WhatsApp campaigns

Automate lead capture ? booking ? follow-ups ? reviews

Set up reputation management, missed-call text back, and reactivation campaigns

Maintain clean CRM structure and tagging systems



Website & Funnel Management



Build and update websites and landing pages inside GoHighLevel

Optimize website for conversion, speed, and mobile responsiveness

Update content as part of rebranding efforts

Create booking funnels, forms, surveys, and intake workflows

Integrate calendars, payment links, and membership flows



Social & AI Automation

title: AIRBNB Operations Coordinator
description:
OODA MANAGEMENT - Operations Coordinator

Remote | Full-Time Contractor | $7-12/hour



............................................



WHO WE ARE



OODA Management is an AI-native short-term rental property management company based in San Diego, California. We manage a growing portfolio of Airbnb properties across Southern California and Lake Tahoe, and we are building the most operationally efficient property management company in the industry.



That is not a tagline. It is what we do every day. While most property management companies run on spreadsheets, group chats, and guesswork, we run on structured systems, AI-powered workflows, and a relentless commitment to doing things better than they were done yesterday. Our tech stack includes ClickUp for task management, custom-built automations for guest communication and maintenance coordination, and AI tools that remove busywork so our team can focus on high-value decisions.



We are a small, fast-moving team. That means you will not be a number. You will be a critical part of how this company operates, and your work will have a direct, visible impact on the business from your first week.



............................................



WHY YOU SHOULD WANT THIS JOB



You will actually learn a real business. Short-term rental management is a fast-growing industry, and you will develop expertise in property operations, vendor management, guest experience, and revenue optimization. These are transferable, high-value skills.



We invest in AI tools that make your job better, not harder. You will work with AI-powered systems that handle the repetitive parts of operations so you can focus on problem-solving, coordination, and communication. If you are someone who loves technology, this is a company that actually uses it.



Your ideas matter here. We do not want people who just follow instructions. We want people who see a broken process and say "I have a better way to do this." If you bring a process improvement to the table, we will implement it. If it works, you will be recognized for it.



Clear compensation growth with no guesswork. You start between $7-12/hour based on your proficiency, and your pay increases as you prove yourself. Once you hit the $12 cap, promotions into higher-level roles unlock additional compensation tiers. There is no ceiling for people who deliver.



You are joining early. We are scaling. The people who join now and help us build the operational foundation will be the people who lead departments, train new hires, and shape how this company runs as we grow. Early tea
mbers have disproportionate career upside.



............................................



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



You will be the person who keeps our properties running. When a guest reports a broken faucet, you coordinate the plumber. When a cleaning needs to be scheduled between back-to-back bookings, you make it happen. When a homeowner needs an update on a maintenance project, you provide it with clarity and professionalism.



Specifically:



- Coordinating maintenance requests with external vendors (plumbers, electricians, handymen, HVAC technicians) via phone calls, texts, and
s

- Scheduling and confirming cleaning turnovers between guest stays

- Prioritizing and triaging incoming tasks based on urgency and guest impact

- Managing all task documentation in ClickUp with detailed notes, timestamps, vendor communications, and outcomes

- Communicating with guests through Airbnb messaging to provide updates on maintenance and cleaning coordination

- Interfacing with property owners for approvals and status updates as needed

- Researching solutions for maintenance issues you have not encountered before (we expect resourcefulness, not perfection)

- Identifying recurring problems and suggesting systematic solutions or process improvements



............................................



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



*** EXCELLENT SPOKEN ENGLISH -- THIS IS OUR #1 REQUIREMENT ***



This is non-negotiable. You will be making phone calls to US-based vendors, texting with guests, and
ing homeowners. You need to be fluent, confident, and professional on the phone in English. Not conversational. Fluent. If a plumber in San Diego picks up the phone, you need to clearly explain the problem, confirm the appointment, and follow up -- all without miscommunication.



- Strong written English. Your ClickUp documentation, guest messages, and homeowner
s need to be clear, professional, and grammatically correct.



- Comfort making phone calls. This is a phone-heavy role. If you are not comfortable picking up the phone and calling a stranger to coordinate a repair, this is not the right fit. A significant portion of your day will involve live communication with vendors.



- Organized and detail-oriented. You will be managing multiple properties, multiple vendors, and multiple tasks simultaneously. Dropping a ball is not an option. We use ClickUp to stay organized, and we expect thorough documentation on every task.



- Tech-comfortable. You do not need to be a developer. But you need to be comfortable learning new software quickly, navigating ClickUp, using AI tools, and adapting to systems that are continuously improving. If you are the kind of person who gets excited about a new tool rather than frustrated by it, you will thrive here.



- Proactive and resourceful. We are a startup. Processes are still being built. If you encounter a problem that does not have a documented answer, we expect you to research it, propose a solution, and push the task forward rather than waiting for someone to tell you what to do.



- Genuinely interested in process improvement. If you notice that something could be done better, faster, or more efficiently, we want to hear about it. We actively reward tea
mbers who improve how we operate.



............................................



SCHEDULE



Monday through Saturday (one weekday off plus Sunday off)

Hours: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM Pacific Time



This schedule is required because you will be coordinating with California-based vendors, guests, and tea
mbers during their business hours. As the team grows, we will work toward getting you two consecutive days off.



............................................



COMPENSATION



Starting Rate ......... $7-12/hour (based on proficiency demonstrated during onboarding assessment)

Payment ............... Monthly in USD

Performance Reviews ... Monthly with your operations manager

Growth ................ Base rate grows up to $12/hour in this role. Promotions into senior or specialized positions raise this cap further.

Onboarding ............ Within your first 7 days, you complete structured training and an assessment. Your score determines your starting rate within the $7-12 range.



............................................



WHAT IT IS LIKE TO WORK HERE



We are direct. Feedback is frequent, honest, and constructive. We do not sugarcoat, and we do not expect you to be perfect. We expect you to be accountable, to learn fast, and to care about doing excellent work.



About 30-40% of new hires do not make it past the first month. Not because they make mistakes, but because they do not demonstrate the self-driven learning, systems thinking, and pace that this environment requires. If that sounds intimidating, this might not be the right fit. If that sounds motivating, keep reading.



The people who succeed here share a few traits: they are obsessed with getting better at their job, they treat every task like it matters (because it does), and they do not wait to be told what to do next. If that describes you, you will do well here -- and you will be rewarded for it.



............................................



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with your resume and a brief message about why this role interests you.



IMPORTANT -- READ THIS BEFORE APPLYING:



To confirm that you have read this entire job posting and understand what this role requires, you MUST include the following statement at the TOP of your application:



"I speak English verbally very proficiently. I am comfortable making phone calls. I love technology and process optimization, and I want to be part of the OODA family."



Applications without this statement will not be reviewed.

title: Website Management and SEO
description:
We are a fast-growing senior care company based in the United States, helping families find the right assisted living, memory care, and senior housing options. We’ve recently launched a new website and are looking for a detail-oriented Website Manager & SEO Content Specialist to take ownership of keeping it updated, optimized, and growing.



About the Role



You will be responsible for managing and improving our website built on Strapi (headless CMS). Your primary focus will be:



* Keeping content accurate and up to date

* Creating SEO-optimized content

* Improving rankings and organic traffic

* Ensuring a great user experience for families searching for senior care



Key Responsibilities:



Website Management



* Manage and update website content using Strapi CMS

* Add and update senior living community profiles (assisted living, memory care, etc.)

* Ensure all pages are accurate, well-formatted, and user-friendly

* Identify and fix broken links, outdated content, and inconsistencies



SEO & Content Creation



* Write and publish SEO-optimized blog posts and landing pages

* Conduct keyword research focused on senior care topics (e.g., assisted living, dementia care, cost of care)

* Optimize existing pages for improved rankings (on-page SEO)

* Create location-based content (city/state pages across the U.S.)

* Implement internal linking strategies



Content Strategy



* Build out helpful resources for families (guides, checklists, comparisons)

* Continuously improve content to match search intent

* Monitor competitors and identify opportunities



Performance Tracking



* Track rankings, traffic, and performance using tools like Google Analytics and Search Console

* Provide simple weekly or monthly reports

* Recommend improvements based on data



Qualifications



Required:



* Strong experience with SEO content writing

* Experience managing websites (CMS experience required; Strapi is a plus)

* Excellent written English (clear, natural, and professional tone)

* Understanding of on-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, headers, keyword usage)

* Highly detail-oriented and organized

* Able to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred:



* Experience with Strapi or other headless CMS platforms

* Experience in healthcare, senior living, or local SEO

* Familiarity with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, or SurferSEO

* Basic understanding of HTML (helpful but not required)

title: Tax Planning Lead
description:
Role Overview

A fast-growing, tax planning–specialized firm is looking for a Tax Planning Lead to join our U.S. team and play a key role in delivering high-level client support and technical guidance.



DiLucci CPA Firm has been serving business owners and real estate investors since 2005. For nearly two decades, we’ve built a reputation for doing tax differently—by going deeper than compliance, telling clients the truth, and using the tax code strategically to protect and grow their wealth. Our mission is simple: help clients keep more of what they earn while giving them clarity, confidence, and a long-term plan. We hold ourselves to a high bar: Genuine Care, Great Communication, Speed to Learning, and Fun Tax Energy. We believe tax planning should be proactive, not reactive—and that great service comes from expertise, communication, and genuine care.



As our Tax Planning Lead, you will primarily be responsible for answering client tax questions, supporting entity structuring decisions, and leveraging financial data to guide planning conversations. You will serve as a technical resource for both clients and the internal team, ensuring questions are answered accurately, financials are understood, and strategies are grounded in real-world application.



This role is ideal for someone with strong tax preparation experience who enjoys applying their knowledge in a more advisory, problem-solving capacity within a fast-paced, planning-focused firm.



Key Responsibilities



Client Advisory & Tax Support

-Answer client tax questions across a range of scenarios with clarity and confidence

-Provide guidance on tax implications, strategy execution, and planning considerations

-Support clients in delivering accurate and thoughtful recommendations



Tax Planning & Entity Structuring

-Advise on entity selection, structuring, and optimization strategies

-Evaluate client situations to identify planning opportunities and risks

-Ensure strategies are technically sound, compliant, and aligned with client goals

-Bookkeeping & Financial Understanding

-Review and understand client financials and bookkeeping to support planning accuracy

-Identify inconsistencies or opportunities based on financial data



Role Expectations

-Serve as a reliable technical resource for both clients and internal tea
mbers

-Provide accurate, timely responses to client inquiries

-Maintain a strong understanding of tax law and planning strategies

-Operate with a high level of ownership and accountability

-Contribute to maintaining a high standard of quality across all client work



Requirements:

-Minimum 5+ years of tax preparation experience

-Strong understanding of entity structuring and tax planning concepts

-Ability to interpret financials and understand bookkeeping at a functional level

-Strong communication skills with the ability to explain tax concepts clearly

-Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving abilities

-Ability to operate independently in a fast-paced environment



DiLucci CPA Core Values

Genuine Care – Trusted advisor relationships, not transactional work

Great Communication – Clear, proactive, and timely

Speed to Learning & Implementation – Adapt quickly as laws and strategies evolve

Fun Tax Energy (FTE) – We take pride in excellent tax work



Location and Hours: Remote, required US working hours (9AM CST-6PM CST)

Salary: $30,000–$50,000
