title: Senior Amazon Marketplace Operator — Full Account Management, Brand Authority  Walmart
description:
MontBlack Inc. is a U.S.-based digital distribution company. We partner with legacy and family-owned consumer brands and manage their full marketplace presence on Amazon and Walmart. We currently operate 6+ active brand accounts and are bringing our marketplace operations fully in-house.

We are looking for someone who has operated inside an Amazon agency or multi-brand environment — someone who has seen and solved every type of Amazon problem across multiple accounts simultaneously.

You are not here to learn marketplace basics. You are here to install a system that scales.

Your responsibility is to build and maintain the marketplace operating system that allows MontBlack to grow multiple brands simultaneously. Walmart follows Amazon’s core logic — if you own Amazon PPC end-to-end, you will own Walmart within 30 days.



What You Will Own

PPC & Advertising

? Build and manage Amazon SP, SB, and SD campaigns across all brand accounts

? Build and manage Walmart Sponsored Ads inside Seller Center — candidates with strong Amazon PPC fundamentals will adapt quickly as Walmart’s ad structure follows similar logic

? Create SOPs for campaign structure, keyword strategy, bid management, and launch sequencing

? Build standardized product launch frameworks (discovery ? ranking ? scaling)

? Weekly search term audits, negative keyword management, and budget pacing

? Monitor and optimize ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR across the full portfolio

? Diagnose conversion issues impacting ad performance and align PPC with listing quality

? Build standardized reporting across all brands

? Actively use AI tools for keyword research, campaign analysis, and workflow efficiency — this is a requirement, not a bonus



Catalog & Listing Integrity

? Resolve suppressed listings, stranded inventory, broken variations, and catalog errors

? Build and manage product variations using flat files

? Fix catalog structures, merge duplicate ASINs, and correct listing attribution

? Reclaim listings under incorrect brand names or third-party seller accounts

? Manage bulk listing updates across multiple accounts

? Build SOPs for flat files, variation creation, and catalog maintenance



Brand Registry & Brand Authority

? Enroll brands in Amazon Brand Registry, including brands with pending or no active trademarks

? Execute Brand Registry through IP Accelerator and alternative pathways

? Identify and resolve listings attributed to incorrect or outdated brand names

? Execute brand name correction requests through Seller Support and Brand Registry

? Transfer listing ownership and brand attribution to the correct entity

? Manage the full reclamation process — from case opening to confirmed ownership transfer

? Handle brand entity consolidation and brand name corrections

? Manage storefronts and A+ Content coordination

? Execute hijacker removal, unauthorized seller reporting, and IP complaint filing

? Maintain a portfolio-level tracker for trademark status, Brand Registry, and protection



Walmart Operations

? Set up and manage Walmart Seller Center accounts for new brands

? Handle item setup, content score optimization, and catalog management

? Run and optimize Walmart Sponsored Products campaigns — if you own Amazon PPC, you will own this within 30 days

? Resolve Walmart-specific listing and catalog issues

? Build SOPs for Walmart onboarding and account management



What the First 90 Days Look Like

Days 1–30

? Full audit of all brand accounts (PPC, catalog, Brand Registry, hijackers, Walmart gaps)

? Deliver a written assessment with prioritized actions

Days 31–60

? Resolve suppressed listings

? Brand Registry enrolled or in progress for all brands

? PPC structures rebuilt or validated

? Walmart onboarding and advertising initiated

Days 61–90

? Full SOP library completed (PPC, catalog, onboarding, brand protection)

? Reporting system implemented

? Train at least one junior tea
mber on a core workflow



Performance Metrics

Performance will be evaluated based on:

? TACoS improvement across brands

? Speed of resolving suppressed listings and catalog issues

? Brand Registry enrollment completion rate

? Successful SOP system installation and team adoption



You Are the Right Fit If

? You have 4+ years in Amazon marketplace operations (agency or multi-account environment)

? You have managed multiple accounts simultaneously (8+ preferred)

? You have enrolled brands in Brand Registry, including without active trademarks

? You understand IP Accelerator and alternative enrollment pathways

? You have reclaimed listings and handled complex case escalations

? You have executed brand name corrections and listing ownership transfers

? You have basic Walmart Seller Center experience or have actively used it — deep Amazon mastery is the priority, but you must be willing to own Walmart fully within 30 days

? You have handled hijacker removal and IP complaints

? You are advanced with flat files, variations, and catalog fixes

? You actively use AI tools in your daily workflow — not occasionally, but as a core part of how you operate

? You have built SOPs and operational systems

? You think like an operator, not a task executor



Requirements

? Stable internet and professional home office

? Partial overlap with U.S. Eastern or Central time zones

? Available to start within 2–3 weeks

? Work samples required (SOP, flat file, campaign structure, or case outcome)



What We Offer

? $1,200 – $1,600/month based on experience

? Performance bonuses tied to portfolio growth and system delivery — top performers have a clear path to $2,000+/month as MontBlack scales

? Direct access to leadership — no micromanagement

? Remote, flexible work

? Clear growth path as MontBlack scales to 20+ brands

? A role built on operational discipline and systems ownership — if you take pride in running a clean, tight operation across multiple brands, this is the right environment



How to Apply

Use your favorite season as the subject line and include:

? Number of Amazon accounts managed simultaneously (and context: agency, in-house, freelance)

? One Brand Registry or listing reclamation case (problem + outcome)

? Experience with brands without active trademarks

? One example of a brand name correction or listing ownership transfer you executed

? Walmart Seller Center experience — if limited, explain how you would own it within 30 days

? Best ACoS or TACoS result (include spend and category)

? AI tools you use daily and how they improve your workflow

? Tools used daily (PPC, catalog, keyword research)

? Computer setup and number of monitors



Technical Question (Required)

Describe the difference between:

? Auto campaign keyword discovery

? Phrase match expansion

? Exact match scaling

And explain how you d
 when to move a keyword between them.



Upload Required

? Resume / CV (PDF)

? Internet speed screenshot

? One SOP, flat file template, or process document you created



Voice Recording (20–30 seconds)

Answer this out loud:

“A brand we represent has no registered trademark yet, their listings are attributed to the wrong brand name, a third-party seller has taken over their main ASIN, and the brand name on the listing belongs to a different entity we need to reclaim. Walk me through how you would approach fixing all of this.”

End your recording with:

“MontBlack protects legacy.”



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Support Representative
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, quick-thinking Customer Support Representative. At our company, support goes beyond answering questions. It’s about guiding customers seamlessly through their gaming experience and ensuring every interaction is fast, clear, and dependable.



We’re seeking someone who takes pride in delivering exceptional service, thrives in a high-paced environment, and enjoys solving problems in real time. If you’re proactive, detail-oriented, and genuinely driven to help customers succeed, you could be a great fit for our team.



Key Responsibilities

1. Manage Intercom Live Chat, responding promptly to live chat,
, and occasional social media inquiries.

2. Troubleshoot unique scenarios and edge cases using logic, judgment, and customer-first thinking — not scripts.

3. Proactively update customers on order status by coordinating with our internal team and third-party suppliers.

4. Communicate clearly, professionally, and naturally, no robotic replies or over-reliance on AI.

5. Identify opportunities to streamline the support experience and improve internal systems and workflows.

6. Collaborate closely with tea
mbers and suppliers to ensure smooth delivery from start to finish.

7. Handle multiple tasks with urgency, accuracy, and strong attention to detail in a high-volume environment.



Ideal Candidate:

- Passionate about helping others: You have a natural desire to solve problems and help customers succeed in their goals.

- Excellent communicator: Your communication skills are top-notch, whether it’s written, via
 or live chat.

- Adaptable: You thrive in a fast-paced environment and are quick to learn new systems and technologies.

- Detail oriented: You pay attention and notice issues before customers even point them out.



Required Experience

- Experience with Intercom (highly preferred) or similar customer support platforms such as Zendesk or Freshdesk

- Previous customer support experience (live chat)

- Reliable high-speed internet

- Ability to work remotely with minimal distractions

- Load-shedding readiness (backup power, mobile hotspot, or contingency plan in place)



Training will be provided for Intercom if you haven’t used it before.



Why Work With Us?

- Be part of something bigger: Join a team that’s on a mission to revolutionize the video gaming space, with practical, results-driven strategies and a global community of passionate players and creators.

- Dynamic team: Work with a passionate and growing team that is committed to excellence and innovation.

- Consistent workflow: Enjoy a structured work environment with clear expectations, steady tasks, and room to grow.

- Growth and learning: Professionally develop and grow skills with ongoing learning and advancements of responsibilities within the company.



YOU SHOULDN’T APPLY IF:

- You’re comfortable blending in rather than striving to stand out. This role is NOT simple and requires an all-in mentality. We’re looking for an applicant who will put in the work that others won’t

- You are married to your ideas or cannot take creative criticism.

- You can’t handle stress or pressure.



Think you’re a fit? Apply Today. Include the word ‘CACTUS’ in your message to us to show you’ve read the full post.

title: Experienced Bookkeeper (4+ years experience in full cycle role)
description:
We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper who excels in QuickBooks Online and is focused on providing high-level customer service. Sage 300 or Xero experience is an asset, but not required. The ideal candidate will be resourceful, with at least four years of experience managing multiple clients on QuickBooks Online. You’ll be part of a growing team where your expertise will help ensure smooth, accurate financial processes while delivering top-notch service to our clients. This role requires a blend of technical accounting skills, great communication, and the ability to take initiative when needed.



Key Responsibilities:



Bookkeeping: Handle data entry, reconciliations, and financial reporting using QuickBooks Online for multiple clients.

Client Management: Ensure excellent communication with clients, answering questions and addressing any concerns they may have about their financial records.

Resourcefulness: Demonstrate the ability to troubleshoot issues and research solutions independently when needed.

Financial Record Maintenance: Maintain accurate and organized financial records for all clients.



What We’re Looking For:



Experience: At least 4 years of experience managing multiple clients using QuickBooks Online.

Software Proficiency: Strong experience with QuickBooks Online.

Customer Service: A strong focus on providing high-level customer service and a proactive approach to client communication.

Resourcefulness: Ability to think critically and perform research when unsure about next steps or issues.

Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy in maintaining financial records and completing reconciliations.

Strong English Skills: Proficiency in reading, writing, and speaking English is required to communicate clearly with clients.



About You:



You are a highly organized, responsible, and customer-focused bookkeeper with at least 4 years of experience managing multiple clients on QuickBooks Online. You thrive in a fast-paced environment, are self-motivated, and take initiative when faced with challenges. You have a strong commitment to delivering excellent customer service while maintaining the highest level of accuracy in your work.



Application Requirements:



This position starts at 9 am Pacific Standard Time. Please note this time.



When applying, please include answers to the following questions:



Do you have at least 4 years of experience managing multiple clients using QuickBooks Online? Yes or No

Do you have experience with Canadian or US sales tax filing? Yes or No

Do you have experience with Canadian or US payroll? Yes or No

Do you consider yourself resourceful and able to research if you are unsure about how to proceed? Yes or No

Are you comfortable reading, writing, and speaking English? Yes or No



The ideal candidate will be able to work independently, prioritize tasks based on deadlines, and be a great team player.



Position is 40 hours per week.



Compensation based on experience.

title: SaaS User Onboarding Support
description:
eventPERCH (
) is a new Software as a Service (SaaS) event management company that we launched in 2025! We are a small team that is eager to grow. Our primary audience is wedding and event industry professionals who use our software to build Timelines, Budgets, and Payment Schedules to manage multi-event projects and interact with Clients and Vendors.



We need help onboarding our new users to the platform. We would like to offer our new users a service where we will help them migrate from their existing systems to eventPERCH.



We will collect the users' existing data (Vendor Accounts, Client Accounts, Timelines, and Budgets) and share it with you. Your job will be to enter the information into eventPERCH, matching the users' information as closely as possible. We will then audit the information you entered and let the user double-check the work before going live.



We are a new company, and this role could grow into a full-time position and increased pay based on performance. We would start by offering the service to a few users to see how it goes, and if it works well, then we will offer it on the website as one of our key features.



We are looking for someone who has English proficiency, is great at systematic tasks, will take training to understand how to use our software, is great at reading and understanding user data (PDFs, Excel, Word, etc.), and is able to enter large amounts of data in different formats into our software with accuracy.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Remote Paralegal
description:
The Mission: New York Family Law Group exists because families belong in the living room, not the courtroom. We are a dynamic and rapidly growing firm handling complex divorce and custody cases. We don't need a paper-pusher; we need a strategic partner who protects the attorneys' time and manages the chaos of litigation with a "No Drama" attitude.





Your Impact (Responsibilities):

- Case Ownership: You don't just "do tasks." You manage the file from intake to billing, ensuring 90% of tasks are completed by the due date.

- Drafting & Discovery: You will draft motions, pleadings, and manage discovery with a sickening degree of attention to detail.

- Client Management: You are the first line of defense. You handle emotional clients with empathy but firm boundaries, ensuring they feel heard without derailing the legal team.

- Billable Excellence: You will accurately capture 360 hours per quarter of billable time





The "Must-Haves" (Non-Negotiable):

- Remote Readiness: You must have a verified backup power source (generator/battery) and a redundant internet connection (Fiber + 5G backup).

- Prior customer service experience required.

- Bachelor's Degree

- Spanish-speaking is an asset

- Ability to work Monday through Friday, 9 am-5:30 pm Eastern Standard Time.





How to Apply: To ensure you are the detail-oriented person we need, do NOT just send a resume; instead, do this:

-
 your Resume, Cover Letter, and a 3-minute video introduction to 



- Subject Line: "Paralegal Submission – [Your Name in All Caps]".



- In the body of the
, answer the 4 Screening Questions listed below:



1. Scenario: You need to update an attorney who is currently in court and checking
s on their watch. They do not have time to scroll.

Task: Rewrite the paragraph below into: A) A clear Subject Line. B) A one-sentence summary.

Original Text: 'I was calling the court all morning and finally got through to the clerk, who said that the Judge is out sick today, so the motion that was supposed to be heard at 2:00 PM is actually going to be rescheduled for next Tuesday at 10:00 AM.'



2. You are working remotely. Clio crashes, and you lose internet power simultaneously. You have a deadline in 1 hour. List the exact 3 steps you take to solve this.



3. Describe a time a supervisor gave you negative feedback that you felt was unfair. How did you respond in the 
nt, and what was the outcome?



4. What is your monthly Salary expectation?

title: SEO & Content Strategist
description:
As an SEO & Content Strategist at Naveera, you'll own the strategy and execution that drives organic growth and qualified pipeline. You'll build content that ranks, converts, and scales our search presence while working closely with product, sales, and customer teams to translate insights into compelling narratives that attract and convert our ideal customers.

Responsibilities



Own the SEO + content strategy that grows qualified organic traffic and turns it into pipeline

Build and maintain a content roadmap (topic clusters, briefs, publishing cadence) aligned with product and GTM priorities

Create and optimize high-intent pages (landing pages, use cases, comparisons) that convert

Improve on-page SEO and site structure (information architecture, internal linking, metadata, content refresh cycles)

Partner with product, sales, and customer teams to translate insights into search-led narratives

Track performance and iterate using SEO + conversion metrics (rankings, traffic quality, leads, activation)

Required Qualifications



3–7 years experience owning B2B SaaS SEO and content strategy (not only blog writing)

Strong execution across the loop: research ? strategy ? briefs ? publish ? optimize ? measure

Practical knowledge of technical/on-page SEO (crawl/index basics, internal linking, page templates, schema familiarity)

Proven ability to write or direct conversion-focused content with a consistent brand voice

Strong analytical mindset and comfort using data to prioritize and improve outcomes

Preferred Qualifications



Experience in fleet, telematics, transportation, logistics, IoT, or regulated B2B software

Demonstrated ability building organic growth from a low baseline and scaling topic authority over time

Experience managing freelance writers/agency and setting editorial + SEO QA standards

Familiarity with hybrid funnels and content that supports both education and revenue

Soft Skills



Clear communicator who can align stakeholders and move work through approvals efficiently

High ownership and follow-through; ships consistently and improves the system over time

Strong editorial judgment and disciplined prioritization under changing requirements

title: Digital Artist (Illustrator/Photoshop) – Pop Culture Style | Long-Term Work
description:
We’re looking for a talented and reliable digital artist to join our team long-term.



Our brand creates highly detailed enamel pins, stickers, and merchandise inspired by video games, trading cards, and pop culture. We need someone who can closely match existing styles and deliver clean, production-ready files.



Responsibilities:

 • Create detailed digital illustrations for enamel pins and stickers

 • Redraw and mimic pop culture characters accurately (proportions, style, linework)

 • Design backing cards, banners, and other print materials

 • Prepare print-ready files (correct sizing, bleed, color profiles, etc.)

 • Organize and deliver clean, layered source files



Requirements:

 • Strong experience with Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

 • Must understand Pantone colors (very important for pin production)

 • Experience creating files for print (stickers, packaging, banners, etc.)

 • Ability to closely match existing art styles

 • High attention to detail and consistency

 • Good communication and ability to meet deadlines



Nice to Have:

 • Experience with enamel pin design

 • Packaging or backing card design experience

 • Interest in video games, anime, or trading card art styles



Position Details:

 • Remote (work from home)

 • Project-based to start, with opportunity for long-term work

 • Flexible hours, but must meet deadlines



To Apply:

Please include:

 1. Portfolio (must include similar style work or character redraws)

 2. Your favorite project you’ve worked on

 3. Your rate (per project or hourly)

 4. Write “PIN PRO” at the top of your application so we know you read this



About Us:

Pin Plugged has over 8 years of experience creating detailed, collectible enamel pins rooted in pop culture and gaming nostalgia. We focus on quality, originality, and building a strong community around our drops.

title: Client Success Bookkeeper – Remote | QuickBooks Online
description:
Are you someone who genuinely loves working with clients, keeping things organized, and making people feel like their business is in great hands? Do you happen to also be really good at bookkeeping? This might be the role for you.

We're a growing virtual bookkeeping firm looking for Bookkeepers to join our remote team. This isn't your typical heads-down bookkeeping role — our clients hear from us, trust us, and rely on us to keep their financials accurate and their questions answered. You'll be the person they count on.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing the day-to-day bookkeeping for a portfolio of clients using QuickBooks Online — data entry, reconciliations, and financial reporting

Being a go-to point of contact for your clients: answering questions, explaining their financials in plain language, and proactively flagging anything they should know

Keeping client records accurate, organized, and deadline-ready

Troubleshooting issues independently and researching solutions before escalating — you figure things out

Collaborating with a supportive remote team that takes its work seriously



What We're Looking For



At least 2 years managing multiple clients in QuickBooks Online — this is required

A genuinely client-first mindset: you communicate clearly, follow through, and make clients feel taken care of

Strong written and spoken English — you'll be communicating with clients regularly

Self-starter energy: you manage your own time, prioritize based on deadlines, and don't need hand-holding

High attention to detail and a commitment to accuracy

Experience with Canadian or US sales tax and/or payroll is a bonus



About the Role



100% remote, full-time (40 hours/week)

Start time: 9:00 AM Pacific Time — please note this before applying

Compensation based on experience



About Us

We're a virtual bookkeeping firm that prides itself on doing great work and treating clients like people, not ticket numbers. Our team is skilled, collaborative, and growing — and we want people who want to grow with us.



To Apply

Please include a short note on why this role appeals to you, along with your answers to the following:



Do you have at least 4 years of experience managing multiple clients in QuickBooks Online? (Yes / No)

Do you have experience with Canadian or US sales tax filing? (Yes / No)

Do you have experience with Canadian or US payroll? (Yes / No)

Are you comfortable researching and troubleshooting issues independently? (Yes / No)

Are you comfortable communicating with clients in English — written and verbal? (Yes / No)

title: Technical Content Lead
description:
About the Role



As a Technical Content Lead at Naveera, you'll own all product education and technical content across the customer lifecycle. You'll transform complex technical concepts into clear, actionable content that helps customers and partners understand and adopt Naveera's platform. From video tutorials and documentation to blog posts and marketing copy, you'll ensure our content is accurate, accessible, and aligned with our brand voice.

Responsibilities



Own Naveera's product education content (video scripts, tutorials, demos) across the customer lifecycle

Own written content: blogs, landing-page copy, customer-facing guides, and release/feature communication

Own technical documentation standards and clarity (e.g., OBD PID docs, integration docs) in a way that's usable by customers and partners

Support marketing with positioning-aligned content (campaign messaging, case studies, sales enablement materials)

Maintain an editorial system: content calendar, feedback loops with product/engineering, and continuous updates as the product evolves

Required Qualifications



Proven experience producing B2B SaaS content that explains complex products clearly (writing + instructional content)

Strong ability to turn SME input into clear, structured documentation and customer-friendly education

Demonstrated video scripting / on-camera coaching or training-style content creation (even if they aren't the final editor)

Comfortable collaborating with product/engineering and working inside fast-moving release cycles

Can draft legal-adjacent docs (Terms/Policies) with the expectation of final legal review

Preferred Qualifications



Experience in fleet, telematics, IoT, transportation, logistics, or regulated SaaS

Familiarity with technical concepts like APIs, event-driven systems, device data/diagnostics (enough to document accurately)

SEO + distribution experience (content that ranks + converts, not just "writes well")

Experience building a consistent brand voice across product, docs, and marketing

Soft Skills



Extremely clear communicator; can align stakeholders and drive approvals without drama

Proactive, self-directed, and systems-minded (creates repeatable processes, not one-off content)

title: AI Ad Creative Specialist (Higgsfieldsfield / Nano Banana) – High-End E-commerce Brand
description:
We are SAVA – a fast-growing international jewelry brand focused on timeless, minimalistic design for modern men.



We are looking for a highly skilled *AI Creative Editor* who can create *realistic, high-converting visuals* using *Higgsfield and Nano Banana Pro*.



This is not a beginner role. We are only looking for someone who is already experienced and can prove it.



---



What you will do:

• Create high-quality AI-generated images for ads and content

• Recreate our products *exactly as shown on our website* (no deviations)

• Work with references and match:

  * Product size, shape, thickness, and details

  * Materials (gold/silver finishes must be accurate)

• Generate realistic models and scenes (no “AI look”)

• Produce ad creatives that feel premium, clean, and on-brand

• Iterate fast and improve based on feedback



---



Requirements:

• Strong experience with *Higgsfield and/or Nano Banana*

• Proven track record (you MUST show previous work)

• Ability to create *ultra-realistic outputs* (models, lighting, textures)

• High attention to detail (this is critical)

• Understanding of e-commerce / ad creatives is a big plus

• Good communication and ability to follow creative direction



---



Important:

Our products must look *100% identical* to the real ones on our website.

If the size, shape, or details are off, the work will not be accepted.



We care about:

• Realism

• Accuracy

• Clean, premium aesthetics



---



To apply:

Please send:

1. Your best AI-generated work (MANDATORY)

2. Examples where you recreated a real product

3. The tools you use (Higgsfield, Nano Banana, others)

4. A short explanation of your workflow



Applications without a strong portfolio will not be considered.

title: Senior Facebook / META Media Buyer – High Spend E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a senior-level META 
 & Instagram) Media Buyer to manage and scale ads for established e-commerce brands in jewelry and eyewear.



This is NOT an entry-level role. We are only interested in experienced media buyers who have managed large ad accounts and understand scaling, structure, and performance at a high level.



What you’ll be responsible for



* Managing and optimizing META ad accounts

* Scaling campaigns profitably at high spend

* Analyzing performance and making data-driven decisions

* Structuring campaigns, testing frameworks, and budgets

* Giving clear guidance to our creative team on what to iterate, recreate, or stop

* Improving reporting, insights, and overall account performance



Hard requirements (read carefully)



Please only apply if ALL of the following are true:



* You have managed META ad accounts with daily ad spend of €20,000+

* You have managed €10,000,000+ in total lifetime ad spend

* You have hands-on experience scaling e-commerce brands

* You are confident analyzing data and explaining your decisions

Applications without proof will be ignored.



What we offer

* Room to grow into a lead role



If you are truly senior-level and want to work on high-spend e-commerce accounts, we’d like to hear from you.

title: UGC Manager / Content Operations Manager
description:
We are now looking for a UGC Manager who can fully own and structure the entire UGC process for a fashion brand.



Role overview:



This is a hands-on, operational role.



You will be responsible for managing the complete UGC workflow, from sourcing creators to delivering ad-ready content.

This role is not about creating content yourself, but about managing people, systems, timelines, and quality.



You will be the central person responsible for everything related to UGC.



---



Key responsibilities



UGC & creator management



* Source and outreach to UGC creators that fit the SAVA brand

* Communicate with creators professionally and clearly

* Negotiate pricing, deliverables, and timelines

* Brief creators so they know exactly what content to create

* Ensure creators understand our brand, style, and expectations

* Manage deadlines, follow-ups, and delivery

* Request revisions when needed and ensure quality standards

* Make sure all content is delivered correctly (raw + edited files)



Operations, structure & tracking



* Track all creators, content, and statuses in Notion

* Keep workflows structured and up to date

* Organize and label all files properly in Google Drive

* Ensure nothing is missed or forgotten

* Maintain a clear overview of ongoing and completed projects

* Track which creators perform well and which don’t



Notion & systems optimization



* Build and optimize Notion databases for creators, content, deadlines, and performance tracking

* Improve workflows and internal structure over time

* Create clarity, efficiency, and scalability



---



Who this role is for



* You are highly organized and detail-oriented

* You enjoy working with systems, checklists, and structure

* You are comfortable managing people and following up

* You communicate clearly and professionally in English

* You are proactive and take ownership

* You like bringing order to complex workflows



---



Who this role is not for



* Creators or influencers

* People who mainly want to make content themselves

* People who dislike structure, tracking, or follow-ups

* People who need constant supervision



---



Required skills & tools



* Strong experience with Notion

* Google Drive and Google Sheets

* Excellent written English

* Project coordination / operations mindset

* Comfortable with deadlines, reminders, and revisions



---



Availability & compensation



* 20 to 40 hours per week

* Fully remote

* Long-term position

* Competitive monthly salary based on experience



---



Application instructions

When applying, please answer the following questions:



1. Have you worked with influencers or UGC creators before?

2. How do you normally track tasks, deadlines, and assets?

3. Which tools do you use daily? (Notion, Sheets, Drive, etc.)

title: Operations & Scheduling Assistant
description:
## About Us



We are a real estate development company based in Canada. Our team of 15+ operates across architecture, engineering, procurement, and construction. We use Slack, ClickUp, Google Workspace, Zoom, Connecteam, and OpenPhone daily.



We need someone to handle scheduling, platform management, and administrative support so our operations team can focus on higher-level coordination. This is a support role — you respond to requests quickly and keep the day-to-day machinery running smoothly.



---



## What Your Day Actually Looks Like



**Start of shift:**

- Check Slack for any scheduling requests that came in while you were offline. Process them immediately — send Zoom invites, confirm times, update Google Calendar.

- Check OpenPhone for any voi
s or missed calls. Take notes on who called, what they need, route to the right person.



**Throughout the day:**

- Scheduling: When the CEO, VP Construction, or Operations Manager asks you to set up a meeting, the Zoom/Google Meet invite goes out within 10 minutes. You confirm all parties have accepted. If there's a conflict, you flag it and propose alternatives.

- Platform access: When someone new joins the team, you add them to Slack, ClickUp, Connecteam, Google Workspace, and any project-specific channels. When someone leaves, you remove them. You maintain a checklist for each.

- Document filing: When someone produces a report, drawing, estimate, or contract, you ensure it's saved in the correct Google Drive folder. You don't create these documents — you organize them.

- OpenPhone monitoring: Inbound calls to the company line get answered or returned within 30 minutes. You take a message, get the caller's name and number, and route to the right person. You don't need to answer technical questions — just capture the inquiry and pass it along.

- Meeting support: When a meeting is scheduled, you ensure the Zoom link works, the right people are invited, and the calendar event has the correct time zone. After the meeting, if notes are shared, you file them.



**End of shift:**

- Brief status message: meetings scheduled today, documents filed, calls handled, any pending items for tomorrow.



---



## What You're NOT Doing



- You are NOT managing projects, making decisions, or coordinating work. You support the people who do.

- You are NOT calling clients or leads. If a client calls in, you take a message and route it.

- You are NOT doing payroll, HR tasks, or financial work. That's a separate tea
mber.

- You are NOT expected to understand construction or architecture. You're managing platforms and schedules.



---



## What We Need From You



**Must have:**

- Fast response time. When a request comes in, you act within 10-15 minutes. Not 30. Not "after lunch." This is the single most important quality.

- Comfortable with multiple software platforms simultaneously — Slack, Zoom, Google Workspace (Calendar, Drive, Meet), ClickUp. You can learn new platforms quickly.

- Basic English — enough to take a phone message accurately and send a clear scheduling
. You don't need to have business conversations or write proposals.

- Organized. You can track 10 scheduling requests, 5 pending document filings, and 3 platform access tasks at the same time without losing any.

- Reliable attendance. This role requires you to be online during your committed hours consistently. If you're offline, scheduling breaks.



**Nice to have:**

- Experience as a virtual assistant or executive assistant

- Experience with OpenPhone or similar business phone system

- Experience with Connecteam or similar time-tracking platform



---



## Screening Questions



Please answer all 4 questions in your application.



1. **Speed test:** Right now, how quickly could you set up a Zoo
eting for 3 people at 10 AM tomorrow, send the calendar invites, and confirm via Slack? Walk me through your process step by step. How many minutes would this take you?



2. **Prioritization:** You receive 4 tasks in the same 10-minute window: (a) Schedule a Zoom call for the CEO in 30 minutes, (b) File a construction drawing in Google Drive, (c) A voi
 came in from a planning department asking for a callback, (d) Add a new tea
mber to 5 platforms. What order do you do them in and why?



3. **Routing:** Someone calls the company line and says "I need to talk to someone about the building on Richard Street." You don't know anything about this project. What do you say, what information do you collect, and what do you do after the call?



4. **Reliability:** In your last role, what was your average response time to requests from your manager? How did you ensure nothing got missed when multiple tasks came in at once?



---



## 30-Day Proof Point



By day 30, we will know this is working if:

- Every meeting request is processed within 15 minutes of receipt

- Nicole (Operations Manager) reports she is no longer handling Zoom setup, calendar invites, or platform access tasks

- All inbound OpenPhone calls are captured and routed within 30 minutes

- Documents are filed in the correct Google Drive locations consistently

- Zero scheduling conflicts caused by missed invites or wrong time zones



---



## How to Apply



Reply to this posting with your answers to all 4 screening questions and your resume. Include the word "SUPPORT" in your subject line so we know you read the full posting.

title: Brand & Web Designer
description:
We're a Miami-based digital marketing agency specializing in med spas, barbershops, and premium service brands. We don't do cookie-cutter. Our clients expect design that stops the scroll, earns trust, and converts. We're looking for a designer who actually loves design — someone who loses track of time in Figma and gets personally offended by bad kerning.



What you'll own

Full website designs in Figma — desktop + mobile, from first wireframe to final handoff spec

Brand identities: logos, color systems, typography, voice — delivered as a complete brand book

Social media content creation and brand management across IG,
, and TikTok

Ad creative: static and video-ready assets following direct-response principles

Landing page designs for paid campaigns (med spa offers, GLP-1 clinics, barbershops, events)

Client brand books and style guides built to agency standard

Presentation decks, menus, print collateral as needed





You must have

Figma — not just familiar, genuinely fluent. Auto-layout, components, prototyping, dev handoff, the works

Logo and brand identity design from scratch (not just editing templates)

Full website design — multi-page, mobile-first, conversion-focused

Social media content design with a track record of brand consistency

A portfolio that proves all of the above — real clients, real results, no student projects





No portfolio = no response. This is non-negotiable.



Industry experience we want to see

Med spa, aesthetics, wellness, or health brands — understanding of luxury, trust, and clinical tone

Hospitality, nightlife, or event brands — high-energy, premium, Miami-forward aesthetic

Service businesses (salons, barbershops, spas) — approachable but elevated





What we're really looking for

A genuine love of design — you're doing personal projects even when nobody's paying you

Modern, clean, sleek aesthetic sensibility — you know what's trending but you don't chase trends blindly

Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality

Self-directed — you don't need a manager standing over you to produce great work

Receptive to feedback and direction without ego

Available for real-time communication via Slack/WhatsApp during working hours





Tools

Figma (required — primary tool for all web design)

Adobe Illustrator or equivalent for logo/vector work

Adobe Photoshop or equivalent for photo editing and compositing

CapCut, Premiere, or similar for Reels/TikTok editing (a plus, not a dealbreaker)

Canva fluency is fine for social, but not a substitute for Figma on web and branding

Wordpress / Elementor

Webflow





Compensation

$5 – $8 / hour

Rate based on portfolio quality and demonstrated experience. Strong candidates will be compensated at the top of range. Hours will grow with performance. Path to full-time retainer for the right person.



How to apply

Send your portfolio link, a brief intro (3–5 sentences — what you design, who you've designed for, what you're best at), and your hourly rate expectation to 
 line: Designer Application – [Your Name]



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Client Engagement Coordinator
description:
## About Us



We are a real estate development company based in Canada. We design, permit, and build multi-unit residential buildings. Our team of 15+ works across architecture, engineering, estimation, procurement, and construction management. We have 25 active projects ranging from feasibility studies to buildings under construction, and a pipeline of 150+ prospective clients.



We are looking for someone to own client engagement — the function of keeping prospective and active clients informed, engaged, and moving forward. This role does not currently exist. You would be the first person dedicated to this function.



---



## What Your Week Actually Looks Like



**Monday**

- 8:00 AM (your time): Open Close CRM. Review the Qualified leads list. Identify 5-8 leads to contact today — prioritize by recency (newest inquiries first) and value (property developers with active projects over casual inquiries).

- 9:00-11:00 AM: Make calls and send follow-up
s. For each lead: introduce yourself, confirm their interest, ask qualifying questions (property location, timeline, budget range, what stage they're at), log the outcome in CRM.

- 11:00 AM-12:00 PM: Check aging proposals. We currently have design proposals sent to clients that haven't received follow-up. Call each one: "We sent over the proposal on [date]. Wanted to check if you have any questions or if you'd like to discuss any adjustments."

- 1:00-3:00 PM (overlapping with Halifax morning): Send weekly status updates to Active clients. You compile this from our project management system (ClickUp) and our construction team's Slack channels. Even if there's no major update — the client hears from you. "Hi [name], just checking in. The design team submitted updated drawings on Tuesday. Our engineer is reviewing structural details this week. Happy to jump on a call if you'd like to discuss."

- 3:00-4:00 PM: Handle any inbound inquiries that came in today (phone,
, website). Qualify them. Route technical questions to the right tea
mber. Log in CRM.

- End of day: Update CRM with all touchpoints. Post a brief daily summary: leads contacted, proposals followed up, client updates sent, inbound inquiries handled.



**Tuesday-Thursday:** Same rhythm. Different leads, different clients, different follow-ups. The CRM tells you who needs attention.



**Friday**

- Weekly report to management: Leads contacted this week, conversion status, proposals aging, Active client touchpoints, inbound inquiry summary, any flags or concerns.

- Plan next week's priority contacts.



---



## What You're NOT Doing



- You are NOT selling. You are not closing deals or negotiating contracts. You are keeping the pipeline warm and flowing. The CEO and design team handle the technical discussions and deal closure.

- You are NOT producing architectural drawings, estimates, or technical documents. You compile status from the people who do.

- You are NOT making construction decisions. When a client asks a technical question, you route it to the right person — you don't answer it yourself.



---



## What We Need From You



**Must have:**

- Professional English — written and spoken. You will be calling and
ing Canadian property developers, real estate investors, and municipal officials. They need to understand you clearly and feel they're dealing with a professional organization.

- Experience in a client-facing role at a construction, real estate, development, or professional services company. You understand what "feasibility study" and "building permit" mean. You can have an intelligent 10-minute conversation about a property development project without technical depth.

- CRM experience. You have used a CRM system (Close, Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, or similar) to manage a pipeline of 20+ relationships. You track everything. Nothing falls through.

- Proactive by nature. You open the CRM every morning and work the list because that's the job. You don't wait for someone to tell you "call this person."



**Nice to have:**

- Experience in Canadian or North American construction/development context

- Familiarity with municipal planning processes (permits, zoning, development agreements)

- Experience with ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace



---



## Screening Questions



Please answer all 5 questions in your application. Applications without answers will not be reviewed.



1. **Experience:** Describe a role where you managed ongoing communication with 10+ clients or accounts simultaneously. What system did you use to ensure nothing fell through? How many relationships were you managing at your peak?



2. **Scenario — Follow-up:** We sent a design proposal to a property developer 3 weeks ago. No response. You call them. They say "I've been busy, haven't had a chance to look at it." What do you say next, and what do you do after the call?



3. **Scenario — Routing:** A prospective client calls and says "I just bought a property in Dartmouth and I want to build 6 units on it. Can you help?" What are the first 5 questions you ask them, and why?



4. **Scenario — Technical limit:** An Active client
s asking about the structural engineering timeline for their project. You don't know the answer. Walk me through what you do in the next 10 minutes.



5. **Proactivity:** Describe a time in a previous role where you noticed something wasn't being done — and you started doing it without being asked. What was it, what did you do, and what was the result?



---



## 30-Day Proof Point



By day 30, we will know this is working if:

- Every Active client (14 currently) has received at least 3 weekly status updates

- At least 20 of the 37 Qualified leads have been contacted with outcomes logged

- All aging proposals (currently 6) have received at least 2 follow-up calls each

- Every inbound inquiry is responded to within 4 hours

- A weekly pipeline report is produced every Friday



---



## How to Apply



Reply to this posting with your answers to all 5 screening questions and your resume or portfolio. Include the word "PIPELINE" in your subject line so we know you read the full posting.

description:

title: Job Post - Ecommerce operations assistant
description:

Your day to day responsibilities will include:



- Updating / Adding new products to store

- Creating / updating shopify product pages

- Creating / updating custom landing pages in Gempages 

- Product image generation (using AI) 

- Static ad image generation (using AI)

- Basic image editing using canvas

-
 marketing with Klaviyo (templates and AI tools provided) 





Your skills must include: 

* Shopify — product pages, collections, and basic theme editing

* GemPages or similar landing page builder

* Mobile/desktop optimisation

* Klaviyo — campaigns, flows, and list management

* Canva or basic graphic editing

* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to follow systems and SOPs independently





The perfect candidate for this role is someone who: 

* Thrives in a fast-paced, high-output environment

* Embraces AI tools as a core part of how they work

* Takes pride in completing tasks quickly and accurately

* Is comfortable juggling multiple brands and task types simultaneously

* Takes ownership of their workload and gets things done without being chased





This role is not for you if: 

- Need detailed instructions for every task

- Uncomfortable working with AI tools as part of your daily workflow

- Prefer to focus on one task or brand at a time

- Need a highly structured, predictable routine

- Not comfortable with a fast-moving, sometimes ambiguous workload

- Looking for a role where speed isn't a priority





Hours This role starts at 20 hours per week with a clear pathway to full-time within 4–8 weeks based on performance. We are based in Australia so working hours are within AEST business hours. 





If this sounds like the perfect role for you, please complete the google form below & we will be in touch with shortlisted candidates:

title: Email Marketing Specialist – Government Contracting & Small Business
description:
Job Title:
 Marketing Specialist – Government Contracting & Small Business

 Company: Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC)

 Position Type: Part
-Time

 Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM CST (Remote) or as discussed



About Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC)



Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC) is a consulting and education firm that helps small businesses secure state and federal government contracts. Through our programs, services, and our SaaS platform GovCon iSource, we equip entrepreneurs with the tools, strategy, and execution needed to grow and scale in the government marketplace.



Our audience includes U.S.-based business owners (ages 25–55) generating $100K to $10M annually across multiple industries. We are building a powerful ecosystem that blends education, technology, community, and strategic partnerships to drive real contract wins.



Role Overview



We are seeking an
 Marketing Strategist who understands that
 is not just communication—it is a revenue engine.

This role is responsible for strategy, execution, optimization, and reporting across all
 marketing initiatives. You will own the full lifecycle of

Produce weekly performance reports with actionable insights

Collaboration & Communication

- Support cross-functional campaigns tied to client success and revenue growth



Required Qualifications

 marketing strategy and execution (2+ years preferred)

- Strong experience with CRM/email platforms (Go High Level preferred)

- Advanced understanding of graphic design, segmentation, automation, and lifecycle marketing

- Excellent copywriting and communication skills

- Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and optimize campaigns

- High attention to detail, organization, and follow-through

- Proficiency with tools like ChatGPT and/or Claude for content support and efficiency



Preferred Qualifications

 is one of the highest ROI channels in our business. This role directly impacts:

title: Newsletter Specialist - beehiiv, Email Marketing & Claude AI
description:
beehiiv Newsletter Writer -
 Marketing Expertise & AI Proficiency Required



We are Nest Marketing, a full-service
 and SMS retention marketing agency managing 60+ DTC and e-commerce brand clients. We've generated $175M+ in
 revenue for 250+ brands, and now we're looking for a skilled Newsletter Writer who can translate our deep
 marketing expertise into high-quality content.



What You'll Be Doing



You'll be creating 30 newsletters per month on our beehiiv platform, covering
 marketing strategy, retention tactics, DTC insights, and real-world case studies from our work with health supplement brands, peptide companies, and consumer goods clients.



These aren't generic newsletters. They need to be well-informed, tactical, and rooted in real expertise — the kind of content that
 marketers, agency owners, and DTC founders actually want to read.



The Role



- Write and publish 30 newsletters monthly on beehiiv

- Topics:
 marketing strategy, Klaviyo tactics, SMS marketing, retention optimization, subscription growth, segmentation, flows, campaigns, creative testing, and DTC trends

- Use Claude AI to research, draft, and refine content (you must know how to prompt effectively)

- Manage the full beehiiv platform: scheduling, formatting, audience segmentation, analytics tracking

- Collaborate with our team to pull real insights and case studies from client work

- Maintain a consistent voice: direct, anti-guru, tactical, no fluff



Requirements



Must-Haves:

- Proven experience using beehiiv (platform navigation, newsletter creation, audience management, analytics)

- Strong understanding of
 marketing fundamentals (flows, campaigns, segmentation, deliverability, metrics)

- Deep familiarity with Claude AI and how to use it for content creation (prompting, editing, research)

- Excellent English writing skills — clear, concise, engaging

- Ability to turn complex marketing concepts into digestible content

- Self-starter who can manage deadlines independently

- Available to work weekdays and weekends as needed



Bonus Points:

- Experience with Klaviyo, 
, or other
 platforms

- Background in DTC, e-commerce, or retention marketing

- Familiarity with health/supplement brands

- Experience writing for marketing agencies or B2B audiences

- Knowledge of AI tools beyond Claude (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)



Getting to Know You

 marketing? (Platforms used, types of campaigns, etc.)

 marketers?

About Nest Marketing



We're a team of 50+
 and SMS specialists working with top DTC brands in health supplements, peptides, and consumer goods. Our work is data-driven, creative-first, and focused on retention and LTV growth.



Learn more: nestmarketing.co



Growth Opportunity



This role is perfect for someone who wants to build their reputation in the

title: Technical Staffing Operations Specialist
description:
Job Title: Technical Staffing Operations Specialist (US Government Contracting) 

Salary: $3.00 USD / Hour 

Work Schedule: 8AM-4PM EST 



About the Company



We are Abrahams Consulting LLC, a New York City-based Minority and Women-Owned Business Enterprise (MWBE) specialized in government contracting and staffing. We operate under a strict Quality Management System (QMS) compliant with ISO 9001 standards.



About the Role



We are looking for a meticulous Technical Staffing Operations Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will provide specialized technical staffing support services. Because we serve government agencies, this position requires zero-defect delivery, strict confidentiality, and adherence to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).





What You Will Do



1. Government Solicitation Management



Data Acquisition: Systematically gather and verify vendor and opportunity information from the NYC Passport system and similar platforms.



Review: Review incoming government solicitations to identify deliverables with 100?curacy.



Dissemination: Filter and share relevant opportunities with our Vendor Partners (VPs) within set turnaround times.



2. Candidate Processing & Quality Assurance



Resume Vetting: Screen candidate resumes against strict government requirements (mandatory skills, years of experience).



Resume Editing: Format and edit resumes to meet standardized Company and Client presentation standards.



Onboarding: Manage the administrative onboarding process for new Vendor Partners.



Continuous Improvement: Document feedback on submissions to help improve our staffing process.



3. Project Management



Asana Management: Maintain real-time accuracy of project tracking fields in Asana; tasks must be updated daily.



Submission Tracking: Proactively track the status of submitted candidates and log all client communications.



Document Control: Maintain all records in company cloud storage with strict version control (e.g., v1.0, v1.1).





Requirements



ISO 9001 Mindset: You must be willing to strictly follow documented SOPs and Work Instructions.



Attention to Detail: We require zero-defect delivery. If errors occur, you must participate in "Root Cause Analysis" to prevent recurrence.





Tech Savvy: Proficiency in Asana, Cloud Storage, and web-based portals (NYC Passport).





Data Security: You must strictly protect sensitive government data and PII. Data must never be stored on personal devices.





Compensation & Benefits



Rate: $3.00 USD per hour.



Payment: Paid via PayPal in US Dollars.



Evaluation: You will undergo a monitored 90-Day Probationary Assessment Period.



Growth: Successful completion of probation and meeting quality targets constitutes eligibility for a salary grade review.



How to Apply



Please reply with your resume and a brief cover letter explaining your experience with data entry, resume formatting, or project management tools like Asana.

title: Healthcare Recruiter
description:
Job description:



We are a growing U.S.-based healthcare company seeking a Recruiter / Interview Specialist to support therapist hiring across multiple departments.



This role is call-heavy and interview-focused, with additional responsibility for coordinating hiring needs and tracking recruitment progress. Approximately 90% of your work will involve phone interviews with therapist candidates.



If you are not comfortable being on calls for most of your shift, this role is not a good fit.



Role Overview



• You will conduct daily phone interviews with licensed therapists (PT, OT, ST, PTA, COTA), coordinate with internal teams on hiring needs, and manage the recruitment pipeline from job posting through candidate handoff.

• You are the first point of contact for candidates and a key link between departments, so professionalism, organization, and communication are essential.



Key Responsibilities



• Interviewing & Screening (Primary Focus)

• Conduct high-volume phone interviews daily with therapist candidates.

• Screen candidates for: Licensure and credentials, Experience and specialties, Availability and geographic coverage,



Communication skills and professionalism

• Clearly explain roles, expectations, and next steps.

• Identify red flags and escalate concerns when necessary.

• Recruitment Coordination & Follow-Ups

• Follow up with candidates after interviews as needed.

• Coordinate with internal departments (staffing, operations, leadership) to understand current and upcoming hiring needs.

• Schedule next steps and hand off qualified candidates appropriately.

• Maintain timely and professional communication with candidates throughout the process.

• Job Posting & Process Tracking

• Post job openings on approved platforms as hiring needs change.

• Track candidates through each stage of the recruitment process.

• Keep recruitment trackers or ATS accurate and up to date.

• Provide basic updates on hiring progress when requested.



What We’re Looking For



• Comfortable being on the phone most of the workday.

• Clear, confident, professional speaking voice.

• Strong listening and judgment skills.

• Highly organized and detail-oriented.

• Able to manage follow-ups and coordination without losing 
ntum.



Qualifications



• 1–2+ years of experience in: Recruiting, Healthcare staffing, HR screening, Call center interviewing

• Excellent spoken and written English.

• Comfortable conducting multiple interviews per day.

• Familiar with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs).

• Bonus: Experience recruiting healthcare professionals or independent contractors.



Requirements



• Reliable internet connection.

• Quiet, professional work environment for calls.

• Ability to work U.S. (PST) business hours.

• Part-time or full-time availability (to be discussed).



How to apply



• Please send a brief cover letter outlining your experience that is aligned or related to the role you are applying for. Make sure to include the specific tasks you have handled, as well as the link to your resume.

• Kindly monitor your OLJ inbox, as I will send the final interview link and your schedule there if you are shortlisted for the position.





Benefits:



• Paid training

• Work from home



Experience:



• Recruiting: 2 years (Required)

• Healthcare Staffing: 1 year (Required)

• Work Location: Remote

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
Job description:



Executive Assistant to the CEO



Remote | Full-Time

Hours: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles, CA time zone), Monday - Friday



We are a fast-growing, US-based therapy practice supporting home health agencies and healthcare partners across multiple states. Our leadership team manages operations, staffing, agency relationships, and business development.



We are looking for a highly intelligent, proactive, and reliable Personal Executive Assistant who will work directly with the CEO. This position functions as the CEO’s right hand in handling communication, research, coordination, and execution.



The ideal candidate must have strong English communication skills with very minimal accent, be confident on calls, and think independently without constant supervision.



This role requires someone smart, resourceful, professional, and capable of operating at a leadership-support level.



Key Responsibilities:



• Manage and respond to
s on behalf of the CEO professionally and efficiently

• Make outbound calls to agencies, businesses, and partners

• Conduct detailed research on businesses, vendors, healthcare agencies, and market opportunities

• Assist with follow-ups and maintain professional communication

• Organize research findings into structured reports or summaries

• Coordinate schedules, calls, and priorities for the CEO

• Support business development efforts when needed

• Provide operational support during downtime for the therapy practice

• Handle sensitive information with discretion and confidentiality



Requirements:



• Strong English communication skills with minimal accent

• Confident and professional on phone calls

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong research and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and make smart decisions

• Proficient in Google Workspace

• Smart in Google Sheets (comfortable with formulas, tracking systems, organizing data)

• Willing to be on WebWork time tracker and 

• Professional, reliable, and discreet



Strong Plus:



• Basic marketing knowledge

• Social media management experience

• Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach and profile management

• Experience using Canva

• Experience using Adobe tools

• Experience supporting executives or business owners directly

• Assistant Manager or Operations experience



Why Join Us?



• Work directly with a US-based CEO

• High-level exposure to business operations and decision-making

• Growth opportunity into a larger leadership-support role

• Competitive pay based on skills and experience

• Work-from-home flexibility

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Job Type: Full-time

Work Location: Remote



Experience:

Executive Assistant: 5 years (Preferred)

Operations or Assistant Manager experience: Preferred



Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Fixed term



Benefits:





Opportunities for promotion

Paid training

Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Shopify Landing Page Designer (1 Product Store – High Conversion Focus)
description:

This is a single-product store focused on maximizing conversions, mobile experience, and brand perception.



Should take between 20-30 hours project total 



Responsibilities:



Build a Shopify landing page for 1 product



Create a clean, premium design (black / gold / modern aesthetic)

Structure page for high conversion (hero section, benefits, ingredients, social proof, FAQs, etc.)

Optimize for mobile first

Implement product page layout similar to high-performing supplement brands

Integrate images, copy, and branding (we will provide content)



Requirements:



Proven experience building Shopify landing pages (please send examples)

Strong understanding of conversion-focused design (not just aesthetics)

Experience with supplement or e-commerce brands preferred

Ability to follow reference styles (we will provide examples like StrivLabs)



Bonus:



Experience with Shopify apps (bundles, upsells, subscriptions)

Understanding of CRO (conversion rate optimization)

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Are you someone who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys taking on a variety of tasks throughout the day? Do you have a passion for organization and helping businesses run smoothly? If so, we’d love to have you join our team!



About Us:

McCarthy Media is a real estate photography business based in Salt Lake City, Utah, that prides itself on delivering high-quality visuals to our clients. We believe in working hard, having fun, and supporting each other along the way. We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant who shares our values and is eager to help us streamline our operations.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Quality Control & Photo Delivery: Review and deliver photos, videos, 3D tours, and other deliverables in the morning when they come back from our editors. Make edits to videos as needed.

Retouch Requests: Handle requests for photo retouching throughout the day/as needed, ensuring our clients get exactly what they need.

Project Management: Monitor projects send out within 24 hours or less of project capture

Customer Support & Success: Take requests and delegations tasks from text messages and
 inbox Flag urgent or complex issues for the appropriate tea
mber and ensure follow-up.

s & Phone Calls: Manage communication with our clients, keeping them informed and satisfied.



What We’re Looking For:

Willingness to Work in Mountain Standard Time (6 a.m. to 12 p.m. MST): Since most of our clients are based in this time zone, we need someone who’s ready to work when we are.

A Positive Attitude: We’re all about keeping things friendly and supportive, and we want you to be a part of that vibe.

Flexibility & Adaptability: Every day might bring something new, so we need someone who can roll with the punches and tackle whatever comes their way.

Honesty & Communication: This is key for running a successful business and creating healthy and lasting relationships!

Why You’ll Love Working with Us:

Supportive Team: We’re here to help each other out, and we’ll make sure you have everything you need to succeed.

Room to Grow: As our business expands, we want you to grow as well! Creating new learning opportunities as well as helping the team towards their goals is a core value in our business.

If you are interested:

Send your resume, a screenshot of an internet speed test, and a video introducing yourself to 
 and we will reach out with next steps!

title: Expert Construction Virtual Assistant for Australian Builder
description:
About Us



Evolve Homes Queensland is a fast growing residential building company based in South East Queensland, Australia.



We specialise in fixed price full turn key homes with premium inclusions and a 16 week express building program. We are focused on quality, speed, strong systems, and excellent client service.



The Role



We are looking for an Expert Virtual Assistant with real construction administration experience, preferably supporting an Australian builder or construction business.



This is a full time, long term role. We need someone organised, proactive, detail focused, and confident working in a fast paced construction environment.



This is not an entry level admin role.



You must already understand how to support a busy team, manage documents, follow up stakeholders, and keep projects moving.



Important:



We are not accepting applicants who currently have multiple clients or other jobs.



This is an exclusive full time role. You must be fully available during work hours and able to commit your full focus to our business.



If you currently work for other clients, run side jobs, or have overlapping commitments, please do not apply.



Responsibilities

• Provide day to day admin support to the construction team

• Manage calendars, follow ups, meeting coordination, and general team support

• Prepare, send, file, and track construction documents

• Maintain accurate project records, reports, and timelines

• Coordinate with suppliers, trades, contractors, and internal staff

• Help track project progress and flag missing items or delays

• Support reporting, document control, and project systems

• Assist with presentations, spreadsheets, and general operations admin

• Help ensure nothing slips through the cracks across active jobs



Requirements

• Proven experience in construction admin, project coordination, or similar support role

• Strong preference for experience with Australian builders, trades, or construction companies

• Excellent written and verbal English

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow process exactly

• Highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

• Strong Microsoft Office skills, especially Word and Excel

• Confident using CRMs, project management tools, and cloud based systems

• Good understanding of construction terminology and workflows

• Professional, reliable, responsive, and proactive

• Stable internet, reliable computer, and quiet work from home setup

• Willing to work full time on an exclusive basis only



What We Offer

• Competitive salary based on experience

• Permanent work from home arrangement

• Australian holidays off

• 5 paid vacation leaves

• Weekends off

• Day shift schedule from 8:00 am to 5:00 pm Philippine Time

• Ongoing training and support

• Long term opportunity with a growing Australian builder



How to Apply



• To be considered, you must follow all steps exactly.



Step 1



Watch this video:





Step 2



Record a video using Loom and address it to L.A.

Step 3

Step 4



Your
 subject line must include:

Final Notes

title: Creative Designer
description:
Join us as a Creative Designer and help bring our marketing campaigns to life across digital, print, and event materials. You will play a key role in supporting our design creation for Exhibition and Brand Activation  work for upcoming fairs and campaigns



Responsibilities

• Create, update, and refine visuals based on design briefs

• Produce artworks and images for marketing use

• Help create visuals that attract customers and support brand goals

• Adapt and prepare design assets for fairs, brand activations, and online campaigns

• Design digital materials such as banners, social media posts, product highlights, and promotional graphics

• Making sure all visuals follow our brand guidelines

• Work closely with the Marketing and Brand Activation teams on updates, approvals, and design needs

• Keep files organised, labelled, and updated for easy tracking



Requirements

• Good skills in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign

• Video editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, etc.) is a plus

• Able to turn ideas into clear, attractive visuals

• Positive, energetic, and willing to take on new challenges

• Able to adjust to changing tasks and processes

• Communicates clearly with tea
mbers and external partners

• Strong attention to detail and quality

• Can work well in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines

• Creative and organised

• Self-driven, reliable, and able to work independently while still being a good team player

title: Customer Service & Lead Qualification Specialist
description:
We are a U.S.-based private car rental company looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to handle customer communication, lead management, and basic operations.



You will be responsible for responding to leads, booking renters, coordinating maintenance, and keeping everything organized.



?



Responsibilities

 • Answer inbound calls and messages (English required)

 • Respond to rental inquiries and follow up with leads

 • Pre-qualify and book renters

 • Manage and update GoHighLevel CRM pipeline

 • Track leads, bookings, and renter status

 • Update Google Sheets / Excel trackers daily

 • Coordinate scheduling (renters + basic maintenance)



?



Requirements (Must Have)

 • Experience using GoHighLevel (CRM)

 • Experience with Google Sheets or Excel

 • Strong English communication (phone + text)

 • Customer service or sales experience

 • Organized, detail-oriented, and responsive

 • Reliable internet and work environment



?



Nice to Have

 • Experience with rentals, logistics, or real estate

 • Experience handling high volume of leads

 • Familiar with CRM automations



?



What We’re Looking For

 • Someone who follows systems (not guessing)

 • Fast and clear communication

 • Able to handle multiple conversations at once

 • Takes ownership of their role



?



Compensation

 • Hourly pay (based on experience)

 • Performance bonuses available

 • Long-term opportunity



?



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, include this keyword at the top of your application “Skycrest”



Also include:

 • Your experience with GoHighLevel

 • Your experience with Google Sheet/Excel



Applications without the keyword “Skycrest” will not be reviewed.
